            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between mb-3">
                <div>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openAbsenceModal()">
                        <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> DÃĐclarer absence/retard
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-info btn-sm" onclick="openDeductionModal()">
                        <i class="fas fa-minus-circle"></i> Ajouter une retenue
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-body p-0">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                            <thead class="table-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th>ID</th>
                                <th>EmployÃĐ</th>
                                <th>Type</th>
                                <th>Date dÃĐbut</th>
                                <th>Date fin</th>
                                <th>Raison</th>
                                <th>Actions</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody id="absencesTableBody">
                            <tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="7">Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- RETENUES -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade" id="deductions-pane">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-end mb-3">
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openDeductionModal()">
                    <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Ajouter une retenue
                </button>
            </div>
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-body p-0">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                            <thead class="table-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th>ID</th>
                                <th>EmployÃĐ</th>
                                <th>Montant (DA)</th>
                                <th>Date</th>
                                <th>Motif</th>
                                <th>Actions</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody id="deductionsTableBody">
                            <tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="6">Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL EMPLOYÃ (crÃĐation / ÃĐdition) -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="employeeModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">EmployÃĐ</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="employeeId">
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>PrÃĐnom *</label><input type="text" id="empFirstName" class="form-control" required></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Nom *</label><input type="text" id="empLastName" class="form-control" required></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Date naissance</label><input type="date" id="empBirthDate" class="form-control"></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>TÃĐlÃĐphone</label><input type="tel" id="empPhone" class="form-control"></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Wilaya</label><input type="text" id="empWilaya" class="form-control"></div>
                    <!-- Usine : affichÃĐe en lecture seule (dÃĐterminÃĐe automatiquement par le serveur) -->
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Usine (automatique)</label><input type="text" id="empRecyclingCenterName" class="form-control" readonly disabled></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Salaire brut (DA) *</label><input type="number" step="0.001" id="empSalary" class="form-control" required></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Statut</label><select id="empActive" class="form-select"><option value="true">Actif</option><option value="false">Inactif</option></select></div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveEmployee()">Enregistrer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL ABSENCE / RETARD -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="absenceModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-warning text-dark">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">DÃĐclarer absence/retard</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="absenceId">
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>EmployÃĐ *</label><select id="absenceEmployeeId" class="form-select" required></select></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Type *</label>
                        <select id="absenceType" class="form-select">
                            <option value="ABSENCE">Absence</option>
                            <option value="JUSTIFIED">Absence justifiÃĐe</option>
                            <option value="LATE">Retard</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Date dÃĐbut *</label><input type="date" id="absenceStartDate" class="form-control" required></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Date fin</label><input type="date" id="absenceEndDate" class="form-control"></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Raison</label><textarea id="absenceReason" rows="2" class="form-control"></textarea></div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveAbsence()">Enregistrer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL RETENUE -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="deductionModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">Retenue sur salaire</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="deductionId">
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>EmployÃĐ *</label><select id="deductionEmployeeId" class="form-select" required></select></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Montant (DA) *</label><input type="number" step="0.001" id="deductionAmount" class="form-control" required></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Date *</label><input type="date" id="deductionDate" class="form-control" required></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Motif</label><textarea id="deductionReason" rows="2" class="form-control"></textarea></div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveDeduction()">Enregistrer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let employeesPage = 0, employeesTotalPages = 0;
        let currentEmployees = [];
        let currentAbsences = [];
        let currentDeductions = [];

        // ========== UTILITAIRES ==========
        function formatMoney(amount) {
            if (amount === undefined || amount === null) return '0,00 DA';
            const num = typeof amount === 'number' ? amount : parseFloat(amount);
            return num.toLocaleString('fr-DZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' DA';
        }
        function formatDate(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return '-';
            const d = new Date(dateStr);
            return d.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR');
        }
        function escapeHtml(str) { if (!str) return ''; return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;' }[m])); }

        // ========== EMPLOYÃS ==========
        async function loadEmployees(page = 0) {
            employeesPage = page;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/employees-data?page=${page}&size=20`);
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    currentEmployees = data.data.content;
                    renderEmployees(currentEmployees);
                    employeesTotalPages = data.data.totalPages;
                    renderEmployeesPagination(data.data);
                } else {
                    throw new Error(data.message);
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                document.getElementById('employeesTableBody').innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="10">Erreur de chargement<\/td><\/tr>';
            }
        }

        function renderEmployees(employees) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('employeesTableBody');
            if (!employees || employees.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="10">Aucun employÃĐ<\/td><\/tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = employees.map(emp => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${emp.id}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(emp.fullName)}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(emp.phone) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(emp.wilaya) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(emp.recyclingCenterName) || '-'}</td>
                    <td class="text-end">${formatMoney(emp.salaryAmount)}</td>
                    <td class="text-end text-danger">- ${formatMoney(emp.totalDeductions)}</td>
                    <td class="text-end fw-bold">${formatMoney(emp.netSalary)}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${emp.active ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${emp.active ? 'Actif' : 'Inactif'}</span></td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editEmployee(${emp.id})"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-warning" onclick="toggleEmployeeActive(${emp.id}, ${!emp.active})"><i class="fas fa-power-off"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteEmployee(${emp.id})"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderEmployeesPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('employeesPagination');
            if (employeesTotalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadEmployees(${employeesPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < employeesTotalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === employeesPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadEmployees(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadEmployees(${employeesPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function openEmployeeModal() {
            document.getElementById('employeeId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('empFirstName').value = '';
            document.getElementById('empLastName').value = '';
            document.getElementById('empBirthDate').value = '';
            document.getElementById('empPhone').value = '';
            document.getElementById('empWilaya').value = '';
            document.getElementById('empRecyclingCenterName').value = '';
            document.getElementById('empSalary').value = '';
            document.getElementById('empActive').value = 'true';
            document.querySelector('#employeeModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Nouvel employÃĐ';
            showModal('employeeModal');
        }

        async function editEmployee(id) {
            const emp = currentEmployees.find(e => e.id === id);
            if (emp) {
                document.getElementById('employeeId').value = emp.id;
                document.getElementById('empFirstName').value = emp.firstName;
                document.getElementById('empLastName').value = emp.lastName;
                document.getElementById('empBirthDate').value = emp.birthDate ? emp.birthDate.slice(0,10) : '';
                document.getElementById('empPhone').value = emp.phone || '';
                document.getElementById('empWilaya').value = emp.wilaya || '';
                document.getElementById('empRecyclingCenterName').value = emp.recyclingCenterName || '';
                document.getElementById('empSalary').value = emp.salaryAmount;
                document.getElementById('empActive').value = emp.active;
                document.querySelector('#employeeModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Modifier employÃĐ';
                showModal('employeeModal');
            } else {
                alert('EmployÃĐ non trouvÃĐ');
            }
        }

        async function saveEmployee() {
            const id = document.getElementById('employeeId').value;
            const data = {
                firstName: document.getElementById('empFirstName').value,
                lastName: document.getElementById('empLastName').value,
                birthDate: document.getElementById('empBirthDate').value || null,
                phone: document.getElementById('empPhone').value || null,
                wilaya: document.getElementById('empWilaya').value || null,
                salaryAmount: parseFloat(document.getElementById('empSalary').value),
                active: document.getElementById('empActive').value === 'true'
            };
            if (!data.firstName || !data.lastName || !data.salaryAmount) {
                alert('PrÃĐnom, nom et salaire sont obligatoires');
                return;
            }
            const url = id ? `/accountant/employees-update/${id}` : '/accountant/employees-create';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
            try {
                const res = await fetch(url, { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(data) });
                const resp = await res.json();
                if (resp.success) {
                    hideModal('employeeModal');
                    loadEmployees(employeesPage);
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur: ' + (resp.message || 'Action ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                }
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        async function toggleEmployeeActive(id, activate) {
            const action = activate ? 'activate' : 'deactivate';
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/employees-${action}/${id}`, { method: 'PUT' });
                const resp = await res.json();
                if (resp.success) loadEmployees(employeesPage);
                else alert('Erreur');
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        async function deleteEmployee(id) {
            if (!confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement cet employÃĐ ?')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/employees-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
                const resp = await res.json();
                if (resp.success) loadEmployees(employeesPage);
                else alert('Erreur');
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        // ========== ABSENCES ==========
        async function loadAbsences() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/absences-data');
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    currentAbsences = data.data;
                    renderAbsences();
                }
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
        }

        function renderAbsences() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('absencesTableBody');
            if (!currentAbsences || currentAbsences.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="7">Aucune absence/retard<\/td><\/tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = currentAbsences.map(a => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${a.id}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(a.employeeFullName)}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(a.type)}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(a.startDate)}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(a.endDate)}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(a.reason) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editAbsence(${a.id})"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteAbsence(${a.id})"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        async function loadEmployeesForSelect(selectId) {
            const res = await fetch('/accountant/employees-list');
            const data = await res.json();
            if (data.success) {
                const select = document.getElementById(selectId);
                select.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- SÃĐlectionner --</option>';
                data.data.forEach(emp => {
                    if (emp.active) {
                        const opt = document.createElement('option');
                        opt.value = emp.id;
                        opt.textContent = emp.fullName + (emp.wilaya ? ` (${emp.wilaya})` : '');
                        select.appendChild(opt);
                    }
                });
            }
        }

        function openAbsenceModal() {
            document.getElementById('absenceId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('absenceType').value = 'ABSENCE';
            document.getElementById('absenceStartDate').value = '';
            document.getElementById('absenceEndDate').value = '';
            document.getElementById('absenceReason').value = '';
            loadEmployeesForSelect('absenceEmployeeId');
            document.querySelector('#absenceModal .modal-title').innerText = 'DÃĐclarer absence/retard';
            showModal('absenceModal');
        }

        function editAbsence(id) {
            const absence = currentAbsences.find(a => a.id === id);
            if (absence) {
                document.getElementById('absenceId').value = absence.id;
                loadEmployeesForSelect('absenceEmployeeId').then(() => {
                    document.getElementById('absenceEmployeeId').value = absence.employeeId;
                });
                document.getElementById('absenceType').value = absence.type;
                document.getElementById('absenceStartDate').value = absence.startDate.slice(0,10);
                document.getElementById('absenceEndDate').value = absence.endDate ? absence.endDate.slice(0,10) : '';
                document.getElementById('absenceReason').value = absence.reason || '';
                document.querySelector('#absenceModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Modifier absence/retard';
                showModal('absenceModal');
            }
        }

        async function saveAbsence() {
            const id = document.getElementById('absenceId').value;
            const employeeId = parseInt(document.getElementById('absenceEmployeeId').value);
            const type = document.getElementById('absenceType').value;
            const startDate = document.getElementById('absenceStartDate').value;
            const endDate = document.getElementById('absenceEndDate').value;
            const reason = document.getElementById('absenceReason').value;

            if (!employeeId || !type || !startDate) {
                alert('EmployÃĐ, type et date dÃĐbut sont obligatoires');
                return;
            }

            const data = {
                employeeId: employeeId,
                type: type,
                startDate: startDate,
                endDate: endDate || null,
                reason: reason || null
            };

            const url = id ? `/accountant/absences-update/${id}` : '/accountant/absences-create';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';

            try {
                const res = await fetch(url, { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(data) });
                const resp = await res.json();
                if (resp.success) {
                    hideModal('absenceModal');
                    await loadAbsences();
                    openDeductionModalWithPreset(employeeId, startDate, type, reason);
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur: ' + (resp.message || 'Action ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                }
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        function openDeductionModalWithPreset(employeeId, absenceDate, absenceType, absenceReason) {
            loadEmployeesForSelect('deductionEmployeeId').then(() => {
                document.getElementById('deductionEmployeeId').value = employeeId;
            });
            if (absenceDate) {
                document.getElementById('deductionDate').value = absenceDate;
            }
            let defaultReason = `Retenue suite Ã  ${absenceType === 'LATE' ? 'retard' : (absenceType === 'JUSTIFIED' ? 'absence justifiÃĐe' : 'absence')}`;
            if (absenceReason) defaultReason += ` : ${absenceReason}`;
            document.getElementById('deductionReason').value = defaultReason;
            document.getElementById('deductionAmount').value = '';
            document.getElementById('deductionId').value = '';
            document.querySelector('#deductionModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Ajouter une retenue (obligatoire)';

            const modalElem = document.getElementById('deductionModal');
            const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElem, { backdrop: 'static', keyboard: false });
            modal.show();
        }

        async function deleteAbsence(id) {
            if (!confirm('Supprimer cette absence/retard ?')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/absences-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
                const resp = await res.json();
                if (resp.success) loadAbsences();
                else alert('Erreur');
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        // ========== DÃDUCTIONS ==========
        async function loadDeductions() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/deductions-data');
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    currentDeductions = data.data;
                    renderDeductions();
                }
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
        }

        function renderDeductions() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('deductionsTableBody');
            if (!currentDeductions || currentDeductions.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="6">Aucune retenue<\/td><\/tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = currentDeductions.map(d => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${d.id}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.employeeFullName)}</td>
                    <td class="text-end">${formatMoney(d.amount)}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(d.deductionDate)}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.reason) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editDeduction(${d.id})"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteDeduction(${d.id})"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function openDeductionModal() {
            document.getElementById('deductionId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('deductionAmount').value = '';
            document.getElementById('deductionDate').value = '';
            document.getElementById('deductionReason').value = '';
            loadEmployeesForSelect('deductionEmployeeId');
            document.querySelector('#deductionModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Ajouter une retenue';
            showModal('deductionModal');
        }

        function editDeduction(id) {
            const deduction = currentDeductions.find(d => d.id === id);
            if (deduction) {
                document.getElementById('deductionId').value = deduction.id;
                loadEmployeesForSelect('deductionEmployeeId').then(() => {
                    document.getElementById('deductionEmployeeId').value = deduction.employeeId;
                });
                document.getElementById('deductionAmount').value = deduction.amount;
                document.getElementById('deductionDate').value = deduction.deductionDate.slice(0,10);
                document.getElementById('deductionReason').value = deduction.reason || '';
                document.querySelector('#deductionModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Modifier retenue';
                showModal('deductionModal');
            }
        }

        async function saveDeduction() {
            const id = document.getElementById('deductionId').value;
            const data = {
                employeeId: parseInt(document.getElementById('deductionEmployeeId').value),
                amount: parseFloat(document.getElementById('deductionAmount').value),
                deductionDate: document.getElementById('deductionDate').value,
                reason: document.getElementById('deductionReason').value || null
            };
            if (!data.employeeId || !data.amount || !data.deductionDate) {
                alert('EmployÃĐ, montant et date sont obligatoires');
                return;
            }
            const url = id ? `/accountant/deductions-update/${id}` : '/accountant/deductions-create';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
            try {
                const res = await fetch(url, { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(data) });
                const resp = await res.json();
                if (resp.success) {
                    const modalElem = document.getElementById('deductionModal');
                    const modal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(modalElem);
                    if (modal) modal.hide();
                    loadDeductions();
                    loadEmployees(employeesPage);
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur: ' + (resp.message || 'Action ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                }
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        async function deleteDeduction(id) {
            if (!confirm('Supprimer cette retenue ?')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/deductions-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
                const resp = await res.json();
                if (resp.success) {
                    loadDeductions();
                    loadEmployees(employeesPage);
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur');
                }
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        function showModal(id) { new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show(); }
        function hideModal(id) { bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id)).hide(); }

        // Initialisation
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            loadEmployees();
            loadAbsences();
            loadDeductions();
        });
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

                    <option value="MARKETING">Marketing</option>
                    <option value="UTILITIES">UtilitÃĐs</option>
                    <option value="COLLECTOR_PAYMENT">Paiement collecteurs</option>
                    <option value="OTHER">Autres</option>
                    <option value="CLIENT_PAYMENT">Paiements clients</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-2">
                <label class="form-label">Date dÃĐbut</label>
                <input type="date" id="startDateFilter" class="form-control form-control-sm">
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-2">
                <label class="form-label">Date fin</label>
                <input type="date" id="endDateFilter" class="form-control form-control-sm">
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-2">
                <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm w-100" onclick="applyFilters()">Filtrer</button>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-2">
                <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm w-100" onclick="resetFilters()">RÃĐinitialiser</button>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-1">
                <button class="btn btn-info btn-sm w-100" onclick="loadStats()" title="Actualiser stats"><i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i></button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Tableau des dÃĐpenses -->
    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
        <div class="card-body p-0">
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                    <thead class="table-light">
                    <tr>
                        <th>ID</th><th>CatÃĐgorie</th><th>Description</th><th>Montant (DA)</th><th>Date dÃĐpense</th><th>Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="expensesTableBody">
                    <tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center py-4">Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-footer bg-white"><nav id="paginationNav"></nav></div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL CRÃATION / ÃDITION -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="expenseModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">DÃĐpense</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="expenseId">
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">CatÃĐgorie *</label>
                        <select id="category" class="form-select" required>
                            <option value="SALARY">Salaires</option>
                            <option value="MAINTENANCE">Maintenance</option>
                            <option value="MARKETING">Marketing</option>
                            <option value="UTILITIES">UtilitÃĐs (eau, ÃĐlectricitÃĐ)</option>
                            <option value="COLLECTOR_PAYMENT">Paiement collecteurs</option>
                            <option value="OTHER">Autres</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
                        <textarea id="description" rows="2" class="form-control"></textarea>
                    </div>

                        <label class="form-label">Montant (DA) *</label>
                        <input type="number" step="0.001" id="amount" class="form-control" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">Date de la dÃĐpense</label>
                        <input type="date" id="expenseDate" class="form-control">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveExpense()">Enregistrer</button>
                </div>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.0/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        let currentPage = 0;
        let pageSize = 20;
        let totalPages = 0;
        let currentFilters = { category: '', startDate: '', endDate: '' };
        let expensesChart, monthlyChart;

        // Helper
        const formatMoney = a => a?.toLocaleString('fr-DZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' DA' ?? '0 DA';
        const formatDate = d => d ? new Date(d).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') : '-';
        const escapeHtml = s => s?.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;' }[m])) ?? '';

        // Chargement des stats
        async function loadStats() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/expenses-stats');
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    const total = apiRes.data.total;
                    const count = apiRes.data.count;
                    document.getElementById('statsCards').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="col-md-4"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>Total dÃĐpenses</h6><h2>${formatMoney(total)}</h2></div></div></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>Nombre de dÃĐpenses</h6><h2>${count}</h2></div></div></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>CatÃĐgories actives</h6><h2>-</h2></div></div></div>
                    `;
                }
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
        }

        // Chargement des dÃĐpenses
        async function loadExpenses(page = 0) {
            currentPage = page;
            let url = `/accountant/expenses-data?`;
            if (currentFilters.category) url += `category=${currentFilters.category}&`;
            if (currentFilters.startDate) url += `startDate=${currentFilters.startDate}&`;
            if (currentFilters.endDate) url += `endDate=${currentFilters.endDate}&`;

            try {
                const res = await fetch(url);
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    const allExpenses = apiRes.data;
                    const start = page * pageSize;
                    const paginated = allExpenses.slice(start, start + pageSize);
                    totalPages = Math.ceil(allExpenses.length / pageSize);
                    renderTable(paginated);
                    renderPagination({ first: page === 0, last: page === totalPages - 1 || totalPages === 0 });
                }
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
        }

        function renderTable(expenses) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('expensesTableBody');
            if (!expenses || expenses.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center">Aucune dÃĐpense trouvÃĐe<\/td><\/tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = expenses.map(e => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${e.id}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge bg-secondary badge-category">${getCategoryLabel(e.category)}</span></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(e.description) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>${formatMoney(e.amount)}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(e.expenseDate)}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editExpense(${e.id})" title="Modifier"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteExpense(${e.id})" title="Supprimer"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function getCategoryLabel(cat) {
            const map = {
                'SALARY': 'Salaires', 'MAINTENANCE': 'Maintenance', 'MARKETING': 'Marketing',
                'UTILITIES': 'UtilitÃĐs', 'OTHER': 'Autres', 'COLLECTOR_PAYMENT': 'Paiement collecteurs', 'CLIENT_PAYMENT': 'Retraits clients'
            };
            return map[cat] || cat;
        }

        function renderPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('paginationNav');
            if (totalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadExpenses(${currentPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < totalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadExpenses(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadExpenses(${currentPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function applyFilters() {
            currentFilters = {
                category: document.getElementById('categoryFilter').value,
                startDate: document.getElementById('startDateFilter').value,
                endDate: document.getElementById('endDateFilter').value
            };
            currentPage = 0;
            loadExpenses();
        }

        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('categoryFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('startDateFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('endDateFilter').value = '';
            currentFilters = { category: '', startDate: '', endDate: '' };
            currentPage = 0;
            loadExpenses();
        }

        // CRUD
        function openExpenseModal() {
            document.getElementById('expenseId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('category').value = 'OTHER';
            document.getElementById('description').value = '';
            document.getElementById('amount').value = '';
            document.getElementById('expenseDate').value = '';
            document.querySelector('#expenseModal .modal-title').innerHTML = 'Nouvelle dÃĐpense';
            showModal('expenseModal');
        }

        async function editExpense(id) {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/expenses-data');
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (!apiRes.success) throw new Error(apiRes.message);
                const expense = apiRes.data.find(e => e.id === id);
                if (!expense) throw new Error('DÃĐpense introuvable');
                document.getElementById('expenseId').value = expense.id;
                document.getElementById('category').value = expense.category;
                document.getElementById('description').value = expense.description || '';
                document.getElementById('amount').value = expense.amount;
                document.getElementById('expenseDate').value = expense.expenseDate ? expense.expenseDate.slice(0,10) : '';
                document.querySelector('#expenseModal .modal-title').innerHTML = 'Modifier dÃĐpense';
                showModal('expenseModal');
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); alert('Erreur chargement'); }
        }

        async function saveExpense() {
            const id = document.getElementById('expenseId').value;
            const data = {
                category: document.getElementById('category').value,
                description: document.getElementById('description').value,
                amount: parseFloat(document.getElementById('amount').value),
                expenseDate: document.getElementById('expenseDate').value || null
            };
            if (!data.category || !data.amount || data.amount <= 0) {
                alert('CatÃĐgorie et montant valide obligatoires');
                return;
            }
            const url = id ? `/accountant/expenses-update/${id}` : '/accountant/expenses-create';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
            try {
                const res = await fetch(url, {
                    method: method,
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(data)
                });
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    hideModal('expenseModal');
                    loadExpenses(currentPage);
                    loadStats();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur: ' + (apiRes.message || 'Unknown error'));
                }
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur: ' + e.message); }
        }

        async function deleteExpense(id) {
            if (!confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement cette dÃĐpense ?')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/expenses-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    loadExpenses(currentPage);
                    loadStats();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur: ' + (apiRes.message || 'Delete failed'));
                }
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur suppression'); }
        }

        function showModal(id) { new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show(); }
        function hideModal(id) { bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id)).hide(); }

        // Initialisation
        loadStats().then(() => loadExpenses());
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

    <!-- MODAL CONFIRMATION (pour actions) -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="confirmModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-warning">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">Confirmation</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body" id="confirmMessage">Ãtes-vous sÃŧr ?</div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" id="confirmActionBtn">Confirmer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.0/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        let currentPage = 0;
        let pageSize = 20;
        let totalPages = 0;
        let currentFilters = {
            status: '',
            factoryName: '',
            minAmountHt: '',
            maxAmountHt: '',
            startDate: '',
            endDate: ''
        };

        // Helper
        const formatMoney = a => a?.toLocaleString('fr-DZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' DA' ?? '0 DA';
        const formatDate = d => d ? new Date(d).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') : '-';
        const escapeHtml = s => s?.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;' }[m])) ?? '';

        // Toggle modification pour IBAN / BIC
        function toggleEdit(fieldId) {
            const input = document.getElementById(fieldId);
            if (input.hasAttribute('readonly')) {
                input.removeAttribute('readonly');
                input.focus();
            } else {
                input.setAttribute('readonly', true);
            }
        }

        // Toggle champ personnalisÃĐ pour conditions de paiement
        function toggleCustomField() {
            const select = document.getElementById('paymentTermsSelect');
            const customBlock = document.getElementById('customPaymentTermsBlock');
            const customInput = document.getElementById('customPaymentTerms');
            if (select.value === 'CUSTOM') {
                customBlock.style.display = 'block';
                customInput.required = true;
            } else {
                customBlock.style.display = 'none';
                customInput.required = false;
                customInput.value = '';
            }
        }

        // Chargement des stats (endpoint web)
        async function loadStats() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/invoices-stats');
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    const stats = apiRes.data;
                    document.getElementById('statsCards').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="col-md-2"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>Total</h6><h2>${stats.totalInvoices || 0}</h2></div></div></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>PayÃĐes</h6><h2>${stats.paidInvoices || 0}</h2></div></div></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>En attente</h6><h2>${stats.pendingInvoices || 0}</h2></div></div></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>En retard</h6><h2>${stats.overdueInvoices || 0}</h2></div></div></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>Total encaissÃĐ (TTC)</h6><h2>${formatMoney(stats.totalAmountTtc)}</h2></div></div></div>
                    `;
                } else {
                    console.warn(apiRes.message);
                }
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
        }

        // Chargement de la liste avec filtres (endpoint web modifiÃĐ)
        async function loadInvoices(page = 0) {
            currentPage = page;
            let url = `/accountant/invoices-data?page=${page}&size=${pageSize}`;
            if (currentFilters.status) url += `&status=${currentFilters.status}`;
            if (currentFilters.factoryName) url += `&factoryName=${encodeURIComponent(currentFilters.factoryName)}`;
            if (currentFilters.minAmountHt && !isNaN(parseFloat(currentFilters.minAmountHt))) url += `&minAmountHt=${parseFloat(currentFilters.minAmountHt)}`;
            if (currentFilters.maxAmountHt && !isNaN(parseFloat(currentFilters.maxAmountHt))) url += `&maxAmountHt=${parseFloat(currentFilters.maxAmountHt)}`;
            if (currentFilters.startDate) url += `&startIssueDate=${currentFilters.startDate}`;
            if (currentFilters.endDate) url += `&endIssueDate=${currentFilters.endDate}`;

            try {
                const res = await fetch(url);
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    const pageData = apiRes.data;
                    renderTable(pageData.content);
                    totalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderPagination(pageData);
                } else {
                    console.error(apiRes.message);
                    document.getElementById('invoicesTableBody').innerHTML = '<td><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur de chargement<\/td><\/tr>';
                }
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
        }

        function renderTable(invoices) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('invoicesTableBody');
            if (!invoices || invoices.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center">Aucune facture<\/td><\/tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = invoices.map(inv => {
                const isPaid = inv.status === 'PAID';
                return `
                <tr>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(inv.referenceNumber) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(inv.factoryName)}</td>
                    <td>${formatMoney(inv.amountHt)}</td>
                    <td>${inv.tvaRate ? (inv.tvaRate * 100).toFixed(0) + '%' : '-'}</td>
                    <td>${formatMoney(inv.amountTtc)}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(inv.dueDate)}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${getStatusClass(inv.status)}">${getStatusLabel(inv.status)}</span></td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-info" onclick="viewPdfInline(${inv.id})" title="Voir PDF"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="downloadPdf(${inv.id})" title="TÃĐlÃĐcharger PDF"><i class="fas fa-download"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editInvoice(${inv.id})" title="Modifier" ${isPaid ? 'disabled' : ''}><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="markAsPaid(${inv.id})" title="Marquer payÃĐe" ${isPaid ? 'disabled' : ''}><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-warning" onclick="markAsOverdue(${inv.id})" title="Marquer en retard" ${isPaid ? 'disabled' : ''}><i class="fas fa-clock"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="cancelInvoice(${inv.id})" title="Annuler" ${isPaid ? 'disabled' : ''}><i class="fas fa-ban"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="deleteInvoice(${inv.id})" title="Supprimer" ${isPaid ? 'disabled' : ''}><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `}).join('');
        }

        function getStatusClass(status) {
            switch(status) {
                case 'DRAFT': return 'bg-secondary';
                case 'PENDING': return 'bg-warning';
                case 'PAID': return 'bg-success';
                case 'OVERDUE': return 'bg-danger';
                case 'CANCELLED': return 'bg-dark';
                case 'REFUNDED': return 'bg-info';
                default: return 'bg-secondary';
            }
        }

        function getStatusLabel(status) {
            const map = { DRAFT: 'Brouillon', PENDING: 'En attente', PAID: 'PayÃĐe', OVERDUE: 'En retard', CANCELLED: 'AnnulÃĐe', REFUNDED: 'RemboursÃĐe' };
            return map[status] || status;
        }

        function renderPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('paginationNav');
            if (totalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadInvoices(${currentPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < totalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadInvoices(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadInvoices(${currentPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function applyFilters() {
            currentFilters = {
                status: document.getElementById('statusFilter').value,
                factoryName: document.getElementById('factoryNameFilter').value,
                minAmountHt: document.getElementById('minAmountFilter').value,
                maxAmountHt: document.getElementById('maxAmountFilter').value,
                startDate: document.getElementById('startDateFilter').value,
                endDate: document.getElementById('endDateFilter').value
            };
            currentPage = 0;
            loadInvoices();
        }

        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('statusFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('factoryNameFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('minAmountFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('maxAmountFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('startDateFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('endDateFilter').value = '';
            currentFilters = {
                status: '', factoryName: '', minAmountHt: '', maxAmountHt: '', startDate: '', endDate: ''
            };
            currentPage = 0;
            loadInvoices();
        }

        // Affichage PDF inline
        async function viewPdfInline(id) {
            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/accountant/invoices/${id}/pdf`);
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Erreur chargement PDF');
                const blob = await response.blob();
                const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                window.open(blobUrl, '_blank');
                setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl), 5000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error(err);
                alert('Impossible d\'afficher le PDF');
            }
        }

        function downloadPdf(id) {
            window.open(`/accountant/invoices/${id}/pdf`, '_blank');
        }

        // CrÃĐation / ÃĐdition
        function openCreateModal() {
            document.getElementById('invoiceId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('factoryName').value = '';
            document.getElementById('factoryAddress').value = '';
            document.getElementById('factoryTaxId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('amountHt').value = '';
            document.getElementById('tvaRate').value = '19';
            document.getElementById('dueDate').value = '';
            document.getElementById('paymentTermsSelect').value = '';
            document.getElementById('notes').value = '';
            const ibanInput = document.getElementById('bankIban');
            ibanInput.value = 'DZ99 1234 5678 9012 3456 7890';
            ibanInput.setAttribute('readonly', true);
            const bicInput = document.getElementById('bankBic');
            bicInput.value = 'BICDZALG';
            bicInput.setAttribute('readonly', true);
            document.getElementById('status').value = 'DRAFT';
            document.querySelector('#invoiceModal .modal-title').innerHTML = 'Nouvelle facture';
            toggleCustomField(); // assure que le champ personnalisÃĐ est masquÃĐ
            showModal('invoiceModal');
        }

        async function editInvoice(id) {
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/invoice/${id}`);
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    const inv = apiRes.data;
                    if (inv.status === 'PAID') {
                        alert('Impossible de modifier une facture dÃĐjÃ  payÃĐe.');
                        return;
                    }
                    document.getElementById('invoiceId').value = inv.id;
                    document.getElementById('factoryName').value = inv.factoryName;
                    document.getElementById('factoryAddress').value = inv.factoryAddress || '';
                    document.getElementById('factoryTaxId').value = inv.factoryTaxId || '';
                    document.getElementById('amountHt').value = inv.amountHt;
                    const tvaPercent = Math.round(inv.tvaRate * 100);
                    document.getElementById('tvaRate').value = tvaPercent.toString();
                    document.getElementById('dueDate').value = inv.dueDate ? inv.dueDate.slice(0,10) : '';

                    // Conditions de paiement
                    const select = document.getElementById('paymentTermsSelect');
                    const customBlock = document.getElementById('customPaymentTermsBlock');
                    const customInput = document.getElementById('customPaymentTerms');
                    const predefinedOptions = Array.from(select.options).map(opt => opt.value);
                    if (inv.paymentTerms && predefinedOptions.includes(inv.paymentTerms)) {
                        select.value = inv.paymentTerms;
                        customBlock.style.display = 'none';
                        customInput.value = '';
                    } else if (inv.paymentTerms) {
                        select.value = 'CUSTOM';
                        customBlock.style.display = 'block';
                        customInput.value = inv.paymentTerms;
                    } else {
                        select.value = '';
                        customBlock.style.display = 'none';
                        customInput.value = '';
                    }

                    document.getElementById('notes').value = inv.notes || '';
                    document.getElementById('bankIban').value = inv.bankIban || 'DZ99 1234 5678 9012 3456 7890';
                    document.getElementById('bankBic').value = inv.bankBic || 'BICDZALG';
                    document.getElementById('status').value = inv.status;
                    document.querySelector('#invoiceModal .modal-title').innerHTML = 'Modifier facture';
                    showModal('invoiceModal');
                } else {
                    alert(apiRes.message);
                }
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); alert('Erreur chargement'); }
        }

        async function saveInvoice() {
            const id = document.getElementById('invoiceId').value;
            const tvaPercent = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tvaRate').value);
            const tvaDecimal = tvaPercent / 100;

            let paymentTerms = document.getElementById('paymentTermsSelect').value;
            if (paymentTerms === 'CUSTOM') {
                paymentTerms = document.getElementById('customPaymentTerms').value.trim();
                if (paymentTerms === '') {
                    alert('Veuillez saisir les conditions de paiement personnalisÃĐes.');
                    return;
                }
            } else if (paymentTerms === '') {
                paymentTerms = null;
            }

            const data = {
                factoryName: document.getElementById('factoryName').value,
                factoryAddress: document.getElementById('factoryAddress').value,
                factoryTaxId: document.getElementById('factoryTaxId').value,
                amountHt: parseFloat(document.getElementById('amountHt').value),
                tvaRate: tvaDecimal,
                dueDate: document.getElementById('dueDate').value || null,
                paymentTerms: paymentTerms,
                notes: document.getElementById('notes').value,
                bankIban: document.getElementById('bankIban').value,
                bankBic: document.getElementById('bankBic').value,
                status: document.getElementById('status').value
            };
            if (!data.factoryName || !data.amountHt || data.amountHt <= 0) {
                alert("Nom usine et montant HT obligatoires");
                return;
            }
            const url = id ? `/accountant/invoices/${id}` : '/accountant/invoices';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
            try {
                const res = await fetch(url, { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(data) });
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    hideModal('invoiceModal');
                    loadInvoices(currentPage);
                    loadStats();
                } else {
                    alert("Erreur: " + apiRes.message);
                }
            } catch(e) { alert(e); }
        }

        // Actions
        async function markAsPaid(id) {
            if (!confirm('Marquer cette facture comme payÃĐe ?')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/invoices/${id}/pay`, { method: 'PUT' });
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) { loadInvoices(currentPage); loadStats(); }
                else alert(apiRes.message);
            } catch(e) { alert(e); }
        }
        async function markAsOverdue(id) {
            if (!confirm('Marquer cette facture comme en retard ?')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/invoices/${id}/overdue`, { method: 'PUT' });
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) { loadInvoices(currentPage); loadStats(); }
                else alert(apiRes.message);
            } catch(e) { alert(e); }
        }
        async function cancelInvoice(id) {
            if (!confirm('Annuler cette facture ?')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/invoices/${id}/cancel`, { method: 'PUT' });
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) { loadInvoices(currentPage); loadStats(); }
                else alert(apiRes.message);
            } catch(e) { alert(e); }
        }
        async function deleteInvoice(id) {
            if (!confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement cette facture ?')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/invoices/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) { loadInvoices(currentPage); loadStats(); }
                else alert(apiRes.message);
            } catch(e) { alert(e); }
        }

        // Modals helpers
        function showModal(id) { new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show(); }
        function hideModal(id) { bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id)).hide(); }

        // Initialisation
        loadStats();
        loadInvoices();
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

<script>
    const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    const mainContent = document.getElementById('mainContent');
    const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('toggleSidebarBtn');

    function toggleSidebar() {
        if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
            sidebar.classList.toggle('mobile-open');
        } else {
            sidebar.classList.toggle('collapsed');
            mainContent.classList.toggle('expanded');
        }
    }

    toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleSidebar);

    if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-link').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => sidebar.classList.remove('mobile-open'));
        });
    }
</script>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

    <a th:href="@{/accountant/expenses}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> <span>DÃĐpenses</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/accountant/rewards}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-gift"></i> <span>RÃĐcompenses</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/accountant/reports}" class="sidebar-link active"><i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> <span>Rapports financiers</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/accountant/treasury}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-coins"></i> <span>TrÃĐsorerie & retraits</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/accountant/employees}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> <span>EmployÃĐs</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/accountant/collector-payment}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-hand-holding-usd"></i> <span>Paiement collecteurs</span></a>

        <span class="text-muted small"><i class="far fa-calendar-alt me-1"></i> <span id="currentDate"></span></span>
    </div>

    <!-- Section gÃĐnÃĐration de rapport -->
    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm mb-4">
        <div class="card-header bg-white py-2 fw-semibold">GÃĐnÃĐrer un rapport financier</div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <div class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                <div class="col-md-3">
                    <label class="form-label">Type de rapport</label>

                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> AperÃ§u PDF
                    </button>

                        <i class="fas fa-save"></i> GÃĐnÃĐrer & sauvegarder
                    </button>

            </div>

    <!-- Historique des rapports -->
    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
        <div class="card-header bg-white py-2 fw-semibold">Historique des rapports</div>
        <div class="card-body p-0">
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">

                    <tbody id="reportsTableBody">

        <i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i>

    <script>
        let currentPage = 0;
        let pageSize = 10;
        let totalPages = 0;

        // Initialisation des dates : par dÃĐfaut mois en cours
        function initDates() {
            const today = new Date();
            const firstDay = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth(), 1);
            const lastDay = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth() + 1, 0);
            document.getElementById('startDate').value = firstDay.toISOString().slice(0,10);
            document.getElementById('endDate').value = lastDay.toISOString().slice(0,10);
        }

        // Mise Ã  jour des champs de dates en fonction du type de rapport
        function updateDateFields() {
            const type = document.getElementById('reportType').value;
            const today = new Date();
            if (type === 'MONTHLY') {
                const firstDay = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth(), 1);
                const lastDay = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth() + 1, 0);
                document.getElementById('startDate').value = firstDay.toISOString().slice(0,10);
                document.getElementById('endDate').value = lastDay.toISOString().slice(0,10);
            } else if (type === 'YEARLY') {
                const firstDay = new Date(today.getFullYear(), 0, 1);
                const lastDay = new Date(today.getFullYear(), 11, 31);
                document.getElementById('startDate').value = firstDay.toISOString().slice(0,10);
                document.getElementById('endDate').value = lastDay.toISOString().slice(0,10);
            }
            // CUSTOM : on laisse les valeurs existantes
        }

        // Charger la liste des rapports (endpoint web)
        async function loadReports(page = 0) {
            currentPage = page;
            const url = `/accountant/reports-data?page=${page}&size=${pageSize}`;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(url);
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
                const pageData = await res.json();
                if (pageData.success) {
                    renderReportsTable(pageData.data.content);
                    totalPages = pageData.data.totalPages;
                    renderPagination(pageData.data);
                } else {
                    showError(pageData.message);
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                document.getElementById('reportsTableBody').innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur de chargement des rapports</td></tr>';
            }
        }

        function renderReportsTable(reports) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('reportsTableBody');
            if (!reports || reports.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted">Aucun rapport gÃĐnÃĐrÃĐ</td></tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = reports.map(r => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${r.id}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge badge-report">${getReportTypeLabel(r.reportType)}</span></td>
                    <td>${formatDate(r.periodStart)} â ${formatDate(r.periodEnd)}</td>
                    <td>${formatMoney(r.totalIncome)}</td>
                    <td>${formatMoney(r.totalExpense)}</td>
                    <td class="${r.netProfit >= 0 ? 'text-success' : 'text-danger'} fw-semibold">${formatMoney(r.netProfit)}</td>
                    <td>${formatDateTime(r.generatedAt)}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="downloadReport(${r.id})" title="TÃĐlÃĐcharger PDF"><i class="fas fa-download"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('reportsPagination');
            if (totalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadReports(${currentPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < totalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadReports(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadReports(${currentPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        // AperÃ§u PDF (sans sauvegarde)
        async function previewReport() {
            const startDate = document.getElementById('startDate').value;
            const endDate = document.getElementById('endDate').value;
            if (!startDate || !endDate) {
                alert('Veuillez sÃĐlectionner une pÃĐriode valide.');
                return;
            }
            try {
                const url = `/accountant/reports-preview/pdf?startDate=${startDate}&endDate=${endDate}`;
                const response = await fetch(url);
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Erreur gÃĐnÃĐration aperÃ§u');
                const blob = await response.blob();
                const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                window.open(blobUrl, '_blank');
                setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl), 5000);
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                alert('Impossible de gÃĐnÃĐrer l\'aperÃ§u du rapport.');
            }
        }

        // GÃĐnÃĐrer, sauvegarder et tÃĐlÃĐcharger le rapport
        async function generateAndSaveReport() {
            const reportType = document.getElementById('reportType').value;
            let startDate = document.getElementById('startDate').value;
            let endDate = document.getElementById('endDate').value;
            if (!startDate || !endDate) {
                alert('Veuillez sÃĐlectionner une pÃĐriode valide.');
                return;
            }
            try {
                const url = `/accountant/reports-generate/pdf?reportType=${reportType}&startDate=${startDate}&endDate=${endDate}`;
                const response = await fetch(url, { method: 'POST' });
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Erreur gÃĐnÃĐration/sauvegarde');
                const blob = await response.blob();
                const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                window.open(blobUrl, '_blank');
                setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl), 5000);
                // Recharger la liste des rapports aprÃĻs quelques secondes
                setTimeout(() => loadReports(currentPage), 2000);
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                alert('Erreur lors de la gÃĐnÃĐration du rapport.');
            }
        }

        // TÃĐlÃĐcharger un rapport existant
        async function downloadReport(reportId) {
            try {
                const url = `/accountant/reports-download/${reportId}/pdf`;
                const response = await fetch(url);
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Rapport introuvable');
                const blob = await response.blob();
                const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                window.open(blobUrl, '_blank');
                setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl), 5000);
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                alert('Impossible de tÃĐlÃĐcharger le rapport.');
            }
        }

        // Helpers
        function formatMoney(amount) {
            if (amount === undefined || amount === null) return '0,00 DA';
            return amount.toLocaleString('fr-DZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' DA';
        }
        function formatDate(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return '-';
            const d = new Date(dateStr);
            return d.toLocaleDateString('fr-FR');
        }
        function formatDateTime(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return '-';
            const d = new Date(dateStr);
            return d.toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        }
        function getReportTypeLabel(type) {
            const map = { 'DAILY': 'Journalier', 'WEEKLY': 'Hebdomadaire', 'MONTHLY': 'Mensuel', 'YEARLY': 'Annuel', 'CUSTOM': 'PersonnalisÃĐ' };
            return map[type] || type;
        }
        function showError(msg) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('reportsTableBody');
            tbody.innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-danger">${msg}</td></tr>`;
        }

        // Actualisation manuelle
        document.getElementById('refreshBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            loadReports(currentPage);
        });

        // Mise Ã  jour des dates au changement de type
        document.getElementById('reportType').addEventListener('change', updateDateFields);

        // Initialisation
        document.getElementById('currentDate').innerText = new Date().toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        initDates();
        updateDateFields();
        loadReports(0);
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

    <!-- MODAL CRÃATION / ÃDITION RÃCOMPENSE (inchangÃĐ) -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="rewardModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-primary text-white"><h5 class="modal-title">RÃĐcompense</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
                <div class="modal-body">
