                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-8 mb-3"><label>Nom *</label><input type="text" id="rewardName" class="form-control" required></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4 mb-3"><label>Actif</label><select id="rewardIsActive" class="form-select"><option value="true">Oui</option><option value="false">Non</option></select></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Description</label><textarea id="rewardDescription" rows="2" class="form-control"></textarea></div>
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-4 mb-3"><label>Points requis *</label><input type="number" id="rewardPointsCost" class="form-control" required min="1"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4 mb-3"><label>Valeur (DA)</label><input type="number" step="0.001" id="rewardMonetaryValue" class="form-control"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4 mb-3"><label>CatÃĐgorie *</label><select id="rewardCategory" class="form-select" required><option value="RECHARGE_PHONE">Recharge tÃĐlÃĐphone</option><option value="SHOPPING">Shopping</option><option value="TRANSPORT">Transport</option><option value="DONATION">Don</option><option value="CASH_WITHDRAWAL">Retrait cash</option><option value="DIGITAL_CODE">Code digital</option><option value="PHYSICAL_GIFT">Cadeau physique</option><option value="OTHER">Autre</option></select></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-4 mb-3"><label>Stock (-1 = illimitÃĐ)</label><input type="number" id="rewardStock" class="form-control" value="-1"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4 mb-3"><label>Partenaire</label><input type="text" id="rewardPartnerName" class="form-control"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4 mb-3"><label>ValiditÃĐ (jours)</label><input type="number" id="rewardValidityDays" class="form-control"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6 mb-3"><label>URL image</label><input type="text" id="rewardImageUrl" class="form-control"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-6 mb-3"><label>Instructions livraison</label><textarea id="rewardDeliveryInstructions" rows="2" class="form-control"></textarea></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer"><button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveReward()">Enregistrer</button></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL REJET (avec note) -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="rejectModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-danger text-white"><h5 class="modal-title">Rejeter la demande</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="rejectRedemptionId">
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Motif *</label><textarea id="rejectNote" rows="3" class="form-control" required></textarea></div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer"><button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" onclick="confirmReject()">Rejeter</button></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL LIVRAISON (avec note optionnelle) -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="deliverModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">Marquer comme livrÃĐe</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="deliverRedemptionId">
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">Note (optionnelle)</label>
                        <textarea id="deliverNote" rows="3" class="form-control" placeholder="Commentaire sur la livraison..."></textarea>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-info" onclick="confirmDeliver()">Confirmer la livraison</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let rewardsPage = 0, rewardsTotalPages = 0, filters = { category: '', isActive: '' };
        let historyPage = 0, historyTotalPages = 0;

        function formatMoney(amount) { return amount?.toLocaleString('fr-DZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' DA' ?? '0 DA'; }
        function formatDate(d) { return d ? new Date(d).toLocaleString('fr-FR') : '-'; }
        function escapeHtml(s) { return s ? s.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;'}[m])) : ''; }
        function getStatusBadge(status) {
            switch(status) {
                case 'PENDING': return '<span class="badge badge-pending">En attente</span>';
                case 'APPROVED': return '<span class="badge badge-approved">ApprouvÃĐe</span>';
                case 'REJECTED': return '<span class="badge badge-rejected">RejetÃĐe</span>';
                case 'DELIVERED': return '<span class="badge badge-delivered">LivrÃĐe</span>';
                default: return '<span class="badge bg-secondary">'+status+'</span>';
            }
        }

        // ========== STATISTIQUES ==========
        async function loadStats() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/rewards-data');
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    const rewards = apiRes.data;
                    const total = rewards.length, active = rewards.filter(r => r.isActive).length;
                    document.getElementById('statsCards').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="col-md-4"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>Total</h6><h2>${total}</h2></div></div></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>Actives</h6><h2>${active}</h2></div></div></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4"><div class="stat-card"><div class="card-body"><h6>Inactives</h6><h2>${total - active}</h2></div></div></div>
                    `;
                }
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
        }

        // ========== CATALOGUE ==========
        async function loadRewards(page = 0) {
            rewardsPage = page;
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/rewards-data');
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    let all = apiRes.data;
                    let filtered = all.filter(r => {
                        if (filters.category && r.category !== filters.category) return false;
                        if (filters.isActive !== '') return r.isActive === (filters.isActive === 'true');
                        return true;
                    });
                    rewardsTotalPages = Math.ceil(filtered.length / 10);
                    const paginated = filtered.slice(page * 10, (page + 1) * 10);
                    const tbody = document.getElementById('rewardsTableBody');
                    if (!paginated.length) { tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center">Aucune rÃĐcompense<\/td><\/tr>'; return; }
                    tbody.innerHTML = paginated.map(r => `
                        <tr>
                            <td>${r.id}</td>
                            <td><strong>${escapeHtml(r.name)}</strong><br><small>${escapeHtml(r.description?.substring(0,50))}</small></td>
                            <td><span class="badge bg-secondary">${r.category || '-'}</span></td>
                            <td>${r.pointsCost}</td>
                            <td>${formatMoney(r.monetaryValue)}</td>
                            <td>${r.stock === -1 ? 'â' : r.stock}</td>
                            <td><span class="badge ${r.isActive ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${r.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}</span></td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editReward(${r.id})"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-warning" onclick="toggleReward(${r.id})"><i class="fas fa-power-off"></i></button>
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteReward(${r.id})"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                          `).join('');
                    renderRewardsPagination();
                }
            } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
        }

        function renderRewardsPagination() {
            const nav = document.getElementById('rewardsPagination');
            if (rewardsTotalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${rewardsPage === 0 ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadRewards(${rewardsPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < rewardsTotalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === rewardsPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadRewards(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${rewardsPage === rewardsTotalPages-1 ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadRewards(${rewardsPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function applyFilters() {
            filters.category = document.getElementById('categoryFilter').value;
            filters.isActive = document.getElementById('activeFilter').value;
            rewardsPage = 0;
            loadRewards();
        }
        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('categoryFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('activeFilter').value = '';
            filters = { category: '', isActive: '' };
            rewardsPage = 0;
            loadRewards();
        }

        function openCreateRewardModal() {
            document.getElementById('rewardId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('rewardName').value = '';
            document.getElementById('rewardDescription').value = '';
            document.getElementById('rewardPointsCost').value = '';
            document.getElementById('rewardMonetaryValue').value = '';
            document.getElementById('rewardCategory').value = 'OTHER';
            document.getElementById('rewardStock').value = '-1';
            document.getElementById('rewardIsActive').value = 'true';
            document.getElementById('rewardPartnerName').value = '';
            document.getElementById('rewardValidityDays').value = '';
            document.getElementById('rewardImageUrl').value = '';
            document.getElementById('rewardDeliveryInstructions').value = '';
            document.querySelector('#rewardModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Nouvelle rÃĐcompense';
            showModal('rewardModal');
        }

        async function editReward(id) {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/rewards-data');
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                const reward = apiRes.data.find(r => r.id === id);
                if (!reward) throw new Error('Introuvable');
                document.getElementById('rewardId').value = reward.id;
                document.getElementById('rewardName').value = reward.name;
                document.getElementById('rewardDescription').value = reward.description || '';
                document.getElementById('rewardPointsCost').value = reward.pointsCost;
                document.getElementById('rewardMonetaryValue').value = reward.monetaryValue || '';
                document.getElementById('rewardCategory').value = reward.category || 'OTHER';
                document.getElementById('rewardStock').value = reward.stock;
                document.getElementById('rewardIsActive').value = reward.isActive;
                document.getElementById('rewardPartnerName').value = reward.partnerName || '';
                document.getElementById('rewardValidityDays').value = reward.validityDays || '';
                document.getElementById('rewardImageUrl').value = reward.imageUrl || '';
                document.getElementById('rewardDeliveryInstructions').value = reward.deliveryInstructions || '';
                document.querySelector('#rewardModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Modifier la rÃĐcompense';
                showModal('rewardModal');
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur chargement'); }
        }

        async function saveReward() {
            const id = document.getElementById('rewardId').value;
            const payload = {
                name: document.getElementById('rewardName').value,
                description: document.getElementById('rewardDescription').value,
                pointsCost: parseInt(document.getElementById('rewardPointsCost').value),
                monetaryValue: parseFloat(document.getElementById('rewardMonetaryValue').value) || null,
                category: document.getElementById('rewardCategory').value,
                imageUrl: document.getElementById('rewardImageUrl').value || null,
                stock: parseInt(document.getElementById('rewardStock').value),
                isActive: document.getElementById('rewardIsActive').value === 'true',
                partnerName: document.getElementById('rewardPartnerName').value || null,
                validityDays: parseInt(document.getElementById('rewardValidityDays').value) || null,
                deliveryInstructions: document.getElementById('rewardDeliveryInstructions').value || null
            };
            if (!payload.name || !payload.pointsCost) { alert('Nom et points requis'); return; }
            const url = id ? `/accountant/rewards-update/${id}` : '/accountant/rewards-create';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
            try {
                const res = await fetch(url, { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    hideModal('rewardModal');
                    loadRewards(rewardsPage);
                    loadStats();
                } else alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Ãchec'));
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        async function toggleReward(id) {
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/rewards-toggle/${id}`, { method: 'PUT' });
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) { loadRewards(rewardsPage); loadStats(); }
                else alert('Erreur');
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        async function deleteReward(id) {
            if (!confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement ?')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/rewards-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) { loadRewards(rewardsPage); loadStats(); }
                else alert('Erreur');
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        // ========== DEMANDES EN ATTENTE (PENDING) ==========
        async function loadPendingRedemptions() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('redemptionsTableBody');
            tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center py-4"><div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary me-2"></div> Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>';
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/rewards-pending');
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success && apiRes.data) {
                    const redemptions = apiRes.data;
                    if (!redemptions.length) {
                        tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-muted">Aucune demande en attente<\/td><\/tr>';
                        return;
                    }
                    tbody.innerHTML = redemptions.map(r => `
                        <tr>
                            <td>${r.id}</td>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(r.accountEmail)}</div>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(r.rewardName)}<br><small>${r.rewardCategory}</small></div>
                            <td>${r.pointsSpent}</div>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(r.additionalInfo) || '-'}</div>
                            <td>${formatDate(r.createdAt)}</div>
                            <td>
                                <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="approveRedemption(${r.id})"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></button>
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="openRejectModal(${r.id})"><i class="fas fa-times-circle"></i></button>
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-info" onclick="openDeliverModal(${r.id})"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i></button>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                          `).join('');
                } else {
                    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur de chargement<\/td><\/tr>';
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur rÃĐseau<\/td><\/tr>';
            }
        }

        // ========== DEMANDES APPROUVÃES (APPROVED) ==========
        async function loadApprovedRedemptions() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('approvedTableBody');
            tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center py-4"><div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary me-2"></div> Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>';
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/rewards-history?page=0&size=1000');
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    const all = apiRes.data.content;
                    const approved = all.filter(r => r.status === 'APPROVED');
                    if (!approved.length) {
                        tbody.innerHTML = '<td><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted">Aucune demande approuvÃĐe en attente de livraison<\/td><\/tr>';
                        return;
                    }
                    tbody.innerHTML = approved.map(r => `
                        <tr>
                            <td>${r.id}</div>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(r.accountEmail)}</div>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(r.rewardName)}<br><small>${r.rewardCategory}</small></div>
                            <td>${r.pointsSpent}</div>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(r.additionalInfo) || '-'}</div>
                            <td>${formatDate(r.createdAt)}</div>
                            <td>${formatDate(r.updatedAt)}</div>
                            <td>
                                <button class="btn btn-outline-info btn-sm" onclick="openDeliverModal(${r.id})"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Livrer</button>
                             </div>
                         </td>
                    `).join('');
                } else {
                    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur de chargement<\/td><\/tr>';
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur rÃĐseau<\/td><\/tr>';
            }
        }

        async function approveRedemption(id) {
            if (!confirm('Approuver cette demande ? Les points seront dÃĐfinitivement dÃĐduits.')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/rewards-approve/${id}`, { method: 'PUT' });
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    loadPendingRedemptions();
                    loadApprovedRedemptions();
                    loadStats();
                } else alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Ãchec'));
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        // Ouvre la modale de livraison avec note
        function openDeliverModal(id) {
            document.getElementById('deliverRedemptionId').value = id;
            document.getElementById('deliverNote').value = '';
            showModal('deliverModal');
        }

        async function confirmDeliver() {
            const id = document.getElementById('deliverRedemptionId').value;
            const note = document.getElementById('deliverNote').value.trim();
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/${id}/deliver`, {   // â URL corrigÃĐe
                    method: 'PUT',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ note: note || null })
                });
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    hideModal('deliverModal');
                    loadPendingRedemptions();
                    loadApprovedRedemptions();
                    loadStats();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Ãchec'));
                }
            } catch(e) {
                alert('Erreur rÃĐseau');
            }
        }

        function openRejectModal(id) {
            document.getElementById('rejectRedemptionId').value = id;
            document.getElementById('rejectNote').value = '';
            showModal('rejectModal');
        }
        async function confirmReject() {
            const id = document.getElementById('rejectRedemptionId').value;
            const note = document.getElementById('rejectNote').value;
            if (!note) { alert('Motif requis'); return; }
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/rewards-reject/${id}`, {
                    method: 'PUT',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ note: note })
                });
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    hideModal('rejectModal');
                    loadPendingRedemptions();
                    loadApprovedRedemptions();
                    loadStats();
                } else alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Ãchec'));
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        // ========== HISTORIQUE ==========
        async function loadRedemptionHistory(page = 0) {
            historyPage = page;
            const tbody = document.getElementById('historyTableBody');
            tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center py-4"><div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary me-2"></div> Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>';
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/rewards-history?page=${page}&size=10`);
                const apiRes = await res.json();
                if (apiRes.success) {
                    const pageData = apiRes.data;
                    const redemptions = pageData.content;
                    historyTotalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    if (!redemptions.length) {
                        tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center text-muted">Aucun historique<\/td><\/tr>';
                    } else {
                        tbody.innerHTML = redemptions.map(r => `
                            <tr>
                                <td>${r.id}</div>
                                <td>${escapeHtml(r.accountEmail)}</div>
                                <td>${escapeHtml(r.rewardName)}<br><small>${r.rewardCategory}</small></div>
                                <td>${r.pointsSpent}</div>
                                <td>${getStatusBadge(r.status)}</div>
                                <td>${r.redemptionCode || '-'}</div>
                                <td>${escapeHtml(r.reviewNote) || '-'}</div>
                                <td>${formatDate(r.createdAt)}</div>
                                <td>${r.status !== 'PENDING' ? formatDate(r.updatedAt) : '-'}</div>
                              </div>
                        `).join('');
                    }
                    renderHistoryPagination();
                } else {
                    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur de chargement<\/td><\/tr>';
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur rÃĐseau<\/td><\/tr>';
            }
        }

        function renderHistoryPagination() {
            const nav = document.getElementById('historyPagination');
            if (historyTotalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${historyPage === 0 ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadRedemptionHistory(${historyPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < historyTotalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === historyPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadRedemptionHistory(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${historyPage === historyTotalPages-1 ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadRedemptionHistory(${historyPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        // ========== MODALS HELPERS ==========
        function showModal(id) { new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show(); }
        function hideModal(id) { bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id)).hide(); }

        // Gestion des onglets
        document.getElementById('rewardsTab').addEventListener('shown.bs.tab', e => {
            const target = e.target.getAttribute('data-bs-target');
            if (target === '#redemptions') loadPendingRedemptions();
            if (target === '#approved') loadApprovedRedemptions();
            if (target === '#history') loadRedemptionHistory(0);
        });

        // Initialisation
        loadStats();
        loadRewards();
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

                        <th>Montant (DA)</th>

                        <th>IBAN</th>
                        <th>Banque</th>
                        <th>Statut</th>
                        <th>Description</th>
                        <th>Date</th>
                    </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="historyTableBody">
                    <tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="9">Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-footer bg-white">
            <nav id="historyPagination"></nav>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Alerte factures en retard -->
    <div class="alert alert-warning d-none" id="overdueAlert" role="alert">
        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>
        <span id="overdueMessage"></span>
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-warning ms-3" onclick="triggerOverdueCheck()">VÃĐrifier maintenant</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Modal de rejet -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="rejectModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-danger text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">Rejeter la demande</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="rejectId">
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">Motif du rejet *</label>
                        <textarea id="rejectReason" rows="3" class="form-control" required></textarea>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" onclick="confirmReject()">Rejeter</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <button class="btn btn-light border refresh-btn rounded-circle position-fixed bottom-0 end-0 m-3 shadow-sm" id="refreshBtn" title="Actualiser">
        <i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i>
    </button>

    <script>
        let historyPage = 0;
        let historyTotalPages = 0;
        const pageSize = 10;

        // ==================== CHARGEMENT DES STATISTIQUES ====================
        async function loadTreasurySummary() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/treasury-summary');
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    document.getElementById('totalPoints').innerText = data.data.totalPointsInCirculation?.toLocaleString() || '0';
                    document.getElementById('totalLiability').innerText = formatMoney(data.data.totalLiabilityDA);
                }
            } catch(e) { console.warn(e); }
        }

        async function loadExpectedRevenue() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/expected-revenue');
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
                const amount = await res.json();
                document.getElementById('expectedRevenue').innerText = formatMoney(amount);
            } catch(e) { console.warn(e); }
        }

        async function loadOverdueInvoices() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/urgent-overdue');
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
                const invoices = await res.json();
                const alertDiv = document.getElementById('overdueAlert');
                if (invoices && invoices.length > 0) {
                    document.getElementById('overdueMessage').innerHTML = `${invoices.length} facture(s) en retard de paiement.`;
                    alertDiv.classList.remove('d-none');
                } else {
                    alertDiv.classList.add('d-none');
                }
            } catch(e) { console.warn(e); }
        }

        // ==================== DEMANDES EN ATTENTE (Transactions PENDING) ====================
        async function loadPendingWithdrawals() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('pendingTableBody');
            tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="9"><div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary me-2"></div> Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>';
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/withdrawals/pending');
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success && data.data) {
                    const transactions = data.data;
                    if (transactions.length === 0) {
                        tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="9">Aucune demande en attente<\/td><\/tr>';
                        return;
                    }
                    tbody.innerHTML = transactions.map(t => `
                        <tr>
                            <td>${t.id}</td>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(t.accountEmail) || 'Client inconnu'}</td>
                            <td>${formatMoney(t.amount)}</div>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(t.accountHolderName) || '-'}</div>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(t.iban) || '-'}</div>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(t.bankName) || '-'}</div>
                            <td>${t.method || 'BANK_TRANSFER'}</div>
                            <td>${formatDate(t.createdAt)}</div>
                            <td>
                                <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="approveWithdrawal(${t.id})" title="Approuver"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></button>
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="openRejectModal(${t.id})" title="Rejeter"><i class="fas fa-times-circle"></i></button>
                                </div>
                             </div>
                        </tr>
                    `).join('');
                } else {
                    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="9">Erreur de chargement<\/td><\/tr>';
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="9">Erreur rÃĐseau<\/td><\/tr>';
            }
        }

        // ==================== HISTORIQUE DES RETRAITS ====================
        async function loadHistory(page = 0) {
            historyPage = page;
            const tbody = document.getElementById('historyTableBody');
            tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="9"><div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary me-2"></div> Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>';
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/withdrawals/history?page=${page}&size=${pageSize}`);
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
                const pageData = await res.json();
                if (pageData.success) {
                    const content = pageData.data.content;
                    historyTotalPages = pageData.data.totalPages;
                    if (!content || content.length === 0) {
                        tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="9">Aucun historique<\/td><\/tr>';
                    } else {
                        tbody.innerHTML = content.map(t => `
                            <tr>
                                <td>${t.id}</div>
                                <td>${escapeHtml(t.accountEmail) || 'Client inconnu'}</div>
                                <td>${formatMoney(t.amount)}</div>
                                <td>${escapeHtml(t.accountHolderName) || '-'}</div>
                                <td>${escapeHtml(t.iban) || '-'}</div>
                                <td>${escapeHtml(t.bankName) || '-'}</div>
                                <td><span class="status-badge ${getStatusClass(t.status)}">${getStatusLabel(t.status)}</span></div>
                                <td>${escapeHtml(t.description) || '-'}</div>
                                <td>${formatDate(t.createdAt)}</div>
                            </tr>
                        `).join('');
                    }
                    renderHistoryPagination(pageData.data);
                } else {
                    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="9">Erreur de chargement<\/td><\/tr>';
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr class="empty-row"><td colspan="9">Erreur rÃĐseau<\/td><\/tr>';
            }
        }

        function renderHistoryPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('historyPagination');
            if (historyTotalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadHistory(${historyPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < historyTotalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === historyPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadHistory(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadHistory(${historyPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        // ==================== ACTIONS APPROUVER / REJETER ====================
        async function approveWithdrawal(id) {
            if (!confirm('Approuver ce retrait ? Les points et l\'argent seront dÃĐduits du wallet.')) return;
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/withdrawals/${id}/approve`, { method: 'POST' });
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    alert('Retrait approuvÃĐ avec succÃĻs');
                    refreshAll();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur : ' + (data.message || 'Ãchec'));
                }
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        function openRejectModal(id) {
            document.getElementById('rejectId').value = id;
            document.getElementById('rejectReason').value = '';
            new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('rejectModal')).show();
        }

        async function confirmReject() {
            const id = document.getElementById('rejectId').value;
            const reason = document.getElementById('rejectReason').value.trim();
            if (!reason) { alert('Motif requis'); return; }
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/accountant/withdrawals/${id}/reject`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ reason: reason })
                });
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('rejectModal')).hide();
                    alert('Retrait rejetÃĐ');
                    refreshAll();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur : ' + (data.message || 'Ãchec'));
                }
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'); }
        }

        async function triggerOverdueCheck() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/accountant/trigger-check', { method: 'POST' });
                const text = await res.text();
                alert(text);
                loadOverdueInvoices();
            } catch(e) { alert('Erreur'); }
        }

        function refreshAll() {
            loadTreasurySummary();
            loadExpectedRevenue();
            loadOverdueInvoices();
            loadPendingWithdrawals();
            loadHistory(historyPage);
        }

        // ==================== UTILITAIRES ====================
        function formatMoney(amount) {
            if (amount === undefined || amount === null) return '0,00 DA';
            const num = typeof amount === 'number' ? amount : parseFloat(amount);
            return num.toLocaleString('fr-DZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' DA';
        }

        function formatDate(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return '-';
            const d = new Date(dateStr);
            return d.toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        }

        function escapeHtml(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;' }[m]));
        }

        function getStatusClass(status) {
            switch(status) {
                case 'PENDING': return 'status-pending';
                case 'COMPLETED': return 'status-completed';
                case 'CANCELLED': return 'status-failed';
                default: return 'status-pending';
            }
        }

        function getStatusLabel(status) {
            switch(status) {
                case 'PENDING': return 'En attente';
                case 'COMPLETED': return 'ApprouvÃĐ';
                case 'CANCELLED': return 'RejetÃĐ';
                default: return status;
            }
        }

        // ==================== INITIALISATION ====================
        document.getElementById('currentDate').innerText = new Date().toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        refreshAll();
        document.getElementById('refreshBtn').addEventListener('click', refreshAll);
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

        .info { background-color: #0dcaf0; color: #000; }
    </style>

<body th:replace="~{/admin/layout}">

<div th:fragment="sidebarLinks">
    <a th:href="@{/admin/dashboard}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i> Dashboard</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/users}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Utilisateurs</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/collectors}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Collecteurs</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/materials}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-recycle"></i> MatÃĐriaux</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/challenges}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i> DÃĐfis</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/supervision}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Supervision</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/notifications}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-bell"></i> Notifications</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/anomalies}" class="sidebar-link active"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> Anomalies</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/support}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-headset"></i> Support</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/machines}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-microchip"></i> <span>Machines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/centers}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fa fa-industry"></i> <span>Usines</span></a>

<div th:fragment="content">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h1 class="h3 fw-bold">DÃĐtection d'anomalies</h1>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-light"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Total anomalies</h6><h3 id="totalAnomalies">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card critical"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Critiques</h6><h3 id="criticalAnomalies">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card warning"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Avertissements</h6><h3 id="warningAnomalies">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card info"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Informations</h6><h3 id="infoAnomalies">-</h3></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <div class="card shadow-sm">
        <div class="card-header">Filtre par sÃĐvÃĐritÃĐ</div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <select id="severityFilter" class="form-select w-25 d-inline-block">
                <option value="">Toutes</option>
                <option value="CRITICAL">Critiques</option>
                <option value="WARNING">Avertissements</option>
                <option value="INFO">Informations</option>
            </select>
            <button class="btn btn-primary ms-2" onclick="loadAnomalies()">Filtrer</button>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary ms-2" onclick="loadSensitiveActions()">Voir actions sensibles</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card shadow-sm mt-3">
        <div class="card-body p-0">
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-hover">
                    <thead><tr><th>Type</th><th>SÃĐvÃĐritÃĐ</th><th>Description</th><th>EntitÃĐ liÃĐe</th><th>DÃĐtectÃĐ le</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody id="anomaliesTableBody"></tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-footer"><nav id="anomaliesPagination"></nav></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let anomaliesPage=0, anomaliesTotalPages=0;

        function loadStats() {
            fetch('/admin/anomalies-stats').then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{
                document.getElementById('totalAnomalies').innerText=data.totalAnomalies||0;
                document.getElementById('criticalAnomalies').innerText=data.criticalAnomalies||0;
                document.getElementById('warningAnomalies').innerText=data.warningAnomalies||0;
                document.getElementById('infoAnomalies').innerText=data.infoAnomalies||0;
            });
        }

        function loadAnomalies() {
            let severity=document.getElementById('severityFilter').value;
            let url=`/admin/anomalies-list?page=${anomaliesPage}&size=20`;
            if(severity) url+=`&severity=${severity}`;
            fetch(url).then(res=>res.json()).then(pageData=>{
                renderAnomaliesTable(pageData.content);
                anomaliesTotalPages=pageData.totalPages;
                renderAnomaliesPagination(pageData);
            });
        }

        function renderAnomaliesTable(list){
            let tbody=document.getElementById('anomaliesTableBody');
            if(!list||!list.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="5">Aucune anomalie</td></td>';return;}
            tbody.innerHTML=list.map(a=>`<tr><td>${a.anomalyType}</td><td><span class="badge ${a.severity==='CRITICAL'?'bg-danger':(a.severity==='WARNING'?'bg-warning text-dark':'bg-info')}">${a.severity}</span></td><td>${escapeHtml(a.description)}</td><td>${a.relatedEntityType} #${a.relatedEntityId}</td><td>${formatDate(a.detectedAt)}</td></tr>`).join('');
        }

        function renderAnomaliesPagination(pageData){
            let nav=document.getElementById('anomaliesPagination');
            if(anomaliesTotalPages<=1){nav.innerHTML='';return;}
            let html='<ul class="pagination">';
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pageData.first?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeAnomaliesPage(${anomaliesPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for(let i=0;i<anomaliesTotalPages;i++)html+=`<li class="page-item ${i===anomaliesPage?'active':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeAnomaliesPage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pageData.last?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeAnomaliesPage(${anomaliesPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML=html;
        }

        function changeAnomaliesPage(p){anomaliesPage=p;loadAnomalies();}

        function loadSensitiveActions(){
            fetch('/admin/sensitive-actions').then(res=>res.json()).then(actions=>{
                let tbody=document.getElementById('anomaliesTableBody');
                if(!actions||!actions.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="5">Aucune action sensible</td></td>';return;}
                tbody.innerHTML=actions.map(a=>`<tr><td>${a.anomalyType}</td><td><span class="badge ${a.severity==='CRITICAL'?'bg-danger':(a.severity==='WARNING'?'bg-warning text-dark':'bg-info')}">${a.severity}</span></td><td>${escapeHtml(a.description)}</td><td>${a.relatedEntityType} #${a.relatedEntityId}</td><td>${formatDate(a.detectedAt)}</td></tr>`).join('');
                document.getElementById('anomaliesPagination').innerHTML='';
            });
        }

        function escapeHtml(s){if(!s)return '';return s.replace(/[&<>]/g,m=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;'}[m]));}
        function formatDate(d){if(!d)return '-';return new Date(d).toLocaleString('fr-FR');}
        loadStats();loadAnomalies();
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

<!--    &lt;!&ndash; Explication des seuils &ndash;&gt;-->
<!--    <div class="alert alert-info small">-->
<!--        <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>-->
<!--        <strong>Affichage :</strong> Tout compte avec âĨ 1 annulation sur 7 jours apparaÃŪt dans ce tableau.<br>-->
<!--        <strong>Alerte (notification admin) :</strong> Client âĨ 6 / Collecteur âĨ 3 annulations â anomalie WARNING.<br>-->
<!--        <strong>Blocage automatique :</strong> Client âĨ 6 / Collecteur âĨ 10 annulations â compte dÃĐsactivÃĐ.-->
<!--    </div>-->

<!--    &lt;!&ndash; Liste des comptes Ã  risque &ndash;&gt;-->
<!--    <div class="card shadow-sm mb-4">-->
<!--        <div class="card-header bg-white fw-semibold">-->
<!--            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i> Comptes Ã  risque (dÃĐtectÃĐs)-->
<!--        </div>-->
<!--        <div class="card-body p-0">-->
<!--            <div class="table-responsive">-->
<!--                <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">-->
<!--                    <thead class="table-light">-->
<!--                    <tr>-->
<!--                        <th>ID</th><th>Type</th><th>Nom / Email</th><th>Annulations (7j)</th><th>Statut compte</th><th>Actions</th>-->
<!--                    </tr>-->
<!--                    </thead>-->
<!--                    <tbody id="riskyAccountsBody">-->
<!--                    <tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center py-4">Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>-->
<!--                    </tbody>-->
<!--                </table>-->
<!--            </div>-->

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.0.0-beta3/css/all.min.css">
    <style>
        body { background: #f0f2f5; font-size: 0.85rem; }
        .card { border-radius: 1rem; border: none; }
        .card-header { background: white; border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef; }
        .badge-warning { background-color: #ffc107; color: #000; }
        .badge-critical { background-color: #dc3545; }
        .table th, .table td { vertical-align: middle; }
        .cancellation-detail { max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto; }
        .btn-sm { margin: 0 2px; }
        .filter-card { background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 16px; padding: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
    </style>

    <a th:href="@{/admin/dashboard}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i> <span>Dashboard</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/users}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> <span>Utilisateurs</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/collectors}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> <span>Collecteurs</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/materials}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-recycle"></i> <span>MatÃĐriaux</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/challenges}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i> <span>DÃĐfis</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/supervision}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> <span>Supervision</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/notifications}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-bell"></i> <span>Notifications</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/anomalies}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> <span>Anomalies</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/support}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-headset"></i> <span>Support</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/machines}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-microchip"></i> <span>Machines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/centers}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fa fa-industry"></i> <span>Usines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/cancellations}" class="sidebar-link active"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i> <span>Annulations abusives</span></a>

    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
        <h5 class="fw-bold mb-0">Surveillance des annulations excessives</h5>
        <button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" onclick="refreshData()"><i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i> Actualiser</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Explication des seuils -->
    <div class="alert alert-info small">
        <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
        <strong>Affichage :</strong> Tout compte avec âĨ 1 annulation sur 7 jours apparaÃŪt dans ce tableau.<br>
        <strong>Alerte (notification admin) :</strong> Client âĨ 6 / Collecteur âĨ 3 annulations â anomalie WARNING.<br>
        <strong>Blocage automatique :</strong> Client âĨ 10 / Collecteur âĨ 6 annulations â compte dÃĐsactivÃĐ.
    </div>

    <!-- Filtres -->
    <div class="card shadow-sm mb-3">
        <div class="card-body">
            <div class="row g-2 align-items-end">
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <label class="form-label">Recherche (nom / email)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="filterKeyword" class="form-control form-control-sm" placeholder="Nom ou email">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-3">
                    <label class="form-label">Type</label>
                    <select id="filterRole" class="form-select form-select-sm">
                        <option value="">Tous</option>
                        <option value="CLIENT">Client</option>
                        <option value="COLLECTOR">Collecteur</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-3">
                    <label class="form-label">Statut compte</label>
                    <select id="filterStatus" class="form-select form-select-sm">
                        <option value="">Tous</option>
                        <option value="ACTIVE">Actif</option>
                        <option value="INACTIVE">Inactif</option>
                        <option value="DELETED">SupprimÃĐ</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm w-100" onclick="applyFilters()">Filtrer</button>
                    <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm w-100 mt-1" onclick="resetFilters()">RÃĐinitialiser</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Liste des comptes Ã  risque -->
    <div class="card shadow-sm mb-4">
        <div class="card-header bg-white fw-semibold">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i> Comptes Ã  risque (dÃĐtectÃĐs)
        </div>
        <div class="card-body p-0">
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                    <thead class="table-light">

    <!-- Modale dÃĐtail annulations -->

        <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-secondary text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">DÃĐtail des annulations</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body" id="detailModalBody">
                    <div class="text-center"><div class="spinner-border"></div> Chargement...</div>
                </div>

                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Fermer</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-warning" id="reactivateBtn" style="display:none" onclick="reactivateAccount()">RÃĐactiver le compte</button>
                </div>

    <script>
        let currentAccountId = null;
        let currentFilters = { keyword: '', roleType: '', status: '' };

        function applyFilters() {
            currentFilters.keyword = document.getElementById('filterKeyword').value;
            currentFilters.roleType = document.getElementById('filterRole').value;
            currentFilters.status = document.getElementById('filterStatus').value;
            loadRiskyAccounts();
        }

        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('filterKeyword').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterRole').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterStatus').value = '';
            currentFilters = { keyword: '', roleType: '', status: '' };
            loadRiskyAccounts();
        }

        function refreshData() {
            applyFilters();
        }

        async function loadRiskyAccounts() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('riskyAccountsBody');
            tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center"><div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></div> Chargement...<\/td><\/tr>';
            try {
                let url = '/admin/api/risky-accounts?';
                if (currentFilters.keyword) url += `keyword=${encodeURIComponent(currentFilters.keyword)}&`;
                if (currentFilters.roleType) url += `roleType=${currentFilters.roleType}&`;
                if (currentFilters.status) url += `status=${currentFilters.status}&`;
                const response = await fetch(url);
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Erreur rÃĐseau');
                const data = await response.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    const accounts = data.data;
                    if (accounts.length === 0) {
                        tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted">Aucun compte correspondant.<\/td><\/tr>';
                        return;
                    }
                    tbody.innerHTML = accounts.map(acc => `
                        <tr>
                            <td>${acc.id}</td>
                            <td><span class="badge ${acc.roleType === 'CLIENT' ? 'bg-primary' : 'bg-warning text-dark'}">${acc.roleType === 'CLIENT' ? 'Client' : 'Collecteur'}</span></td>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(acc.fullName)}<br><small>${escapeHtml(acc.email)}</small></td>
                            <td><span class="badge ${acc.cancelCount7d >= (acc.roleType === 'CLIENT' ? 10 : 6) ? 'bg-danger' : 'bg-warning'}">${acc.cancelCount7d}</span></td>
                            <td>${acc.status === 'ACTIVE' ? '<span class="badge bg-success">Actif</span>' : (acc.status === 'INACTIVE' ? '<span class="badge bg-secondary">Inactif</span>' : '<span class="badge bg-danger">SupprimÃĐ</span>')}</td>
                            <td>
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" onclick="viewDetails(${acc.id})" title="Voir dÃĐtails"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i></button>
                                ${acc.status === 'INACTIVE' ? `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success" onclick="viewDetails(${acc.id})" title="RÃĐactiver (dans la modale)"><i class="fas fa-undo-alt"></i></button>` : ''}
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    `).join('');
                } else {
                    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur de chargement<\/td><\/tr>';
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error(e);
                tbody.innerHTML = '<td><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur rÃĐseau<\/td><\/tr>';
            }
        }

        async function viewDetails(accountId) {
            currentAccountId = accountId;
            const modalBody = document.getElementById('detailModalBody');
            modalBody.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center"><div class="spinner-border"></div> Chargement des annulations...</div>';
            const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('detailModal'));
            modal.show();

            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/admin/users/${accountId}/cancellations`);
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error();
                const data = await response.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    const stats = data.data;
                    const logs = stats.recentLogs || [];
                    const logsHtml = logs.map(log => `
                        <tr>
                            <td>${formatDate(log.cancelledAt)}</td>
                            <td>#${log.requestId}</td>
                            <td>${log.roleAtTime || '-'}</td>
                            <td>${escapeHtml(log.reason || '-')}</td>
                        </tr>
                    `).join('');
                    modalBody.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="row mb-3">
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <strong>Utilisateur :</strong> ${escapeHtml(stats.fullName)} (ID ${stats.id})<br>
                                <strong>RÃīle :</strong> ${stats.roleType}<br>
                                <strong>Statut :</strong> <span class="badge ${stats.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${stats.status}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <strong>Annulations (7 derniers jours) :</strong>
                                <span class="badge ${stats.last7DaysCount >= (stats.roleType === 'CLIENT' ? 10 : 6) ? 'bg-danger' : 'bg-warning'} fs-6">${stats.last7DaysCount}</span>
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary ms-2" onclick="loadRiskyAccounts()">Actualiser</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <hr>
                        <h6>DerniÃĻres annulations (max 10)</h6>
                        <div class="table-responsive cancellation-detail">
                            <table class="table table-sm">
                                <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Demande</th><th>RÃīle au moment</th><th>Raison</th></tr></thead>
                                <tbody>${logsHtml || '<tr><td colspan="4" class="text-center">Aucune annulation enregistrÃĐe<\/td><\/tr>'}</tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    const reactivateBtn = document.getElementById('reactivateBtn');
                    reactivateBtn.style.display = (stats.status === 'INACTIVE' && stats.roleType !== 'FACTORY_USER') ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                } else {
                    modalBody.innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-danger">Impossible de charger les annulations.</div>';
                }
            } catch(e) {
                modalBody.innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-danger">Erreur de chargement.</div>';
            }
        }

        async function reactivateAccount() {
            if (!currentAccountId) return;
            if (!confirm('RÃĐactiver ce compte ? L\'utilisateur pourra Ã  nouveau se connecter.')) return;
            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/admin/users/${currentAccountId}/reactivate`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
                });
                const data = await response.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    alert('Compte rÃĐactivÃĐ avec succÃĻs');
                    const modal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('detailModal'));
                    modal.hide();
                    loadRiskyAccounts();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur : ' + (data.message || 'Ãchec'));
                }
            } catch(e) {
                alert('Erreur rÃĐseau');
            }
        }

        function escapeHtml(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;'}[m]));
        }

        function formatDate(d) {
            if (!d) return '-';
            return new Date(d).toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        }

        // Initialisation
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            loadRiskyAccounts();
        });
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

    </style>

<body th:replace="~{/admin/layout}">

<div th:fragment="sidebarLinks">

    <a th:href="@{/admin/users}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> <span>Utilisateurs</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/collectors}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> <span>Collecteurs</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/materials}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-recycle"></i> <span>MatÃĐriaux</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/challenges}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i> <span>DÃĐfis</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/supervision}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> <span>Supervision</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/notifications}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-bell"></i> <span>Notifications</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/anomalies}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> <span>Anomalies</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/support}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-headset"></i> <span>Support</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/machines}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-microchip"></i> <span>Machines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/centers}" class="sidebar-link active"><i class="fa fa-industry"></i> <span>Usines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/cancellations}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i> <span>Annulations abusives</span></a>
</div>

<div th:fragment="content">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h1 class="h3 fw-bold">Gestion des usines (centres de recyclage)</h1>
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openCenterModal()">
            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Nouvelle usine
        </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Barre de filtres -->
    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm mb-4">
        <div class="card-body">
            <div class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Nom</label>
                    <input type="text" id="filterName" class="form-control" placeholder="Nom de l'usine">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Location</label>
                    <input type="text" id="filterLocation" class="form-control" placeholder="Adresse">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Email</label>
                    <input type="email" id="filterEmail" class="form-control" placeholder="contact@exemple.com">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">TÃĐlÃĐphone</label>
                    <input type="tel" id="filterPhone" class="form-control" placeholder="0556XXXXXX">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">CapacitÃĐ min (kg)</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.001" id="filterMinCapacity" class="form-control" placeholder="0">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">CapacitÃĐ max (kg)</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.001" id="filterMaxCapacity" class="form-control" placeholder="IllimitÃĐ">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <button class="btn btn-primary w-100 mb-1" onclick="applyFilters()">
                        <i class="fas fa-search"></i> Filtrer
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary w-100" onclick="resetFilters()">
                        <i class="fas fa-undo-alt"></i> Reset
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Tableau des usines -->
    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
        <div class="card-body p-0">
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                    <thead class="table-light">
                    <tr>
                        <th>ID</th>
                        <th>Nom</th>
                        <th>Location</th>
                        <th>CapacitÃĐ (kg)</th>
                        <th>Email</th>
                        <th>TÃĐlÃĐphone</th>
                        <th>CrÃĐÃĐ le</th>
                        <th>Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="centersTableBody">
                    <tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center py-4">Chargement...<\/td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-footer bg-white">
            <nav id="paginationNav"></nav>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL CRÃATION / ÃDITION -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="centerModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="modal-dialog">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">Usine</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="centerId">
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">Nom *</label>
                        <input type="text" id="centerName" class="form-control" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">Location (adresse) *</label>
                        <input type="text" id="centerLocation" class="form-control" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">CapacitÃĐ (kg) *</label>
                        <input type="number" step="0.001" id="centerCapacity" class="form-control" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">Email contact</label>
                        <input type="email" id="centerEmail" class="form-control">
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label">TÃĐlÃĐphone contact</label>
                        <input type="tel" id="centerPhone" class="form-control">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveCenter()">Enregistrer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL DÃTAIL + STATS -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="detailModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-secondary text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">DÃĐtail de l'usine</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body" id="detailContent">
                    <div class="text-center py-4">Chargement...</div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Fermer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
