    <script>
        let currentPage = 0;
        let pageSize = 20;
        let totalPages = 0;
        let currentFilters = {
            name: '', location: '', email: '', phone: '',
            minCapacity: null, maxCapacity: null
        };

        function applyFilters() {
            currentFilters = {
                name: document.getElementById('filterName').value.trim(),
                location: document.getElementById('filterLocation').value.trim(),
                email: document.getElementById('filterEmail').value.trim(),
                phone: document.getElementById('filterPhone').value.trim(),
                minCapacity: parseFloat(document.getElementById('filterMinCapacity').value) || null,
                maxCapacity: parseFloat(document.getElementById('filterMaxCapacity').value) || null
            };
            currentPage = 0;
            loadCenters();
        }

        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('filterName').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterLocation').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterEmail').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterPhone').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterMinCapacity').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterMaxCapacity').value = '';
            currentFilters = { name: '', location: '', email: '', phone: '', minCapacity: null, maxCapacity: null };
            currentPage = 0;
            loadCenters();
        }

        function loadCenters(page = 0) {
            currentPage = page;
            let url = `/admin/centers-data?page=${currentPage}&size=${pageSize}`;
            if (currentFilters.name) url += `&name=${encodeURIComponent(currentFilters.name)}`;
            if (currentFilters.location) url += `&location=${encodeURIComponent(currentFilters.location)}`;
            if (currentFilters.email) url += `&email=${encodeURIComponent(currentFilters.email)}`;
            if (currentFilters.phone) url += `&phone=${encodeURIComponent(currentFilters.phone)}`;
            if (currentFilters.minCapacity) url += `&minCapacity=${currentFilters.minCapacity}`;
            if (currentFilters.maxCapacity) url += `&maxCapacity=${currentFilters.maxCapacity}`;

            fetch(url)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(pageData => {
                    renderTable(pageData.content);
                    totalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderPagination(pageData);
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function renderTable(centers) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('centersTableBody');
            if (!centers || centers.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted">Aucune usine trouvÃĐe<\/td></tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = centers.map(c => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${c.id}</td>
                    <td><strong>${escapeHtml(c.name)}</strong></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(c.address) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>${c.capacity ? c.capacity.toLocaleString() + ' kg' : '-'}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(c.contactEmail) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(c.contactPhone) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(c.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-info" onclick="viewDetail(${c.id})" title="DÃĐtail"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editCenter(${c.id})" title="Modifier"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteCenter(${c.id})" title="Supprimer"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('paginationNav');
            if (totalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${currentPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < totalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${currentPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function changePage(page) { loadCenters(page); }

        function openCenterModal() {
            document.getElementById('centerId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('centerName').value = '';
            document.getElementById('centerLocation').value = '';
            document.getElementById('centerCapacity').value = '';
            document.getElementById('centerEmail').value = '';
            document.getElementById('centerPhone').value = '';
            document.querySelector('#centerModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Nouvelle usine';
            showModal('centerModal');
        }

        function editCenter(id) {
            fetch(`/admin/center/${id}`)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(c => {
                    document.getElementById('centerId').value = c.id;
                    document.getElementById('centerName').value = c.name;
                    document.getElementById('centerLocation').value = c.address || '';
                    document.getElementById('centerCapacity').value = c.capacity || '';
                    document.getElementById('centerEmail').value = c.contactEmail || '';
                    document.getElementById('centerPhone').value = c.contactPhone || '';
                    document.querySelector('#centerModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Modifier l\'usine';
                    showModal('centerModal');
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function saveCenter() {
            const id = document.getElementById('centerId').value;
            const capacityVal = document.getElementById('centerCapacity').value;
            if (!capacityVal || isNaN(parseFloat(capacityVal))) {
                alert('La capacitÃĐ doit ÃŠtre un nombre valide.');
                return;
            }
            const data = {
                name: document.getElementById('centerName').value,
                address: document.getElementById('centerLocation').value,
                capacity: parseFloat(capacityVal),
                contactEmail: document.getElementById('centerEmail').value,
                contactPhone: document.getElementById('centerPhone').value
            };
            if (!data.name || !data.address) {
                alert('Le nom et la localisation sont obligatoires');
                return;
            }
            const url = id ? `/admin/center-update/${id}` : '/admin/center-create';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
            fetch(url, {
                method: method,
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(data)
            })
            .then(res => res.json())
            .then(resp => {
                if (resp.success) {
                    hideModal('centerModal');
                    loadCenters(currentPage);
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur : ' + (resp.message || 'Action ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                }
            })
            .catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function deleteCenter(id) {
            if (confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement cette usine ? Toute suppression est irrÃĐversible.')) {
                fetch(`/admin/center-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(resp => {
                        if (resp.success) {
                            loadCenters(currentPage);
                        } else {
                            alert('Erreur : ' + (resp.message || 'Suppression ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(err => alert(err));
            }
        }

        function viewDetail(id) {
            Promise.all([
                fetch(`/admin/center/${id}`).then(res => res.json()),
                fetch(`/admin/center/${id}/stats`).then(res => res.json())
            ]).then(([center, stats]) => {
                document.getElementById('detailContent').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <strong>ID:</strong> ${center.id}<br>
                            <strong>Nom:</strong> ${escapeHtml(center.name)}<br>
                            <strong>Location:</strong> ${escapeHtml(center.address) || '-'}<br>
                            <strong>CapacitÃĐ:</strong> ${center.capacity ? center.capacity.toLocaleString() + ' kg' : '-'}<br>
                            <strong>Email:</strong> ${escapeHtml(center.contactEmail) || '-'}<br>
                            <strong>TÃĐl:</strong> ${escapeHtml(center.contactPhone) || '-'}<br>
                            <strong>CrÃĐÃĐ le:</strong> ${formatDate(center.createdAt)}
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <div class="card bg-light">
                                <div class="card-body stats-detail">
                                    <h6 class="card-title">Statistiques des livraisons</h6>
                                    <table class="table table-sm table-borderless">
                                        <tr><td><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Total livraisons :</td><td class="fw-bold">${stats.totalDeliveries}</td></tr>
                                        <tr><td><i class="fas fa-check-circle text-success"></i> ValidÃĐes :</td><td>${stats.validatedDeliveries}</td></tr>
                                        <tr><td><i class="fas fa-adjust text-warning"></i> AjustÃĐes :</td><td>${stats.adjustedDeliveries}</td></tr>
                                        <tr><td><i class="fas fa-times-circle text-danger"></i> RefusÃĐes :</td><td>${stats.refusedDeliveries}</td></tr>
                                        <tr><td><i class="fas fa-cogs text-info"></i> En traitement :</td><td>${stats.processingDeliveries}</td></tr>
                                        <tr><td><i class="fas fa-check-double text-success"></i> TerminÃĐes :</td><td>${stats.completedDeliveries}</td></tr>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
                showModal('detailModal');
            }).catch(err => {
                console.error(err);
                document.getElementById('detailContent').innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-danger">Erreur de chargement</div>';
                showModal('detailModal');
            });
        }

        function showModal(id) { new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show(); }
        function hideModal(id) { bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id)).hide(); }
        function escapeHtml(str) { if (!str) return ''; return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;' }[m])); }
        function formatDate(dateStr) { if (!dateStr) return '-'; return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('fr-FR'); }

        loadCenters();
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm mb-4">

                    <input type="text" id="searchKeyword" class="form-control" placeholder="ex: plastique, collecte...">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">
                    <label class="form-label">Statut</label>
                    <select id="statusFilter" class="form-select">
                        <option value="">Tous</option>
                        <option value="true">Actif</option>
                        <option value="false">Inactif</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-3">
                    <label class="form-label">Type de dÃĐfi</label>
                    <select id="typeFilter" class="form-select">
                        <option value="">Tous</option>
                        <option value="QUANTITY_BASED">QuantitÃĐ (kg)</option>
                        <option value="MATERIAL_SPECIFIC">MatÃĐriau spÃĐcifique</option>
                        <option value="FREQUENCY_BASED">FrÃĐquence</option>
                        <option value="STREAK_BASED">SÃĐquence (streak)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-2">

                        <i class="fas fa-search"></i> Filtrer

    <!-- MODAL CRÃATION / ÃDITION -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="challengeModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">CrÃĐer un dÃĐfi</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <form id="challengeForm">
                        <input type="hidden" id="challengeId">
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-8 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Titre *</label>
                                <input type="text" id="title" class="form-control" required>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-4 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Statut</label>
                                <select id="isActive" class="form-select">
                                    <option value="true">Actif</option>
                                    <option value="false">Inactif</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Description</label>
                            <textarea id="description" rows="2" class="form-control"></textarea>
                        </div>
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Type de dÃĐfi *</label>
                                <select id="challengeType" class="form-select" required>
                                    <option value="QUANTITY_BASED">QuantitÃĐ (kg)</option>
                                    <option value="MATERIAL_SPECIFIC">MatÃĐriau spÃĐcifique</option>
                                    <option value="FREQUENCY_BASED">FrÃĐquence</option>
                                    <option value="STREAK_BASED">SÃĐquence (streak)</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">MatÃĐriau cible (pour type matÃĐriau spÃĐcifique)</label>
                                <select id="targetMaterialSelect" class="form-select">
                                    <option value="">-- Aucun matÃĐriau --</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-4 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Valeur cible *</label>
                                <input type="number" id="targetValue" class="form-control" required>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-4 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">UnitÃĐ *</label>
                                <select id="unit" class="form-select" required>
                                    <option value="KG">KG</option>
                                    <option value="COLLECTIONS_COUNT">Nombre de collectes</option>
                                    <option value="DAYS">Jours</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-4 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Points rÃĐcompense *</label>
                                <input type="number" id="rewardPoints" class="form-control" required>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Points bonus</label>
                                <input type="number" id="bonusPoints" class="form-control" value="0">
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-3 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Auto validation</label>
                                <select id="autoValidate" class="form-select">
                                    <option value="true">Oui</option>
                                    <option value="false">Non</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-3 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Min quantitÃĐ par collecte (kg)</label>
                                <input type="number" step="0.001" id="minQuantity" class="form-control">
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-3 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Max quantitÃĐ par collecte (kg)</label>
                                <input type="number" step="0.001" id="maxQuantity" class="form-control">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Date de dÃĐbut</label>
                                <input type="datetime-local" id="startDate" class="form-control">
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <label class="form-label">Date de fin</label>
                                <input type="datetime-local" id="endDate" class="form-control">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveChallenge()">Enregistrer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let currentPage = 0;
        let pageSize = 20;
        let totalPages = 0;
        let searchKeyword = '';
        let statusFilter = '';
        let typeFilter = '';

        function showModal(id) {
            new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show();
        }
        function hideModal(id) {
            bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id)).hide();
        }

        function applyFilters() {
            searchKeyword = document.getElementById('searchKeyword').value.trim();
            statusFilter = document.getElementById('statusFilter').value;
            typeFilter = document.getElementById('typeFilter').value;
            currentPage = 0;
            loadChallenges();
        }

        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('searchKeyword').value = '';
            document.getElementById('statusFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('typeFilter').value = '';
            searchKeyword = '';
            statusFilter = '';
            typeFilter = '';
            currentPage = 0;
            loadChallenges();
        }

        function loadChallenges() {
            let url = `/admin/challenges-data?page=${currentPage}&size=${pageSize}`;
            if (searchKeyword) url += `&keyword=${encodeURIComponent(searchKeyword)}`;
            if (statusFilter !== '') url += `&isActive=${statusFilter}`;
            if (typeFilter) url += `&challengeType=${typeFilter}`;

            fetch(url)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(pageData => {
                    renderTable(pageData.content);
                    totalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderPagination(pageData);
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function renderTable(challenges) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('challengesTableBody');
            if (!challenges || challenges.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center text-muted">Aucun dÃĐfi trouvÃĐ</td></tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = challenges.map(c => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${c.id}</td>
                    <td><strong>${escapeHtml(c.title)}</strong></td>
                    <td>${c.challengeType}</td>
                    <td>${c.targetValue}</td>
                    <td>${c.unit}</td>
                    <td>${c.rewardPoints}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${c.isActive ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${c.isActive ? 'Actif' : 'Inactif'}</span></td>
                    <td>${formatDate(c.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editChallenge(${c.id})"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-warning" onclick="toggleActive(${c.id}, ${!c.isActive})"><i class="fas fa-power-off"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteChallenge(${c.id})"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('paginationNav');
            if (totalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${currentPage-1}); return false;">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < totalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${i}); return false;">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${currentPage+1}); return false;">Suivant</a></li>`;
            html += '</ul>';
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function changePage(page) {
            currentPage = page;
            loadChallenges();
        }

        function loadMaterialsList() {
            fetch('/admin/materials-list')
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    const select = document.getElementById('targetMaterialSelect');
                    select.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Aucun matÃĐriau --</option>';
                    data.forEach(m => {
                        const option = document.createElement('option');
                        option.value = m.id;
                        option.text = m.name;
                        select.appendChild(option);
                    });
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function openCreateModal() {
            document.getElementById('challengeForm').reset();
            document.getElementById('challengeId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('isActive').value = 'true';
            document.getElementById('autoValidate').value = 'true';
            document.getElementById('bonusPoints').value = '0';
            document.getElementById('targetMaterialSelect').value = '';
            document.querySelector('#challengeModal .modal-title').innerHTML = 'CrÃĐer un dÃĐfi';
            showModal('challengeModal');
        }

        function editChallenge(id) {
            fetch(`/admin/challenge/${id}`)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(c => {
                    document.getElementById('challengeId').value = c.id;
                    document.getElementById('title').value = c.title;
                    document.getElementById('description').value = c.description || '';
                    document.getElementById('isActive').value = c.isActive;
                    document.getElementById('challengeType').value = c.challengeType;
                    document.getElementById('targetMaterialSelect').value = c.targetMaterialId || '';
                    document.getElementById('targetValue').value = c.targetValue;
                    document.getElementById('unit').value = c.unit;
                    document.getElementById('rewardPoints').value = c.rewardPoints;
                    document.getElementById('bonusPoints').value = c.bonusPoints || 0;
                    document.getElementById('autoValidate').value = c.autoValidate;
                    document.getElementById('minQuantity').value = c.minQuantityPerCollection || '';
                    document.getElementById('maxQuantity').value = c.maxQuantityPerCollection || '';
                    document.getElementById('startDate').value = c.startDate ? c.startDate.slice(0,16) : '';
                    document.getElementById('endDate').value = c.endDate ? c.endDate.slice(0,16) : '';
                    document.querySelector('#challengeModal .modal-title').innerHTML = 'Modifier le dÃĐfi';
                    showModal('challengeModal');
                });
        }

        function saveChallenge() {
            const id = document.getElementById('challengeId').value;
            const data = {
                title: document.getElementById('title').value,
                description: document.getElementById('description').value,
                challengeType: document.getElementById('challengeType').value,
                targetMaterialId: parseInt(document.getElementById('targetMaterialSelect').value) || null,
                targetValue: parseInt(document.getElementById('targetValue').value),
                unit: document.getElementById('unit').value,
                rewardPoints: parseInt(document.getElementById('rewardPoints').value),
                bonusPoints: parseInt(document.getElementById('bonusPoints').value) || 0,
                startDate: document.getElementById('startDate').value || null,
                endDate: document.getElementById('endDate').value || null,
                isActive: document.getElementById('isActive').value === 'true',
                autoValidate: document.getElementById('autoValidate').value === 'true',
                minQuantityPerCollection: parseFloat(document.getElementById('minQuantity').value) || null,
                maxQuantityPerCollection: parseFloat(document.getElementById('maxQuantity').value) || null
            };

            const url = id ? `/admin/challenge-update/${id}` : '/admin/challenge-create';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';

            fetch(url, {
                method: method,
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(data)
            })
            .then(res => res.json())
            .then(resp => {
                if (resp.success) {
                    hideModal('challengeModal');
                    loadChallenges();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur: ' + resp.message);
                }
            });
        }

        function toggleActive(id, activate) {
            const url = activate ? `/admin/challenge-activate/${id}` : `/admin/challenge-deactivate/${id}`;
            fetch(url, { method: 'PUT' })
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(resp => {
                    if (resp.success) loadChallenges();
                    else alert('Erreur: ' + resp.message);
                });
        }

        function deleteChallenge(id) {
            if (confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement ce dÃĐfi ?')) {
                fetch(`/admin/challenge-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(resp => {
                        if (resp.success) loadChallenges();
                        else alert('Erreur: ' + resp.message);
                    });
            }
        }

        function escapeHtml(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;' }[m]));
        }

        function formatDate(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return '-';
            return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        }

        loadMaterialsList();
        loadChallenges();
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

    <a th:href="@{/admin/machines}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-microchip"></i> <span>Machines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/centers}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fa fa-industry"></i> <span>Usines</span></a>

</div>

<div th:fragment="content">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h1 class="h3 fw-bold">Gestion des collecteurs</h1>
    </div>

    <!-- Cartes statistiques -->
    <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card stat-card bg-light border-0 shadow-sm">

                    <h3 id="totalCollectors" class="mb-0">-</h3>
                </div>

        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card stat-card bg-success text-white border-0 shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-body text-center">
                    <h6>VÃĐrifiÃĐs</h6>
                    <h3 id="verifiedCollectors" class="mb-0">-</h3>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card stat-card bg-warning text-dark border-0 shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-body text-center">
                    <h6>Non vÃĐrifiÃĐs</h6>
                    <h3 id="unverifiedCollectors" class="mb-0">-</h3>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">

                </div>

        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Filtre par statut -->

        <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="loadCollectors('verified')">VÃĐrifiÃĐs</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-warning" onclick="loadCollectors('unverified')">Non vÃĐrifiÃĐs</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Tableau -->
    <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
        <div class="card-body p-0">
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                    <thead class="table-light">
                    <tr>
                        <th>ID</th>
                        <th>Nom complet</th>
                        <th>VÃĐrifiÃĐ</th>

                        <th>Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="collectorsTableBody">
                    <tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center py-4">Chargement......</td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-footer bg-white">
            <nav id="paginationNav"></nav>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL DÃTAILS -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="detailModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-secondary text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">DÃĐtails du collecteur</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body" id="detailContent">Chargement...</div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Fermer</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" id="detailVerifyBtn" style="display:none" onclick="verifyFromDetail()">VÃĐrifier</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-warning" id="detailRejectBtn" style="display:none" onclick="rejectFromDetail()">Rejeter</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let currentFilter = 'all';
        let currentPage = 0;
        let pageSize = 20;
        let totalPages = 0;
        let currentCollectorId = null;

        // Stats
        function loadStats() {
            fetch('/admin/collectors-stats')
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    document.getElementById('totalCollectors').innerText = data.totalCollectors || 0;
                    document.getElementById('verifiedCollectors').innerText = data.verifiedCollectors || 0;
                    document.getElementById('unverifiedCollectors').innerText = data.unverifiedCollectors || 0;
                    document.getElementById('totalTrucks').innerText = data.totalTrucks || 0;
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        // Chargement liste
        function loadCollectors(filter, page = 0) {
            currentFilter = filter;
            currentPage = page;
            let url = `/admin/collectors-data?page=${page}&size=${pageSize}`;
            if (filter === 'verified') url += '&filter=verified';
            else if (filter === 'unverified') url += '&filter=unverified';

            fetch(url)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(pageData => {
                    renderTable(pageData.content);
                    totalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderPagination(pageData);
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function renderTable(collectors) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('collectorsTableBody');
            if (!collectors || collectors.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted">Aucun collecteur trouvÃĐ</td></tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = collectors.map(c => {
                // Bouton Rejeter visible si non vÃĐrifiÃĐ ET compte actif
                const showReject = !c.isVerified && c.accountStatus === 'ACTIVE';
                return `
                <tr>
                    <td>${c.id}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(c.firstName)} ${escapeHtml(c.lastName)}</td>
                    <td>${c.isVerified ? '<span class="badge bg-success">VÃĐrifiÃĐ</span>' : '<span class="badge bg-warning">Non vÃĐrifiÃĐ</span>'}</td>
                    <td>${c.averageRating || 0} / 5</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(c.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-info" onclick="viewDetail(${c.id})" title="DÃĐtail"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i></button>
                            ${!c.isVerified ?
                                (showReject ?
                                    `<button class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="verifyCollector(${c.id})" title="VÃĐrifier"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></button>
                                     <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="rejectCollector(${c.id})" title="Rejeter"><i class="fas fa-times-circle"></i></button>` :
                                    `<button class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="verifyCollector(${c.id})" title="VÃĐrifier"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></button>`
                                ) :
                                `<button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="unverifyCollector(${c.id})" title="DÃĐvÃĐrifier"><i class="fas fa-undo-alt"></i></button>`
                            }
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>`;
            }).join('');
        }

        function renderPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('paginationNav');
            if (totalPages <= 1) {
                nav.innerHTML = '';
                return;
            }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadCollectors('${currentFilter}', ${currentPage-1}); return false;">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < totalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadCollectors('${currentFilter}', ${i}); return false;">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadCollectors('${currentFilter}', ${currentPage+1}); return false;">Suivant</a></li>`;
            html += '</ul>';
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        // Construction URL d'image
        function buildImageUrl(url) {
            if (!url) return null;
            if (url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('https://')) return url;
            if (url.startsWith('/')) return url;
            return '/' + url;
        }

        // Vue dÃĐtaillÃĐe
        function viewDetail(id) {
            currentCollectorId = id;
            fetch(`/admin/collector/${id}`)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    const collector = data.collector;
                    const truck = data.truck;
                    const hasTruck = data.hasTruck;
                    const ready = data.readyForVerification;
                    const isInactive = collector.accountStatus !== 'ACTIVE';
                    const showReject = !collector.isVerified && !isInactive;

                    let truckHtml = '';
                    if (hasTruck && truck) {
                        const truckPhoto = buildImageUrl(truck.truckPhotoUrl);
                        const greyCard = buildImageUrl(truck.greyCardImageUrl);
                        const drivingLicense = buildImageUrl(truck.drivingLicenseImageUrl);
                        truckHtml = `
                            <hr>
                            <h6>Camion</h6>
                            <div class="row">
                                <div class="col-md-4">
                                    <strong>Plaque:</strong> ${escapeHtml(truck.plateNumber)}<br>
                                    <strong>Marque:</strong> ${escapeHtml(truck.brand || '-')}<br>
                                    <strong>ModÃĻle:</strong> ${escapeHtml(truck.model || '-')}<br>
                                    <strong>CapacitÃĐ:</strong> ${truck.capacityKg} kg<br>
                                    <strong>Statut:</strong> ${truck.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'Actif' : 'Inactif'}<br>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-8">
                                    <div class="row">
                                        <div class="col-md-4 text-center">
                                            <strong>Photo camion</strong><br>
                                            ${truckPhoto ? `<img src="${truckPhoto}" class="image-thumb" onclick="window.open('${truckPhoto}')">` : '<span class="text-muted">Non disponible</span>'}
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="col-md-4 text-center">
                                            <strong>Carte grise</strong><br>
                                            ${greyCard ? `<img src="${greyCard}" class="image-thumb" onclick="window.open('${greyCard}')">` : '<span class="text-muted">Non disponible</span>'}
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="col-md-4 text-center">
                                            <strong>Permis</strong><br>
                                            ${drivingLicense ? `<img src="${drivingLicense}" class="image-thumb" onclick="window.open('${drivingLicense}')">` : '<span class="text-muted">Non disponible</span>'}
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        `;
                    } else {
                        truckHtml = '<div class="alert alert-warning mt-2">Aucun camion enregistrÃĐ.</div>';
                    }

                    document.getElementById('detailContent').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <strong>ID:</strong> ${collector.id}<br>
                                <strong>Nom:</strong> ${escapeHtml(collector.firstName)} ${escapeHtml(collector.lastName)}<br>
                                <strong>NÂ° identitÃĐ nationale:</strong> ${escapeHtml(collector.nationalIdNumber) || '-'}<br>
                                <strong>VÃĐrifiÃĐ:</strong> ${collector.isVerified ? 'Oui' : 'Non'}<br>
                                <strong>Statut compte:</strong> <span class="badge ${collector.accountStatus === 'ACTIVE' ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${collector.accountStatus || 'ACTIVE'}</span><br>
                                <strong>Note moyenne:</strong> ${collector.averageRating || 0}<br>
                                <strong>Inscrit le:</strong> ${formatDate(collector.createdAt)}<br>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <strong>Position actuelle:</strong><br>
                                Lat: ${collector.currentLatitude || '-'}<br>
                                Lng: ${collector.currentLongitude || '-'}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        ${truckHtml}
                    `;

                    const detailVerifyBtn = document.getElementById('detailVerifyBtn');
                    const detailRejectBtn = document.getElementById('detailRejectBtn');
                    if (!collector.isVerified && ready && !isInactive) {
                        detailVerifyBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
                        detailRejectBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
                    } else {
                        detailVerifyBtn.style.display = 'none';
                        detailRejectBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    showModal('detailModal');
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        // VÃĐrifier
        function verifyCollector(id) {
            if (confirm('Voulez-vous vÃĐrifier ce collecteur ?')) {
                fetch(`/admin/collector-verify/${id}`, { method: 'PUT' })
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.success) {
                            loadCollectors(currentFilter, currentPage);
                            loadStats();
                            if (currentCollectorId === id) hideModal('detailModal');
                        } else {
                            alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'VÃĐrification ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                        }
                    });
            }
        }

        // DÃĐvÃĐrifier
        function unverifyCollector(id) {
            if (confirm('Retirer la vÃĐrification de ce collecteur ?')) {
                fetch(`/admin/collector-unverify/${id}`, { method: 'PUT' })
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.success) {
                            loadCollectors(currentFilter, currentPage);
                            loadStats();
                        } else {
                            alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Action ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                        }
                    });
            }
        }

        // Rejeter (sans motif)
        function rejectCollector(id) {
            if (confirm('Rejeter ce collecteur ? Cela dÃĐsactivera son compte.')) {
                fetch(`/admin/collector-reject/${id}`, {
                    method: 'PUT',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({})
                })
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    if (data.success) {
                        loadCollectors(currentFilter, currentPage);
                        loadStats();
                        if (currentCollectorId === id) hideModal('detailModal');
                    } else {
                        alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Rejet ÃĐchouÃĐ'));
                    }
                });
            }
        }

        // Raccourcis depuis la modale
        function verifyFromDetail() { verifyCollector(currentCollectorId); }
        function rejectFromDetail() { rejectCollector(currentCollectorId); }

        // Utilitaires
        function showModal(id) {
            const modalEl = document.getElementById(id);
            if (modalEl) new bootstrap.Modal(modalEl).show();
        }
        function hideModal(id) {
            const modalEl = document.getElementById(id);
            const modal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(modalEl);
            if (modal) modal.hide();
        }
        function escapeHtml(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;' }[m]));
        }
        function formatDate(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return '-';
            return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        }

        // Initialisation
        loadStats();
        loadCollectors('all', 0);
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

    <script>
        let usersChart, rolesChart;

        const formatNumber = n => n?.toLocaleString() ?? '0';
        const formatMoney = a => a?.toLocaleString('fr-DZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' DA' ?? '0 DA';
        const escapeHtml = s => s?.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&':'&amp;', '<':'&lt;', '>':'&gt;' }[m])) ?? '';

        async function loadDashboard() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/admin/api/dashboard');
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
                const data = await res.json();
                updateUI(data);
                initCharts(data);
            } catch (e) {
                console.error(e);
                document.getElementById('statsCards').innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-danger small">Erreur de chargement des donnÃĐes</div>';
            }
        }

        function updateUI(data) {
            const stats = data.stats;
            const supervision = data.supervisionStats;
            const pricing = data.pricingStats;
            const anomaly = data.anomalyStats;

            // Cartes principales (8)
            const cards1 = [
                { title: 'Comptes', value: stats.totalAccounts, icon: 'fa-users', color: 'primary' },
                { title: 'Clients', value: stats.totalClients, icon: 'fa-user-check', color: 'success' },
                { title: 'Collecteurs', value: stats.totalCollectors, icon: 'fa-truck', color: 'warning' },
                { title: 'EmployÃĐs usine', value: stats.totalFactoryUsers, icon: 'fa-hard-hat', color: 'info' }
            ];
            const cards2 = [
                { title: 'Demandes', value: stats.totalCollectionRequests, icon: 'fa-clipboard-list', color: 'secondary', extra: `<span class="badge bg-secondary">En attente ${supervision.pendingRequests}</span>` },
                { title: 'Collectes', value: stats.totalCollections, icon: 'fa-hand-holding-heart', color: 'danger', extra: `<span class="badge bg-danger">Litiges ${supervision.disputedRequests}</span>` },
                { title: 'Livraisons', value: supervision.totalDeliveries, icon: 'fa-warehouse', color: 'info', extra: `<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Att. val. ${supervision.collectionsPendingValidation}</span>` },
                { title: 'Tickets support', value: stats.totalSupportTickets, icon: 'fa-ticket-alt', color: 'danger', extra: `<span class="badge bg-danger">Ouverts ${stats.openSupportTickets}</span>` }
            ];

            const renderCard = (c) => `
                <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
                    <div class="stat-card h-100">
                        <div class="card-body d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                            <div>
                                <h6>${c.title}</h6>
                                <h2>${formatNumber(c.value)}</h2>
                                ${c.extra ? `<div class="mt-1">${c.extra}</div>` : ''}
                            </div>
                            <div class="icon-circle bg-${c.color} bg-opacity-10 rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center">
                                <i class="fas ${c.icon} text-${c.color}"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;

            document.getElementById('statsCards').innerHTML = cards1.map(renderCard).join('');
            document.getElementById('statsCards2').innerHTML = cards2.map(renderCard).join('');

            // Demandes
            document.getElementById('requestStatusBadges').innerHTML = `
                <span class="badge bg-secondary">Att. ${supervision.pendingRequests}</span>
                <span class="badge bg-primary">Acc. ${supervision.acceptedRequests}</span>
                <span class="badge bg-success">Col. ${supervision.collectedRequests}</span>
                <span class="badge bg-info text-dark">Liv. ${supervision.deliveredRequests}</span>
                <span class="badge bg-danger">Ann. ${supervision.cancelledRequests}</span>
            `;

            // Finances
            document.getElementById('financeContent').innerHTML = `
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>Revenus collectÃĐs :</span> <strong>${formatMoney(stats.collectedRevenue)}</strong></div>
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>En attente :</span> ${formatMoney(stats.expectedRevenue)}</div>
                <div class="progress progress-sm mt-1"><div class="progress-bar bg-success" style="width: ${stats.totalInvoices ? (stats.paidInvoices * 100 / stats.totalInvoices) : 0}%"></div></div>
                <div class="small text-muted mt-1">Factures en retard : ${stats.overdueInvoices}</div>
            `;

            // Points citoyens
            document.getElementById('pointsContent').innerHTML = `
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>Points totaux :</span> <strong>${formatNumber(stats.totalCitizenPoints)}</strong></div>
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>Passif estimÃĐ :</span> ${formatMoney(stats.citizenLiabilities)}</div>
            `;

            // MatÃĐriaux
            document.getElementById('materialsContent').innerHTML = `
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>Actifs :</span> ${pricing.activeMaterials}</div>
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>Inactifs :</span> ${pricing.inactiveMaterials}</div>
                <div class="small text-muted mt-1">DerniÃĻre MAJ : ${data.lastPriceUpdate || '-'}</div>
            `;

            // Nouveaux inscrits
            document.getElementById('newUsersContent').innerHTML = `
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>Aujourd'hui :</span> <strong>${formatNumber(data.newUsersToday)}</strong></div>
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>Cette semaine :</span> ${formatNumber(data.newUsersThisWeek)}</div>
            `;

            // Tickets support
            document.getElementById('ticketsContent').innerHTML = `
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>Ouverts :</span> <strong>${stats.openSupportTickets}</strong></div>
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between"><span>FermÃĐs :</span> ${stats.closedTickets || 0}</div>
            `;

            // Anomalies
            const alertDiv = document.getElementById('anomalyAlert');
            if (anomaly.criticalAnomalies > 0) {
                alertDiv.className = 'alert alert-danger py-1 small d-flex align-items-center mt-2';
                alertDiv.innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i> ${anomaly.criticalAnomalies} anomalie(s) critique(s) dÃĐtectÃĐe(s).`;
            } else {
                alertDiv.classList.add('d-none');
            }

            // Litiges
            const disputesBody = document.getElementById('disputesTableBody');
            if (data.recentDisputes && data.recentDisputes.length) {
                disputesBody.innerHTML = data.recentDisputes.map(d => `
                    <tr>
                        <td>${d.requestId}</td>
                        <td>${escapeHtml(d.clientFullName)}</td>
                        <td>${escapeHtml(d.disputeReason)}</td>
                        <td><span class="badge bg-danger">${d.requestStatus}</span></td>
                    </tr>
                `).join('');
            } else {
                disputesBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="4" class="text-center">Aucun litige rÃĐcent</td></tr>';
            }
        }

        function initCharts(data) {
            const ctxUsers = document.getElementById('usersChart').getContext('2d');
            const ctxRoles = document.getElementById('rolesChart').getContext('2d');

            const dailyInscriptions = data.newUsersPerDay || [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0];
            const days = ['Lun', 'Mar', 'Mer', 'Jeu', 'Ven', 'Sam', 'Dim'];

            if (usersChart) usersChart.destroy();
            usersChart = new Chart(ctxUsers, {
                type: 'line',
                data: {
                    labels: days,
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Nouveaux utilisateurs',
                        data: dailyInscriptions,
                        borderColor: '#0D6EFD',
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(13,110,253,0.05)',
                        tension: 0.2,
                        fill: true,
                        pointRadius: 2
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true,
                    maintainAspectRatio: true,
                    plugins: { legend: { display: false } }
                }
            });

            const rolesData = [data.stats.totalClients || 0, data.stats.totalCollectors || 0, data.stats.totalFactoryUsers || 0];
            if (rolesChart) rolesChart.destroy();
            rolesChart = new Chart(ctxRoles, {
                type: 'doughnut',
                data: {
                    labels: ['Clients', 'Collecteurs', 'EmployÃĐs usine'],
                    datasets: [{
                        data: rolesData,
                        backgroundColor: ['#0D6EFD', '#FFC107', '#0DCAF0'],
                        borderWidth: 0
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true,
                    plugins: {
                        legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { boxWidth: 10, font: { size: 10 } } }
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        document.getElementById('currentDate').innerText = new Date().toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        loadDashboard();
        document.getElementById('refreshBtn').addEventListener('click', () => loadDashboard());
        setInterval(loadDashboard, 60000);
    </script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

            padding: 1.8rem;
        }

        /* Responsive mobile */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .sidebar {
                transform: translateX(-100%);
                transition: transform 0.3s;
            }
            .sidebar.mobile-open {
                transform: translateX(0);
            }
            .main-content, .main-content.expanded {
                margin-left: 0 !important;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<script>
    const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    const mainContent = document.getElementById('mainContent');
    const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('toggleSidebarBtn');

    function toggleSidebar() {
        if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
            sidebar.classList.toggle('mobile-open');
        } else {
            sidebar.classList.toggle('collapsed');
            mainContent.classList.toggle('expanded');
        }
    }

    toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleSidebar);

    if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-link').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => sidebar.classList.remove('mobile-open'));
        });
    }
</script>

    <!-- MODAL CRÃATION / ÃDITION MACHINE -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="machineModal" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">

                <div class="modal-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">DÃĐtail de l'incident</h5>

                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-warning" id="incidentResolveBtn" style="display:none" onclick="updateIncidentStatus('RESOLVED')">RÃĐsoudre</button>
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" id="incidentDeleteBtn" onclick="deleteIncident()">Supprimer</button>
                </div>
