    <script>
        // ==================== ÃTAT ====================
        let machinesPage = 0, machinesTotalPages = 0;
        let incidentsPage = 0, incidentsTotalPages = 0;
        let currentIncidentId = null;

        // ==================== STATISTIQUES MACHINES ====================
        function loadMachineStats() {
            fetch('/admin/machines-stats')
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    document.getElementById('totalMachines').innerText = data.total || 0;
                    document.getElementById('workingMachines').innerText = data.working || 0;
                    document.getElementById('maintenanceMachines').innerText = data.maintenance || 0;
                    document.getElementById('outOfServiceMachines').innerText = data.outOfService || 0;
                })
                .catch(console.error);
        }

        // ==================== MACHINES ====================
        function renderMachinesTable(machines) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('machinesTableBody');
            if (!machines || machines.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted">Aucune machine trouvÃĐe</td></tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = machines.map(m => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${m.id}</td>
                    <td><strong>${escapeHtml(m.name)}</strong></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(m.serialNumber) || '-'}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${getStatusBadge(m.status)}">${formatStatus(m.status)}</span></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(m.description) || '-'}</td>
                    <td>${m.photoUrl ? `<img src="${m.photoUrl.startsWith('/') ? m.photoUrl : '/' + m.photoUrl}" class="image-thumb" onclick="window.open('${m.photoUrl.startsWith('/') ? m.photoUrl : '/' + m.photoUrl}')">` : '-'}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(m.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td>
                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" onclick="editMachine(${m.id})" title="Modifier"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteMachine(${m.id})" title="Supprimer"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function getStatusBadge(status) {
            switch(status) {
                case 'WORKING': return 'bg-success';
                case 'MAINTENANCE': return 'bg-warning text-dark';
                case 'OUT_OF_SERVICE': return 'bg-danger';
                default: return 'bg-secondary';
            }
        }

        function formatStatus(status) {
            switch(status) {
                case 'WORKING': return 'En service';
                case 'MAINTENANCE': return 'Maintenance';
                case 'OUT_OF_SERVICE': return 'Hors service';
                default: return status;
            }
        }

        function renderMachinesPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('machinesPagination');
            if (machinesTotalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadMachines(${machinesPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < machinesTotalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === machinesPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadMachines(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadMachines(${machinesPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function openMachineModal() {
            document.getElementById('machineId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('machineName').value = '';
            document.getElementById('machineSerial').value = '';
            document.getElementById('machineStatus').value = 'WORKING';
            document.getElementById('machineDesc').value = '';
            document.getElementById('machinePhoto').value = '';
            document.getElementById('photoPreview').innerHTML = '';
            document.querySelector('#machineModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Nouvelle machine';
            showModal('machineModal');
        }

        function editMachine(id) {
            fetch(`/admin/machine/${id}`)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(m => {
                    document.getElementById('machineId').value = m.id;
                    document.getElementById('machineName').value = m.name;
                    document.getElementById('machineSerial').value = m.serialNumber || '';
                    document.getElementById('machineStatus').value = m.status;
                    document.getElementById('machineDesc').value = m.description || '';
                    document.getElementById('photoPreview').innerHTML = '';
                    if (m.photoUrl) {
                        document.getElementById('photoPreview').innerHTML = `<img src="${m.photoUrl.startsWith('/') ? m.photoUrl : '/' + m.photoUrl}" class="image-preview">`;
                    }
                    document.querySelector('#machineModal .modal-title').innerText = 'Modifier la machine';
                    showModal('machineModal');
                })
                .catch(console.error);
        }

        // AperÃ§u de la photo avant envoi
        document.getElementById('machinePhoto').addEventListener('change', function(e) {
            const preview = document.getElementById('photoPreview');
            preview.innerHTML = '';
            if (this.files && this.files[0]) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function(ev) {
                    const img = document.createElement('img');
                    img.src = ev.target.result;
                    img.className = 'image-preview';
                    preview.appendChild(img);
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(this.files[0]);
            }
        });

        function saveMachine() {
            const id = document.getElementById('machineId').value;
            const formData = new FormData();
            formData.append('name', document.getElementById('machineName').value);
            formData.append('serialNumber', document.getElementById('machineSerial').value);
            formData.append('status', document.getElementById('machineStatus').value);
            formData.append('description', document.getElementById('machineDesc').value);
            const photoFile = document.getElementById('machinePhoto').files[0];
            if (photoFile) formData.append('photo', photoFile);

            const url = id ? `/admin/machine-update/${id}` : '/admin/machine-create';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';

            fetch(url, {
                method: method,
                body: formData
            })
            .then(res => res.json())
            .then(resp => {
                if (resp.success) {
                    hideModal('machineModal');
                    loadMachines(machinesPage);
                    loadMachineStats();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur : ' + (resp.message || 'Action ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                }
            })
            .catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function deleteMachine(id) {
            if (confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement cette machine ? Cette action est irrÃĐversible.')) {
                fetch(`/admin/machine-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(resp => {
                        if (resp.success) {
                            loadMachines(machinesPage);
                            loadMachineStats();
                        } else {
                            alert('Erreur : ' + (resp.message || 'Suppression ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(err => alert(err));
            }
        }

        // ==================== INCIDENTS ====================
        function loadIncidents(page = 0) {
            incidentsPage = page;
            let url = `/admin/incidents-data?page=${incidentsPage}&size=20`;
            const severity = document.getElementById('incidentSeverityFilter').value;
            const status = document.getElementById('incidentStatusFilter').value;
            if (severity) url += `&severity=${severity}`;
            if (status) url += `&status=${status}`;
            fetch(url)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(pageData => {
                    renderIncidentsTable(pageData.content);
                    incidentsTotalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderIncidentsPagination(pageData);
                })
                .catch(console.error);
        }

        function renderIncidentsTable(incidents) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('incidentsTableBody');
            if (!incidents || incidents.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '</table><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-muted">Aucun incident trouvÃĐ</td></tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = incidents.map(inc => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${inc.id}</td>
                    <td>#${inc.machineId} - ${escapeHtml(inc.machineName) || 'Machine'}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(inc.description) || '-'}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${getSeverityBadge(inc.severity)}">${inc.severity}</span></td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${getIncidentStatusBadge(inc.status)}">${formatIncidentStatus(inc.status)}</span></td>
                    <td>${formatDate(inc.reportedAt)}</td>
                    <td>
                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" onclick="viewIncident(${inc.id})" title="DÃĐtail"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i></button>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function getSeverityBadge(severity) {
            switch(severity) {
                case 'CRITICAL': return 'bg-danger';
                case 'HIGH': return 'bg-warning text-dark';
                case 'MEDIUM': return 'bg-info text-dark';
                default: return 'bg-secondary';
            }
        }

        function getIncidentStatusBadge(status) {
            switch(status) {
                case 'OPEN': return 'bg-danger';
                case 'IN_PROGRESS': return 'bg-warning text-dark';
                case 'RESOLVED': return 'bg-success';
                default: return 'bg-secondary';
            }
        }

        function formatIncidentStatus(status) {
            switch(status) {
                case 'OPEN': return 'Ouvert';
                case 'IN_PROGRESS': return 'En cours';
                case 'RESOLVED': return 'RÃĐsolu';
                default: return status;
            }
        }

        function renderIncidentsPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('incidentsPagination');
            if (incidentsTotalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadIncidents(${incidentsPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < incidentsTotalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === incidentsPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadIncidents(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="loadIncidents(${incidentsPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function viewIncident(id) {
            currentIncidentId = id;
            fetch(`/admin/incident/${id}`)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(inc => {
                    let incidentImageUrl = inc.incidentImageUrl;
                    if (incidentImageUrl && !incidentImageUrl.startsWith('/')) {
                        incidentImageUrl = '/' + incidentImageUrl;
                    }
                    const photoHtml = incidentImageUrl ? `<div class="mt-3 text-center"><img src="${incidentImageUrl}" class="img-fluid rounded" style="max-height:200px" onclick="window.open('${incidentImageUrl}')" style="cursor:pointer"></div>` : '';
                    document.getElementById('incidentDetailContent').innerHTML = `
                        <p><strong>Machine :</strong> #${inc.machineId} - ${escapeHtml(inc.machineName) || 'Machine'}</p>
                        <p><strong>Description :</strong> ${escapeHtml(inc.description) || '-'}</p>
                        <p><strong>SÃĐvÃĐritÃĐ :</strong> <span class="badge ${getSeverityBadge(inc.severity)}">${inc.severity}</span></p>
                        <p><strong>Statut :</strong> <span class="badge ${getIncidentStatusBadge(inc.status)}">${formatIncidentStatus(inc.status)}</span></p>
                        <p><strong>SignalÃĐ le :</strong> ${formatDate(inc.reportedAt)}</p>
                        <p><strong>RÃĐsolu le :</strong> ${formatDate(inc.resolvedAt) || '-'}</p>
                        ${photoHtml}
                    `;
                    const resolveBtn = document.getElementById('incidentResolveBtn');
                    resolveBtn.style.display = (inc.status !== 'RESOLVED') ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                    showModal('incidentModal');
                })
                .catch(console.error);
        }

        function updateIncidentStatus(newStatus) {
            if (!currentIncidentId) return;
            fetch(`/admin/incident/${currentIncidentId}/status`, {
                method: 'PUT',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ status: newStatus })
            })
            .then(res => res.json())
            .then(resp => {
                if (resp.success) {
                    hideModal('incidentModal');
                    loadIncidents(incidentsPage);
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur : ' + (resp.message || 'Mise Ã  jour ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                }
            })
            .catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function deleteIncident() {
            if (!currentIncidentId) return;
            if (confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement cet incident ?')) {
                fetch(`/admin/incident/${currentIncidentId}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(resp => {
                        if (resp.success) {
                            hideModal('incidentModal');
                            loadIncidents(incidentsPage);
                        } else {
                            alert('Erreur : ' + (resp.message || 'Suppression ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(err => alert(err));
            }
        }

        function resetIncidentFilters() {
            document.getElementById('incidentSeverityFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('incidentStatusFilter').value = '';
            loadIncidents(0);
        }

        // ==================== GESTION DES FILTRES MACHINES ====================
        let machineFilters = { name: '', serialNumber: '', status: '' };

        function applyMachineFilters() {
            machineFilters.name = document.getElementById('machineNameFilter').value.trim();
            machineFilters.serialNumber = document.getElementById('machineSerialFilter').value.trim();
            machineFilters.status = document.getElementById('machineStatusFilter').value;
            machinesPage = 0;
            loadMachines();
        }

        function resetMachineFilters() {
            document.getElementById('machineNameFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('machineSerialFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('machineStatusFilter').value = '';
            machineFilters = { name: '', serialNumber: '', status: '' };
            machinesPage = 0;
            loadMachines();
        }

        function loadMachines(page = 0) {
            machinesPage = page;
            let url = `/admin/machines-data?page=${machinesPage}&size=20`;
            if (machineFilters.name) url += `&name=${encodeURIComponent(machineFilters.name)}`;
            if (machineFilters.serialNumber) url += `&serialNumber=${encodeURIComponent(machineFilters.serialNumber)}`;
            if (machineFilters.status) url += `&status=${machineFilters.status}`;

            fetch(url)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(pageData => {
                    renderMachinesTable(pageData.content);
                    machinesTotalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderMachinesPagination(pageData);
                })
                .catch(console.error);
        }

        // ==================== AFFICHAGE CONDITIONNEL DES FILTRES ====================
        function initFiltersVisibility() {
            // Gestion des onglets
            document.querySelectorAll('#machineTabs button').forEach(button => {
                button.addEventListener('shown.bs.tab', function (event) {
                    const targetId = event.target.getAttribute('data-bs-target');
                    const machineFiltersDiv = document.getElementById('machineFiltersDiv');
                    if (targetId === '#machines') {
                        machineFiltersDiv.style.display = 'block';
                    } else if (targetId === '#incidents') {
                        machineFiltersDiv.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                });
            });

            // Ãtat initial : afficher les filtres machines uniquement si l'onglet Machines est actif
            const activeTab = document.querySelector('#machineTabs .nav-link.active');
            if (activeTab && activeTab.getAttribute('data-bs-target') === '#machines') {
                document.getElementById('machineFiltersDiv').style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                document.getElementById('machineFiltersDiv').style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        // ==================== UTILITAIRES ====================
        function showModal(id) {
            new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show();
        }
        function hideModal(id) {
            const modal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id));
            if (modal) modal.hide();
        }
        function escapeHtml(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;' }[m]));
        }
        function formatDate(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return '-';
            return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        }

        // ==================== INITIALISATION ====================
        loadMachineStats();
        loadMachines();
        loadIncidents();
        initFiltersVisibility();
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

                <div class="modal-header bg-secondary text-white">
                    <h5 class="modal-title">DÃĐtail du matÃĐriau</h5>
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body" id="detailContent">Chargement...</div>

    <script>
        // ==================== ÃTAT GLOBAL ====================
        let currentFilter = 'all';
        let currentPage = 0;
        let pageSize = 20;
        let totalPages = 0;
        // Filtres avancÃĐs
        let searchKeyword = '';
        let minCitizen = null, maxCitizen = null, minCollector = null, maxCollector = null;

        // ==================== UTILITAIRES ====================
        function showModal(id) {
            const modalEl = document.getElementById(id);
            if (modalEl) new bootstrap.Modal(modalEl).show();
        }
        function hideModal(id) {
            const modalEl = document.getElementById(id);
            const modal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(modalEl);
            if (modal) modal.hide();
        }
        function escapeHtml(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;' }[m]));
        }
        function formatDate(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return '-';
            return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        }

        // ==================== CHARGEMENT DES STATS ====================
        function loadStats() {
            fetch('/admin/materials-stats')
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    document.getElementById('totalMaterials').innerText = data.totalMaterials || 0;
                    document.getElementById('activeMaterials').innerText = data.activeMaterials || 0;
                    document.getElementById('inactiveMaterials').innerText = data.inactiveMaterials || 0;
                    document.getElementById('configuredPrices').innerText = data.configuredPrices || 0;
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        // ==================== CHARGEMENT DU TABLEAU ====================
        function loadMaterials(filter, page = 0) {
            currentFilter = filter;
            currentPage = page;

            // Si des filtres avancÃĐs sont actifs, on les utilise Ã  la place du filtre statut
            if (searchKeyword || minCitizen !== null || maxCitizen !== null || minCollector !== null || maxCollector !== null) {
                loadMaterialsWithFilters();
                return;
            }

            let url = `/admin/materials-data?page=${page}&size=${pageSize}`;
            if (filter === 'active') url += '&filter=active';
            else if (filter === 'inactive') url += '&filter=inactive';

            fetch(url)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(pageData => {
                    renderTable(pageData.content);
                    totalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderPagination(pageData);
                })
                .catch(err => {
                    console.error(err);
                    document.getElementById('materialsTableBody').innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur de chargement</td></tr>';
                });
        }

        function loadMaterialsWithFilters() {
            let url = `/admin/materials-data?page=${currentPage}&size=${pageSize}`;
            if (searchKeyword) url += `&keyword=${encodeURIComponent(searchKeyword)}`;
            if (minCitizen !== null) url += `&minCitizenPrice=${minCitizen}`;
            if (maxCitizen !== null) url += `&maxCitizenPrice=${maxCitizen}`;
            if (minCollector !== null) url += `&minCollectorPrice=${minCollector}`;
            if (maxCollector !== null) url += `&maxCollectorPrice=${maxCollector}`;

            fetch(url)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(pageData => {
                    renderTable(pageData.content);
                    totalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                    renderPagination(pageData);
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function renderTable(materials) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('materialsTableBody');
            if (!materials || materials.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-muted">Aucun matÃĐriau trouvÃĐ</td></tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = materials.map(m => `
                <tr>
                    <td>${m.id}</td>
                    <td><strong>${escapeHtml(m.name)}</strong></td>
                    <td>${m.basePricePerKg ? m.basePricePerKg.toFixed(3) + ' DA' : '-'}</td>
                    <td>${m.collectorPricePerKg ? m.collectorPricePerKg.toFixed(3) + ' DA' : '-'}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${m.isActive ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${m.isActive ? 'Actif' : 'Inactif'}</span></td>
                    <td>${formatDate(m.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-info" onclick="viewDetail(${m.id})" title="DÃĐtail"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="editMaterial(${m.id})" title="Modifier"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-warning" onclick="openPriceModal(${m.id})" title="Modifier prix"><i class="fas fa-tag"></i></button>
                            ${m.isActive ?
                                `<button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="toggleActive(${m.id}, false)" title="DÃĐsactiver"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i></button>` :
                                `<button class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="toggleActive(${m.id}, true)" title="Activer"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></button>`
                            }
                            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteMaterial(${m.id})" title="Supprimer"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('paginationNav');
            if (totalPages <= 1) {
                nav.innerHTML = '';
                return;
            }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${currentPage-1}); return false;">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < totalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${i}); return false;">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changePage(${currentPage+1}); return false;">Suivant</a></li>`;
            html += '</ul>';
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function changePage(page) {
            currentPage = page;
            if (searchKeyword || minCitizen !== null || maxCitizen !== null || minCollector !== null || maxCollector !== null) {
                loadMaterialsWithFilters();
            } else {
                loadMaterials(currentFilter, page);
            }
        }

        // ==================== FILTRES AVANCÃS ====================
        function applyFilters() {
            searchKeyword = document.getElementById('searchKeyword').value.trim();
            minCitizen = parseFloat(document.getElementById('minCitizenPrice').value) || null;
            maxCitizen = parseFloat(document.getElementById('maxCitizenPrice').value) || null;
            minCollector = parseFloat(document.getElementById('minCollectorPrice').value) || null;
            maxCollector = parseFloat(document.getElementById('maxCollectorPrice').value) || null;
            currentFilter = 'all'; // on ignore le statut quand on utilise des filtres avancÃĐs
            currentPage = 0;
            loadMaterialsWithFilters();
        }

        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('searchKeyword').value = '';
            document.getElementById('minCitizenPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('maxCitizenPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('minCollectorPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('maxCollectorPrice').value = '';
            searchKeyword = '';
            minCitizen = null;
            maxCitizen = null;
            minCollector = null;
            maxCollector = null;
            currentFilter = 'all';
            currentPage = 0;
            loadMaterials('all', 0);
        }

        function setStatusFilter(filter) {
            resetFilters(); // efface les filtres avancÃĐs quand on change le statut
            loadMaterials(filter, 0);
        }

        // ==================== CRUD ====================
        function openCreateModal() {
            document.getElementById('materialId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('materialForm').reset();
            document.getElementById('materialActive').value = 'true';
            document.getElementById('citizenPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('collectorPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('startDate').value = '';
            document.getElementById('endDate').value = '';
            // Afficher les sections prix et dates
            document.getElementById('priceSection').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('dateSection').style.display = 'block';
            document.querySelector('#createMaterialModal .modal-title').innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-plus-circle me-2"></i>CrÃĐer un matÃĐriau';
            showModal('createMaterialModal');
        }

        function editMaterial(id) {
            fetch(`/admin/material/${id}`)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(m => {
                    document.getElementById('materialId').value = m.id;
                    document.getElementById('materialName').value = m.name;
                    document.getElementById('materialDescription').value = m.description || '';
                    document.getElementById('materialActive').value = m.isActive ? 'true' : 'false';
                    // Masquer les sections prix et dates car on ne les modifie pas ici
                    document.getElementById('priceSection').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('dateSection').style.display = 'none';
                    document.querySelector('#createMaterialModal .modal-title').innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-edit me-2"></i>Modifier le matÃĐriau';
                    showModal('createMaterialModal');
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function saveMaterial() {
            const id = document.getElementById('materialId').value;
            const name = document.getElementById('materialName').value;
            const description = document.getElementById('materialDescription').value;
            const isActive = document.getElementById('materialActive').value === 'true';

            if (!name) {
                alert('Le nom est obligatoire');
                return;
            }

            if (id === '') {
                // CRÃATION
                const citizenPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('citizenPrice').value);
                const collectorPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('collectorPrice').value);
                if (isNaN(citizenPrice) || isNaN(collectorPrice)) {
                    alert('Les prix sont obligatoires pour la crÃĐation');
                    return;
                }
                const startDate = document.getElementById('startDate').value;
                const endDate = document.getElementById('endDate').value;

                const request = {
                    name: name,
                    description: description,
                    isActive: isActive,
                    citizenPricePerKg: citizenPrice,
                    collectorPricePerKg: collectorPrice,
                    startDate: startDate ? new Date(startDate).toISOString() : null,
                    endDate: endDate ? new Date(endDate).toISOString() : null
                };
                fetch('/admin/material-create', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(request)
                })
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    if (data.success) {
                        hideModal('createMaterialModal');
                        loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                        loadStats();
                    } else {
                        alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'CrÃĐation ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                    }
                })
                .catch(err => alert(err));
            } else {
                // MODIFICATION (uniquement nom, description, actif)
                const request = { name: name, description: description, isActive: isActive };
                fetch(`/admin/material-update/${id}`, {
                    method: 'PUT',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(request)
                })
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    if (data.success) {
                        hideModal('createMaterialModal');
                        loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                        loadStats();
                    } else {
                        alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Mise Ã  jour ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                    }
                })
                .catch(err => alert(err));
            }
        }

        function openPriceModal(materialId) {
            document.getElementById('priceMaterialId').value = materialId;
            document.getElementById('modalCitizenPrice').value = '';
            document.getElementById('modalCollectorPrice').value = '';
            showModal('priceModal');
        }

        function updatePrice() {
            const id = document.getElementById('priceMaterialId').value;
            const citizenPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('modalCitizenPrice').value);
            const collectorPrice = parseFloat(document.getElementById('modalCollectorPrice').value);
            if (isNaN(citizenPrice) || isNaN(collectorPrice)) {
                alert('Veuillez saisir des prix valides');
                return;
            }
            const request = { citizenPricePerKg: citizenPrice, collectorPricePerKg: collectorPrice };
            fetch(`/admin/material-price/${id}`, {
                method: 'PUT',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(request)
            })
            .then(res => res.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    hideModal('priceModal');
                    loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                    loadStats();
                } else {
                    alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Mise Ã  jour du prix ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                }
            })
            .catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function toggleActive(id, activate) {
            const url = activate ? `/admin/material-activate/${id}` : `/admin/material-deactivate/${id}`;
            fetch(url, { method: 'PUT' })
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    if (data.success) {
                        loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                        loadStats();
                    } else {
                        alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Action ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                    }
                });
        }

        function deleteMaterial(id) {
            if (confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement ce matÃĐriau ? Cette action est irrÃĐversible.')) {
                fetch(`/admin/material-delete/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.success) {
                            loadMaterials(currentFilter, currentPage);
                            loadStats();
                        } else {
                            alert('Erreur: ' + (data.message || 'Suppression ÃĐchouÃĐe'));
                        }
                    });
            }
        }

        function viewDetail(id) {
            fetch(`/admin/material/${id}`)
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(m => {
                    document.getElementById('detailContent').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <strong>ID:</strong> ${m.id}<br>
                                <strong>Nom:</strong> ${escapeHtml(m.name)}<br>
                                <strong>Description:</strong> ${escapeHtml(m.description) || '-'}<br>
                                <strong>Statut:</strong> <span class="badge ${m.isActive ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${m.isActive ? 'Actif' : 'Inactif'}</span><br>
                                <strong>CrÃĐÃĐ le:</strong> ${formatDate(m.createdAt)}<br>
                                <strong># Demandes:</strong> ${m.collectionRequestsCount || 0}<br>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <strong>Prix citoyen (kg):</strong> ${m.basePricePerKg ? m.basePricePerKg.toFixed(3) + ' DA' : '-'}<br>
                                <strong>Prix collecteur (kg):</strong> ${m.collectorPricePerKg ? m.collectorPricePerKg.toFixed(3) + ' DA' : '-'}<br>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    showModal('detailModal');
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        // Initialisation
        loadStats();
        loadMaterials('all', 0);
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

    <style>
        .stat-card { transition: transform 0.2s; cursor: default; }
        .stat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); }
    </style>

<body th:replace="~{/admin/layout}">

<div th:fragment="sidebarLinks">
    <a th:href="@{/admin/dashboard}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i> Dashboard</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/users}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Utilisateurs</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/collectors}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Collecteurs</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/materials}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-recycle"></i> MatÃĐriaux</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/challenges}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i> DÃĐfis</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/supervision}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Supervision</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/notifications}" class="sidebar-link active"><i class="fas fa-bell"></i> Notifications</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/anomalies}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> Anomalies</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/support}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-headset"></i> Support</a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/machines}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-microchip"></i> <span>Machines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/centers}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fa fa-industry"></i> <span>Usines</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/cancellations}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i> <span>Annulations abusives</span></a>
</div>

<div th:fragment="content">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h1 class="h3 fw-bold">Notifications</h1>
    </div>

    <!-- Statistiques -->
    <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-light"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Total envoyÃĐes</h6><h3 id="totalNotifications">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-primary bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Clients</h6><h3 id="totalClients">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-warning bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>Collecteurs</h6><h3 id="totalCollectors">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-info bg-opacity-25"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6>EmployÃĐs usine</h6><h3 id="totalFactoryUsers">-</h3></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Onglets -->
    <ul class="nav nav-tabs mb-3">
        <li class="nav-item"><button class="nav-link active" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#sendTab">Envoyer</button></li>
        <li class="nav-item"><button class="nav-link" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#historyTab">Historique</button></li>
    </ul>

    <div class="tab-content">
        <!-- Envoyer -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="sendTab">
            <div class="card shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">Envoyer une notification</div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Titre</label><input type="text" id="notifTitle" class="form-control"></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Message</label><textarea id="notifMessage" rows="3" class="form-control"></textarea></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Type</label><select id="notifType" class="form-select"><option value="INFO">INFO</option><option value="WARNING">WARNING</option><option value="SUCCESS">SUCCESS</option><option value="ERROR">ERROR</option></select></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Cible</label>
                        <div class="form-check"><input type="radio" name="targetType" value="role" checked> Par rÃīle</div>
                        <div class="form-check"><input type="radio" name="targetType" value="users"> Par utilisateurs (IDs)</div>
                    </div>
                    <div id="roleTargetDiv"><label>RÃīle</label><select id="targetRole" class="form-select"><option value="CLIENT">Client</option><option value="COLLECTOR">Collecteur</option></select></div>
                    <div id="usersTargetDiv" style="display:none"><label>IDs utilisateurs (sÃĐparÃĐs par virgule)</label><input type="text" id="targetUserIds" class="form-control" placeholder="1,2,3"></div>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary mt-3" onclick="sendNotification()">Envoyer</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Historique -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade" id="historyTab">
            <div class="card shadow-sm">
                <div class="card-header">Filtres</div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row"><div class="col-md-4"><label>Type</label><select id="historyType" class="form-select"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="INFO">INFO</option><option value="WARNING">WARNING</option><option value="SUCCESS">SUCCESS</option><option value="ERROR">ERROR</option></select></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4"><label>ID utilisateur</label><input type="number" id="historyAccountId" class="form-control"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-4"><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="loadHistory()">Filtrer</button><button class="btn btn-secondary ms-2" onclick="resetHistoryFilters()">Reset</button></div></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card shadow-sm mt-3"><div class="card-body p-0"><div class="table-responsive"><table class="table"><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Titre</th><th>Type</th><th>Lu</th><th>Date</th></tr></thead><tbody id="historyTableBody"></tbody></table></div></div>
                <div class="card-footer"><nav id="historyPagination"></nav></div>

    <script th:inline="javascript">
        let historyPage = 0;

        // ==========================
        // TOGGLE ROLE / USERS
        // ==========================

        function toggleTargetDivs() {

            const selected =
                document.querySelector(
                    'input[name="targetType"]:checked'
                )?.value;

            const roleDiv =
                document.getElementById(
                    "roleTargetDiv"
                );

            const usersDiv =
                document.getElementById(
                    "usersTargetDiv"
                );

            if (!roleDiv || !usersDiv)
                return;

            if (selected === "role") {

                roleDiv.style.display =
                    "block";

                usersDiv.style.display =
                    "none";

            } else {

                roleDiv.style.display =
                    "none";

                usersDiv.style.display =
                    "block";
            }
        }

        // rendre globale
        window.toggleTargetDivs =
            toggleTargetDivs;

        // ==========================
        // SEND NOTIFICATION
        // ==========================

        window.sendNotification =
            async function () {

            try {

                const title =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "notifTitle"
                        )
                        .value
                        .trim();

                const message =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "notifMessage"
                        )
                        .value
                        .trim();

                const type =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "notifType"
                        )
                        .value;

                if (
                    !title ||
                    !message
                ) {

                    alert(
                        "Veuillez remplir tous les champs."
                    );

                    return;
                }

                const selectedTarget =
                    document.querySelector(
                        'input[name="targetType"]:checked'
                    )?.value;

                const body = {
                    title,
                    message,
                    type
                };

                let endpoint = "";

                // ======================
                // ROLE
                // ======================

                if (
                    selectedTarget
                    === "role"
                ) {

                    const role =
                        document
                            .getElementById(
                                "targetRole"
                            )
                            .value;

                    if (!role) {

                        alert(
                            "Veuillez choisir un rÃīle."
                        );

                        return;
                    }

                    body.targetRole =
                        role;

                    endpoint =
                        "/admin/notifications/broadcast";
                }

                // ======================
                // USERS IDS
                // ======================

                else {

                    const idsInput =
                        document
                            .getElementById(
                                "targetUserIds"
                            )
                            .value;

                    const ids =
                        idsInput
                            .split(",")

                            .map(id =>
                                parseInt(
                                    id.trim()
                                )
                            )

                            .filter(id =>
                                !isNaN(id)
                            );

                    if (
                        ids.length === 0
                    ) {

                        alert(
                            "Veuillez entrer au moins un ID."
                        );

                        return;
                    }

                    body.targetAccountIds =
                        ids;

                    endpoint =
                        "/admin/notifications/send";
                }

                const response =
                    await fetch(
                        endpoint,
                        {
                            method:
                                "POST",

                            headers: {
                                "Content-Type":
                                    "application/json"
                            },

                            body:
                                JSON.stringify(
                                    body
                                )
                        }
                    );

                const result =
                    await response
                        .json();

                if (
                    !response.ok
                ) {

                    throw new Error(
                        result.message ||
                        "Erreur lors de l'envoi"
                    );
                }

                alert(
                    result.message
                    ||
                    "Notification envoyÃĐe avec succÃĻs."
                );

                // reset formulaire

                document
                    .getElementById(
                        "notifTitle"
                    )
                    .value = "";

                document
                    .getElementById(
                        "notifMessage"
                    )
                    .value = "";

                document
                    .getElementById(
                        "targetUserIds"
                    )
                    .value = "";

                document
                    .querySelector(
                        'input[value="role"]'
                    )
                    .checked = true;

                toggleTargetDivs();

                loadHistory();

            } catch (
                error
            ) {

                console.error(
                    "Erreur notification:",
                    error
                );

                alert(
                    error.message
                );
            }
        };

        // ==========================
        // LOAD HISTORY
        // ==========================

        window.loadHistory =
            async function () {

            try {

                let url =
                    `/admin/notifications-history?page=${historyPage}&size=10`;

                const type =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "historyType"
                        )?.value;

                const accountId =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "historyAccountId"
                        )?.value;

                if (type) {
                    url +=
                        `&type=${type}`;
                }

                if (accountId) {
                    url +=
                        `&accountId=${accountId}`;
                }

                const response =
                    await fetch(
                        url
                    );

                if (
                    !response.ok
                ) {

                    throw new Error(
                        `Erreur ${response.status}`
                    );
                }

                const result =
                    await response
                        .json();

                const list =
                    result.content;

                const tbody =
                    document
                        .getElementById(
                            "historyTableBody"
                        );

                tbody.innerHTML =
                    "";

                if (
                    !list ||
                    list.length === 0
                ) {

                    tbody.innerHTML =
                        `
                        <tr>
                            <td colspan="5"
                                class="text-center text-muted">
                                Aucune notification
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    `;

                    return;
                }

                list.forEach(
                    n => {

                    tbody.innerHTML +=
                    `
                    <tr>
                        <td>${n.id}</td>
                        <td>${n.title}</td>
                        <td>
                            <span class="badge bg-secondary">
                                ${n.type}
                            </span>
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            ${n.isRead
                                ? '<span class="badge bg-success">Lu</span>'
                                : '<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Non lu</span>'}
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            ${new Date(
                                n.createdAt
                            ).toLocaleString(
                                "fr-FR"
                            )}
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    `;
                });

            } catch (
                error
            ) {

                console.error(
                    "Erreur historique:",
                    error
                );

                const tbody =
                    document.getElementById(
                        "historyTableBody"
                    );

                if (tbody) {

                    tbody.innerHTML =
                    `
                    <tr>
                        <td colspan="5"
                            class="text-center text-danger">
                            Erreur chargement historique
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    `;
                }
            }
        };

        // ==========================
        // RESET FILTERS
        // ==========================

        window.resetHistoryFilters =
            function () {

            document
                .getElementById(
                    "historyType"
                )
                .value = "";

            document
                .getElementById(
                    "historyAccountId"
                )
                .value = "";

            historyPage = 0;

            loadHistory();
        };

        // ==========================
        // INIT PAGE
        // ==========================

        document
            .addEventListener(
            "DOMContentLoaded",

            function () {

                document
                    .querySelectorAll(
                        'input[name="targetType"]'
                    )

                    .forEach(
                        radio => {

                        radio
                            .addEventListener(
                                "change",

                                toggleTargetDivs
                            );
                    });

                toggleTargetDivs();

                loadHistory();
            }
        );
    </script>
</div>

</body>
</html>

        .badge-validated { background-color: #198754; }
        .badge-adjusted { background-color: #fd7e14; }
        .badge-refused { background-color: #dc3545; }
        .image-thumb { max-height: 60px; max-width: 80px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; transition: transform 0.2s; object-fit: cover; }
        .image-thumb:hover { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }
        .table-image-cell { text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; }
    </style>

<body th:replace="~{/admin/layout}">

<div th:fragment="sidebarLinks">
    <a th:href="@{/admin/dashboard}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i> <span>Dashboard</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/users}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> <span>Utilisateurs</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/collectors}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> <span>Collecteurs</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/materials}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-recycle"></i> <span>MatÃĐriaux</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/challenges}" class="sidebar-link"><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i> <span>DÃĐfis</span></a>
    <a th:href="@{/admin/supervision}" class="sidebar-link active"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> <span>Supervision</span></a>

        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-warning bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">En attente</h6><h3 id="pendingRequests">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-danger bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">Litiges</h6><h3 id="disputedRequests">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-info bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">En attente validation usine</h6><h3 id="pendingValidation">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-success bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">ValidÃĐes</h6><h3 id="validatedDeliveries">-</h3></div></div></div>
        <div class="col-md-3"><div class="card stat-card bg-secondary bg-opacity-25 border-0 shadow-sm"><div class="card-body text-center"><h6 class="text-muted">RefusÃĐes</h6><h3 id="refusedDeliveries">-</h3></div></div></div>
    </div>

        <li class="nav-item"><button class="nav-link" id="disputes-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#disputes">Litiges</button></li>

    <div class="tab-content">
        <!-- ==================== ONGLET DEMANDES ==================== -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="requests">

                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Statut</label><select id="filterStatus" class="form-select"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="PENDING">En attente</option><option value="ACCEPTED">AcceptÃĐe</option><option value="COLLECTED">CollectÃĐe</option><option value="DELIVERED">LivrÃĐe</option><option value="CANCELLED">AnnulÃĐe</option></select></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Client ID</label><input type="number" id="filterClientId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID client"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Collecteur ID</label><input type="number" id="filterCollectorId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID collecteur"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>MatÃĐriau ID</label><input type="number" id="filterMaterialId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID matÃĐriau"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Date dÃĐbut</label><input type="datetime-local" id="filterStartDate" class="form-control"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-2"><label>Date fin</label><input type="datetime-local" id="filterEndDate" class="form-control"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-12"><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="applyFilters()">Filtrer</button><button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="resetFilters()">RÃĐinitialiser</button></div>

                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm">

                            </thead>
                            <tbody id="requestsTableBody"><tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center py-4">Chargement...</td></tr></tbody>

                            </thead>
                            <tbody id="disputesTableBody"><tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center py-4">Chargement...</td></tr></tbody>
                        </table>

                <div class="card-footer bg-white"><nav id="disputesPagination"></nav></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ==================== ONGLET VALIDATIONS USINE ==================== -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade" id="validations">
            <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm mb-3">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>Statut livraison</label><select id="deliveryStatusFilter" class="form-select"><option value="">Tous</option><option value="PENDING">En attente</option><option value="VALIDATED">ValidÃĐe</option><option value="ADJUSTED">AjustÃĐe</option><option value="REFUSED">RefusÃĐe</option><option value="PROCESSING">En traitement</option><option value="COMPLETED">TerminÃĐe</option></select></div>
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>Client ID</label><input type="number" id="valClientId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID client"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>Collecteur ID</label><input type="number" id="valCollectorId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID collecteur"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-3"><label>MatÃĐriau ID</label><input type="number" id="valMaterialId" class="form-control" placeholder="ID matÃĐriau"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-12"><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="applyValFilters()">Filtrer</button><button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="resetValFilters()">RÃĐinitialiser</button></div>

    <!-- MODAL DÃTAIL DEMANDE -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="detailModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog modal-xl">
            <div class="modal-content">
                <div class="modal-header bg-secondary text-white"><h5 class="modal-title">DÃĐtail de la demande</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
                <div class="modal-body" id="detailContent">Chargement...</div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Fermer</button>

                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-warning" id="reassignBtn" style="display:none" onclick="openReassignModal()">RÃĐassigner</button>
                </div>

        </div>
