    <!-- MODAL ANNULATION FORCÃE -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="forceCancelModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog"><div class="modal-content"><div class="modal-header bg-danger text-white"><h5 class="modal-title">Annulation forcÃĐe</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
            <div class="modal-body"><input type="hidden" id="cancelRequestId"><p>Ãtes-vous sÃŧr de vouloir annuler cette demande ? Cette action est irrÃĐversible.</p></div>
            <div class="modal-footer"><button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" onclick="confirmForceCancel()">Confirmer l'annulation</button></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL RÃASSIGNATION -->
    <div class="modal fade" id="reassignModal" tabindex="-1">
        <div class="modal-dialog"><div class="modal-content"><div class="modal-header bg-warning text-dark"><h5 class="modal-title">RÃĐassigner Ã  un collecteur</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
            <div class="modal-body"><input type="hidden" id="reassignRequestId"><div class="mb-3"><label class="form-label">Nouveau collecteur ID *</label><input type="number" id="newCollectorId" class="form-control" required></div></div>
            <div class="modal-footer"><button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-warning" onclick="confirmReassign()">RÃĐassigner</button></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let requestsPage = 0, requestsTotalPages = 0, requestsFilter = {};
        let disputesPage = 0, disputesTotalPages = 0;
        let validationsPage = 0, validationsTotalPages = 0, valFilters = {};

        // Statistiques
        function loadStats() {
            fetch('/admin/supervision-stats').then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{
                document.getElementById('totalRequests').innerText = data.totalRequests || 0;
                document.getElementById('pendingRequests').innerText = data.pendingRequests || 0;
                document.getElementById('disputedRequests').innerText = data.disputedRequests || 0;
                document.getElementById('pendingValidation').innerText = data.collectionsPendingValidation || 0;
                document.getElementById('validatedDeliveries').innerText = data.validatedDeliveries || 0;
                document.getElementById('refusedDeliveries').innerText = data.refusedDeliveries || 0;
            }).catch(err=>console.error('Stats error:',err));
        }

        // ---------- REQUESTS ----------
        function applyFilters() {
            requestsFilter = {
                status: document.getElementById('filterStatus').value,
                clientId: document.getElementById('filterClientId').value,
                collectorId: document.getElementById('filterCollectorId').value,
                materialId: document.getElementById('filterMaterialId').value,
                startDate: document.getElementById('filterStartDate').value,
                endDate: document.getElementById('filterEndDate').value
            };
            requestsPage = 0;
            loadRequests();
        }
        function resetFilters() {
            document.getElementById('filterStatus').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterClientId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterCollectorId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterMaterialId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterStartDate').value = '';
            document.getElementById('filterEndDate').value = '';
            requestsFilter = {};
            requestsPage = 0;
            loadRequests();
        }
        function loadRequests() {
            let url = `/admin/supervision-requests?page=${requestsPage}&size=20`;
            if (requestsFilter.status) url += `&status=${requestsFilter.status}`;
            if (requestsFilter.clientId) url += `&clientId=${requestsFilter.clientId}`;
            if (requestsFilter.collectorId) url += `&collectorId=${requestsFilter.collectorId}`;
            if (requestsFilter.materialId) url += `&materialId=${requestsFilter.materialId}`;
            if (requestsFilter.startDate) url += `&startDate=${encodeURIComponent(requestsFilter.startDate)}`;
            if (requestsFilter.endDate) url += `&endDate=${encodeURIComponent(requestsFilter.endDate)}`;
            fetch(url).then(res=>res.json()).then(pageData=>{
                renderRequestsTable(pageData.content);
                requestsTotalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                renderRequestsPagination(pageData);
            }).catch(err=>console.error('Requests error:',err));
        }
        function renderRequestsTable(requests) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('requestsTableBody');
            if(!requests||!requests.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center">Aucune demande</td></tr>';return;}
            tbody.innerHTML = requests.map(r=>`<tr>
                <td>${r.requestId}</td>
                <td><span class="badge ${getStatusBadgeClass(r.status)}">${r.status}</span></td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(r.clientFullName)}<br><small>#${r.clientId}</small></td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(r.materialName)||'-'}</td>
                <td>${r.estimatedQuantity} kg</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(r.collectorFullName)||'-'}<br><small>#${r.collectorId||'-'}</small></td>
                <td>${formatDate(r.createdAt)}</td>
                <td><button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" onclick="viewDetail(${r.requestId})"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> DÃĐtail</button></td>
            </tr>`).join('');
        }
        function getStatusBadgeClass(s){const m={'PENDING':'bg-warning text-dark','ACCEPTED':'bg-primary','COLLECTED':'bg-success','DELIVERED':'bg-info text-dark','CANCELLED':'bg-secondary'};return m[s]||'bg-secondary';}
        function renderRequestsPagination(pd){
            const nav=document.getElementById('requestsPagination');
            if(requestsTotalPages<=1){nav.innerHTML='';return;}
            let html='<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.first?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeRequestsPage(${requestsPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for(let i=0;i<requestsTotalPages;i++)html+=`<li class="page-item ${i===requestsPage?'active':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeRequestsPage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.last?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeRequestsPage(${requestsPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML=html;
        }
        function changeRequestsPage(p){if(p<0)p=0;requestsPage=p;loadRequests();}

        // ---------- DISPUTES ----------
        function loadDisputes() {
            fetch(`/admin/supervision-disputes?page=${disputesPage}&size=20`).then(res=>res.json()).then(pageData=>{
                renderDisputesTable(pageData.content);
                disputesTotalPages=pageData.totalPages;
                renderDisputesPagination(pageData);
            }).catch(err=>console.error('Disputes error:',err));
        }
        function renderDisputesTable(disputes){
            const tbody=document.getElementById('disputesTableBody');
            if(!disputes||!disputes.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="8">Aucun litige</td></tr>';return;}
            tbody.innerHTML=disputes.map(d=>`<tr>
                <td>${d.requestId}</td>
                <td><span class="badge ${getStatusBadgeClass(d.requestStatus)}">${d.requestStatus}</span></td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(d.clientFullName)}</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(d.collectorFullName)||'-'}</td>
                <td>${d.estimatedAmount} DA</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(d.disputeReason)}</td>
                <td>${d.relatedTicketId?`<a href="#" onclick="viewTicket(${d.relatedTicketId})">#${d.relatedTicketId}</a>`:'-'}</td>
                <td>${formatDate(d.createdAt)}</td>
            </tr>`).join('');
        }
        function renderDisputesPagination(pd){
            const nav=document.getElementById('disputesPagination');
            if(disputesTotalPages<=1){nav.innerHTML='';return;}
            let html='<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.first?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeDisputesPage(${disputesPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for(let i=0;i<disputesTotalPages;i++)html+=`<li class="page-item ${i===disputesPage?'active':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeDisputesPage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.last?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeDisputesPage(${disputesPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML=html;
        }
        function changeDisputesPage(p){if(p<0)p=0;disputesPage=p;loadDisputes();}

        // ---------- VALIDATIONS USINE (avec photo, dÃĐtails et usine) ----------
        function applyValFilters() {
            valFilters = {
                status: document.getElementById('deliveryStatusFilter').value,
                clientId: document.getElementById('valClientId').value,
                collectorId: document.getElementById('valCollectorId').value,
                materialId: document.getElementById('valMaterialId').value
            };
            validationsPage = 0;
            loadValidations();
        }
        function resetValFilters() {
            document.getElementById('deliveryStatusFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('valClientId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('valCollectorId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('valMaterialId').value = '';
            valFilters = {};
            validationsPage = 0;
            loadValidations();
        }
        function loadValidations() {
            let url = `/admin/supervision/deliveries?page=${validationsPage}&size=20`;
            if (valFilters.status) url += `&status=${valFilters.status}`;
            if (valFilters.clientId) url += `&clientId=${valFilters.clientId}`;
            if (valFilters.collectorId) url += `&collectorId=${valFilters.collectorId}`;
            if (valFilters.materialId) url += `&materialId=${valFilters.materialId}`;
            fetch(url).then(res=>res.json()).then(pageData=>{
                renderValidationsTable(pageData.content);
                validationsTotalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                renderValidationsPagination(pageData);
            }).catch(err=>console.error('Validations error:',err));
        }
        function renderValidationsTable(deliveries){
            const tbody = document.getElementById('validationsTableBody');
            if(!deliveries||!deliveries.length){tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="13" class="text-center">Aucune livraison</td></tr>';return;}
            tbody.innerHTML = deliveries.map(d=>{
                let statusBadge = '';
                if(d.status==='VALIDATED') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-success">ValidÃĐe</span>';
                else if(d.status==='ADJUSTED') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">AjustÃĐe</span>';
                else if(d.status==='REFUSED') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-danger">RefusÃĐe</span>';
                else if(d.status==='PENDING') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-secondary">En attente</span>';
                else if(d.status==='PROCESSING') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-info">En traitement</span>';
                else if(d.status==='COMPLETED') statusBadge='<span class="badge bg-success">TerminÃĐe</span>';
                else statusBadge=`<span class="badge bg-secondary">${d.status}</span>`;
                const adjOrRej = d.adjustmentNote ? d.adjustmentNote : (d.rejectionReason ? d.rejectionReason : '-');
                let photoHtml = '-';
                if(d.wastePhoto) {
                    let photoUrl = d.wastePhoto;
                    if(!photoUrl.startsWith('http') && !photoUrl.startsWith('/')) photoUrl = '/' + photoUrl;
                    photoHtml = `<img src="${photoUrl}" class="image-thumb" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); window.open('${photoUrl}')" style="cursor:pointer;" title="Agrandir la photo">`;
                }
                return `<tr>
                    <td>${d.deliveryId}</td>
                    <td>#${d.collectionId}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.clientName)}<br><small>#${d.clientId}</small></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.collectorName)||'-'}<br><small>#${d.collectorId||'-'}</small></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.materialName)||'-'}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.recyclingCenterName)||'-'}</td>
                    <td>${d.declaredWeight} kg</td>
                    <td>${d.validatedWeight ? d.validatedWeight+' kg' : '-'}</td>
                    <td>${statusBadge}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(adjOrRej)}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(d.validatedByName)||'-'}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(d.validatedAt)}</td>
                    <td><button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" onclick="viewDetailFromCollectionId(${d.collectionId})"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> DÃĐtail</button></td>
                </tr>`;
            }).join('');
        }
        function renderValidationsPagination(pd){
            const nav=document.getElementById('validationsPagination');
            if(validationsTotalPages<=1){nav.innerHTML='';return;}
            let html='<ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-0">';
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.first?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeValidationsPage(${validationsPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for(let i=0;i<validationsTotalPages;i++)html+=`<li class="page-item ${i===validationsPage?'active':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeValidationsPage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            html+=`<li class="page-item ${pd.last?'disabled':''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeValidationsPage(${validationsPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML=html;
        }
        function changeValidationsPage(p){if(p<0)p=0;validationsPage=p;loadValidations();}

        // ---------- DÃTAIL DEMANDE ----------
        let currentRequestId = null;
        function viewDetail(requestId) {
            currentRequestId = requestId;
            fetch(`/admin/supervision-request/${requestId}`)
                .then(res => { if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`); return res.json(); })
                .then(detail => {
                    document.getElementById('detailContent').innerHTML = generateDetailHtml(detail);
                    const canCancel = (detail.requestStatus !== 'CANCELLED' && detail.requestStatus !== 'COLLECTED' && detail.requestStatus !== 'DELIVERED');
                    const canReassign = (detail.requestStatus === 'PENDING' || detail.requestStatus === 'ACCEPTED') && !detail.collectionId;
                    document.getElementById('forceCancelBtn').style.display = canCancel ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                    document.getElementById('reassignBtn').style.display = canReassign ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                    showModal('detailModal');
                })
                .catch(err => {
                    console.error('Erreur chargement dÃĐtail:', err);
                    document.getElementById('detailContent').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Impossible de charger les dÃĐtails de la demande #${requestId}.</div>`;
                    showModal('detailModal');
                });
        }

        function viewDetailFromCollectionId(collectionId) {
            fetch('/admin/supervision-requests?size=1000')
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(page => {
                    const found = page.content.find(req => req.collectionId === collectionId);
                    if (found) viewDetail(found.requestId);
                    else alert(`Aucune demande trouvÃĐe pour la collecte #${collectionId}`);
                })
                .catch(err => {
                    console.error('Erreur recherche collection->request:', err);
                    alert(`Erreur lors de la recherche de la demande associÃĐe Ã  la collecte #${collectionId}`);
                });
        }

        function generateDetailHtml(d) {
            const buildImageUrl = (url) => {
                if (!url) return null;
                if (url.startsWith('http')) return url;
                if (url.startsWith('/')) return url;
                return '/' + url;
            };
            const wasteImage = buildImageUrl(d.wasteImageUrl);
            return `
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <strong>ID demande:</strong> ${d.requestId}<br>
                    <strong>Statut:</strong> ${d.requestStatus}<br>
                    <strong>Client:</strong> ${escapeHtml(d.clientFullName)} (${escapeHtml(d.clientEmail)})<br>
                    <strong>Adresse:</strong> ${escapeHtml(d.clientAddress)}<br>
                    <strong>MatÃĐriau:</strong> ${d.materialName}<br>
                    <strong>QuantitÃĐ estimÃĐe:</strong> ${d.estimatedQuantity} kg<br>
                    <strong>Montant estimÃĐ:</strong> ${d.estimatedAmount} DA<br>
                    <strong>Prix collecteur:</strong> ${d.collectorPrice} DA<br>
                    <strong>Classification IA:</strong> MatÃĐriau prÃĐdit: ${d.predictedMaterialId}, Poids: ${d.predictedWeight} kg, Score: ${d.confidenceScore}<br>
                    <strong>ValidÃĐ IA:</strong> ${d.aiValidated ? 'Oui' : 'Non'}
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <strong>Collecteur:</strong> ${escapeHtml(d.collectorFullName)}<br>
                    <strong>Collecte ID:</strong> ${d.collectionId}<br>
                    <strong>QuantitÃĐ rÃĐelle:</strong> ${d.realQuantity} kg<br>
                    <strong>Total payÃĐ:</strong> ${d.totalAmount} DA<br>
                    <strong>Livraison:</strong> ${d.deliveryStatus}<br>
                    <strong>Validation usine:</strong> Poids validÃĐ: ${d.validatedWeight} kg, Note: ${escapeHtml(d.adjustmentNote)}<br>
                    <strong>Litige:</strong> ${d.hasOpenTicket ? 'Ticket ouvert' : 'Non'}
                </div>
            </div>
            <hr>
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-md-12 text-center">
                    <strong>Photo des dÃĐchets (client)</strong><br>
                    ${wasteImage ? `<img src="${wasteImage}" class="image-thumb" style="max-height:200px; cursor:pointer;" onclick="window.open('${wasteImage}')">` : '<span class="text-muted">Non disponible</span>'}
                </div>
            </div>`;
        }

        // Annulation forcÃĐe et rÃĐassignation
        function openForceCancelModal(){document.getElementById('cancelRequestId').value=currentRequestId;showModal('forceCancelModal');}
        function confirmForceCancel(){
            const id=document.getElementById('cancelRequestId').value;
            fetch(`/admin/supervision-request/${id}/force-cancel`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({reason:"Annulation forcÃĐe par l'administrateur"})})
            .then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{if(data.success){hideModal('forceCancelModal');hideModal('detailModal');loadRequests();loadStats();alert('Demande annulÃĐe');}else alert('Erreur: '+data.message);})
            .catch(err=>alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'));
        }
        function openReassignModal(){document.getElementById('reassignRequestId').value=currentRequestId;document.getElementById('newCollectorId').value='';showModal('reassignModal');}
        function confirmReassign(){
            const id=document.getElementById('reassignRequestId').value;
            const collectorId=document.getElementById('newCollectorId').value;
            if(!collectorId){alert('ID collecteur requis');return;}
            fetch(`/admin/supervision-request/${id}/reassign`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({collectorId:parseInt(collectorId)})})
            .then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{if(data.success){hideModal('reassignModal');hideModal('detailModal');loadRequests();loadStats();alert('Demande rÃĐassignÃĐe');}else alert('Erreur: '+data.message);})
            .catch(err=>alert('Erreur rÃĐseau'));
        }
        function viewTicket(ticketId){window.location.href=`/admin/support?ticketId=${ticketId}`;}
        function showModal(id){new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show();}
        function hideModal(id){const m=bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id));if(m)m.hide();}
        function escapeHtml(s){if(!s)return '';return s.replace(/[&<>]/g,m=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;'}[m]));}
        function formatDate(d){if(!d)return '-';return new Date(d).toLocaleString('fr-FR');}

        // Initialisation
        loadStats(); loadRequests(); loadDisputes(); loadValidations();
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

                <div class="modal-body" id="ticketDetailContent">Chargement...</div>

        <div class="modal-dialog"><div class="modal-content"><div class="modal-header bg-info text-white"><h5 class="modal-title">RÃĐpondre au ticket</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
            <div class="modal-body"><input type="hidden" id="respondTicketId"><textarea id="responseMessage" class="form-control" rows="5" placeholder="Votre rÃĐponse..."></textarea></div>
            <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="sendResponse()">Envoyer</button></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL ASSIGNATION -->

        <div class="modal-dialog"><div class="modal-content"><div class="modal-header bg-success text-white"><h5 class="modal-title">Assigner Ã  un employÃĐ</h5><button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button></div>
            <div class="modal-body"><input type="hidden" id="assignTicketId"><label>ID FactoryUser</label><input type="number" id="assignedToId" class="form-control" required></div>
            <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button><button class="btn btn-success" onclick="confirmAssign()">Assigner</button></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL FAQ -->

                <div class="modal-body">
                    <input type="hidden" id="faqId">
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>Question *</label><input type="text" id="faqQuestion" class="form-control" required></div>
                    <div class="mb-3"><label>RÃĐponse *</label><textarea id="faqAnswer" rows="5" class="form-control" required></textarea></div>
                    <div class="row"><div class="col-md-6 mb-3"><label>RÃīle cible *</label><select id="faqRoleType" class="form-select"><option value="CITIZEN">Citoyen</option><option value="COLLECTOR">Collecteur</option><option value="ALL">Tous</option></select></div>
                        <div class="col-md-6 mb-3"><label>Statut</label><select id="faqStatus" class="form-select"><option value="ACTIVE">Actif</option><option value="INACTIVE">Inactif</option></select></div></div>
                    <div class="row"><div class="col-md-6 mb-3"><label>CatÃĐgorie (clÃĐ) *</label><input type="text" id="faqCategoryKey" class="form-control" placeholder="ex: paiement_points" required></div>
                        <div class="col-md-6 mb-3"><label>LibellÃĐ catÃĐgorie *</label><input type="text" id="faqCategoryLabel" class="form-control" placeholder="ex: Paiement & Points" required></div></div>
                    <div class="row"><div class="col-md-6 mb-3"><label>Ordre d'affichage</label><input type="number" id="faqDisplayOrder" class="form-control" value="0"></div>
                        <div class="col-md-6 mb-3"><label>ID crÃĐateur (optionnel)</label><input type="number" id="faqCreatedById" class="form-control"></div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Annuler</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveFaq()">Enregistrer</button></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // Tickets
        let ticketsPage = 0, ticketsTotalPages = 0;
        let ticketFilters = { status: '', roleType: '', accountId: '' };

        function applyTicketFilters() {
            ticketFilters = {
                status: document.getElementById('ticketStatusFilter').value,
                roleType: document.getElementById('ticketRoleFilter').value,
                accountId: document.getElementById('ticketAccountFilter').value
            };
            ticketsPage = 0;
            loadTickets();
        }

        function resetTicketFilters() {
            document.getElementById('ticketStatusFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('ticketRoleFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('ticketAccountFilter').value = '';
            ticketFilters = { status: '', roleType: '', accountId: '' };
            ticketsPage = 0;
            loadTickets();
        }

        function loadTickets() {
            let url = `/admin/support-tickets?page=${ticketsPage}&size=20`;
            if (ticketFilters.status) url += `&status=${ticketFilters.status}`;
            if (ticketFilters.roleType) url += `&roleType=${ticketFilters.roleType}`;
            if (ticketFilters.accountId) url += `&accountId=${ticketFilters.accountId}`;
            fetch(url).then(res => res.json()).then(pageData => {
                renderTicketsTable(pageData.content);
                ticketsTotalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                renderTicketsPagination(pageData);
            }).catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function renderTicketsTable(tickets) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('ticketsTableBody');
            if (!tickets || !tickets.length) { tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center">Aucun ticket</td></tr>'; return; }
            tbody.innerHTML = tickets.map(t => `<tr>
                <td>${t.id}</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(t.subject)}</td>
                <td>${t.roleType || '-'}</td>
                <td><span class="badge ${t.status === 'OPEN' ? 'bg-danger' : (t.status === 'IN_PROGRESS' ? 'bg-warning text-dark' : 'bg-success')}">${t.status}</span></td>
                <td>${formatDate(t.createdAt)}</td>
                <td><button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" onclick="viewTicket(${t.id})"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> DÃĐtail</button></td>
            </tr>`).join('');
        }

        function renderTicketsPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('ticketsPagination');
            if (ticketsTotalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeTicketsPage(${ticketsPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < ticketsTotalPages; i++) html += `<li class="page-item ${i === ticketsPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeTicketsPage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeTicketsPage(${ticketsPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function changeTicketsPage(page) { ticketsPage = page; loadTickets(); }

        let currentTicket = null;

        function viewTicket(id) {
            currentTicket = id;
            fetch(`/admin/support-ticket/${id}`).then(res => res.json()).then(t => {
                document.getElementById('ticketDetailContent').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <strong>ID:</strong> ${t.id}<br>
                            <strong>Sujet:</strong> ${escapeHtml(t.subject)}<br>
                            <strong>Statut:</strong> ${t.status}<br>
                            <strong>CrÃĐÃĐ le:</strong> ${formatDate(t.createdAt)}
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <strong>Utilisateur ID:</strong> ${t.accountId || '-'}<br>
                            <strong>AssignÃĐ Ã :</strong> ${t.assignedToId || '-'}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ticket-message mt-2"><strong>Message:</strong><br>${escapeHtml(t.description)}</div>
                    ${t.responseMessage ? `<div class="response-card p-2 mt-2"><strong>RÃĐponse support:</strong><br>${escapeHtml(t.responseMessage)}<br><small>RÃĐpondu le ${formatDate(t.respondedAt)}</small></div>` : ''}
                `;
                document.getElementById('ticketAssignBtn').style.display = (!t.assignedToId && t.status !== 'CLOSED') ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                document.getElementById('ticketRespondBtn').style.display = (t.status !== 'CLOSED') ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                document.getElementById('ticketCloseBtn').style.display = (t.status !== 'CLOSED') ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                document.getElementById('ticketReopenBtn').style.display = (t.status === 'CLOSED') ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
                showModal('ticketModal');
            }).catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function openRespondModal() { document.getElementById('respondTicketId').value = currentTicket; document.getElementById('responseMessage').value = ''; hideModal('ticketModal'); showModal('respondModal'); }

        function sendResponse() {
            const id = document.getElementById('respondTicketId').value;
            const msg = document.getElementById('responseMessage').value;
            if (!msg) { alert('Message requis'); return; }
            fetch(`/admin/support-ticket/${id}/respond`, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ responseMessage: msg })
            }).then(res => res.json()).then(() => {
                hideModal('respondModal');
                loadTickets();
                viewTicket(id);
            }).catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function openAssignModal() { document.getElementById('assignTicketId').value = currentTicket; document.getElementById('assignedToId').value = ''; hideModal('ticketModal'); showModal('assignModal'); }

        function confirmAssign() {
            const id = document.getElementById('assignTicketId').value;
            const assignedToId = parseInt(document.getElementById('assignedToId').value);
            if (!assignedToId) { alert('ID requis'); return; }
            fetch(`/admin/support-ticket/${id}/assign`, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ assignedToId: assignedToId })
            }).then(res => res.json()).then(() => {
                hideModal('assignModal');
                loadTickets();
                viewTicket(id);
            }).catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function closeTicket() {
            if (!confirm('Fermer ce ticket ?')) return;
            fetch(`/admin/support-ticket/${currentTicket}/close`, { method: 'POST' })
                .then(() => { loadTickets(); viewTicket(currentTicket); })
                .catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function reopenTicket() {
            fetch(`/admin/support-ticket/${currentTicket}/reopen`, { method: 'POST' })
                .then(() => { loadTickets(); viewTicket(currentTicket); })
                .catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        // FAQ
        let faqPage = 0, faqTotalPages = 0;
        let faqFilters = { roleType: '', status: '' };

        function applyFaqFilters() {
            faqFilters.roleType = document.getElementById('faqRoleFilter').value;
            faqFilters.status = document.getElementById('faqStatusFilter').value;
            faqPage = 0;
            loadFaqs();
        }

        function resetFaqFilters() {
            document.getElementById('faqRoleFilter').value = '';
            document.getElementById('faqStatusFilter').value = '';
            faqFilters = { roleType: '', status: '' };
            faqPage = 0;
            loadFaqs();
        }

        function loadFaqs() {
            let url = `/admin/support-faqs?page=${faqPage}&size=20`;
            if (faqFilters.roleType) url += `&roleType=${faqFilters.roleType}`;
            if (faqFilters.status) url += `&status=${faqFilters.status}`;
            fetch(url).then(res => res.json()).then(pageData => {
                renderFaqTable(pageData.content);
                faqTotalPages = pageData.totalPages;
                renderFaqPagination(pageData);
            }).catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function renderFaqTable(faqs) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('faqTableBody');
            if (!faqs || !faqs.length) { tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center">Aucune FAQ</td></tr>'; return; }
            tbody.innerHTML = faqs.map(f => `<tr>
                <td>${f.id}</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(f.question)}</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(f.categoryLabel) || '-'}</td>
                <td>${f.roleType || '-'}</td>
                <td>${f.displayOrder || 0}</td>
                <td><span class="badge ${f.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">${f.status}</span></td>
                <td>
                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" onclick="editFaq(${f.id})"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-warning" onclick="toggleFaqStatus(${f.id}, '${f.status}')"><i class="fas fa-power-off"></i></button>
                    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" onclick="deleteFaq(${f.id})"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
                </td>
            </tr>`).join('');
        }

        function renderFaqPagination(pageData) {
            const nav = document.getElementById('faqPagination');
            if (faqTotalPages <= 1) { nav.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeFaqPage(${faqPage-1})">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < faqTotalPages; i++) html += `<li class="page-item ${i === faqPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeFaqPage(${i})">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" onclick="changeFaqPage(${faqPage+1})">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            nav.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function changeFaqPage(page) { faqPage = page; loadFaqs(); }

        function openFaqModal() {
            document.getElementById('faqId').value = '';
            document.getElementById('faqQuestion').value = '';
            document.getElementById('faqAnswer').value = '';
            document.getElementById('faqRoleType').value = 'CITIZEN';
            document.getElementById('faqStatus').value = 'ACTIVE';
            document.getElementById('faqCategoryKey').value = '';
            document.getElementById('faqCategoryLabel').value = '';
            document.getElementById('faqDisplayOrder').value = '0';
            document.getElementById('faqCreatedById').value = '';
            showModal('faqModal');
        }

        function editFaq(id) {
            fetch(`/admin/support-faq/${id}`).then(res => res.json()).then(f => {
                document.getElementById('faqId').value = f.id;
                document.getElementById('faqQuestion').value = f.question;
                document.getElementById('faqAnswer').value = f.answer;
                document.getElementById('faqRoleType').value = f.roleType;
                document.getElementById('faqStatus').value = f.status;
                document.getElementById('faqCategoryKey').value = f.categoryKey;
                document.getElementById('faqCategoryLabel').value = f.categoryLabel;
                document.getElementById('faqDisplayOrder').value = f.displayOrder || 0;
                document.getElementById('faqCreatedById').value = f.createdById || '';
                showModal('faqModal');
            }).catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        function saveFaq() {
            const id = document.getElementById('faqId').value;
            const data = {
                question: document.getElementById('faqQuestion').value,
                answer: document.getElementById('faqAnswer').value,
                roleType: document.getElementById('faqRoleType').value,
                status: document.getElementById('faqStatus').value,
                categoryKey: document.getElementById('faqCategoryKey').value,
                categoryLabel: document.getElementById('faqCategoryLabel').value,
                displayOrder: parseInt(document.getElementById('faqDisplayOrder').value) || 0,
                createdById: document.getElementById('faqCreatedById').value ? parseInt(document.getElementById('faqCreatedById').value) : null
            };
            const url = id ? `/admin/support-faq/${id}` : '/admin/support-faq';
            const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
            fetch(url, { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(data) })
                .then(res => res.json()).then(() => {
                    hideModal('faqModal');
                    loadFaqs();
                }).catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function toggleFaqStatus(id, currentStatus) {
            const action = currentStatus === 'ACTIVE' ? 'deactivate' : 'activate';
            fetch(`/admin/support-faq/${id}/${action}`, { method: 'PUT' })
                .then(() => loadFaqs())
                .catch(err => alert(err));
        }

        function deleteFaq(id) {
            if (confirm('Supprimer cette FAQ ?')) {
                fetch(`/admin/support-faq/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
                    .then(() => loadFaqs())
                    .catch(err => alert(err));
            }
        }

        // Statistiques support
        function loadSupportStats() {
            fetch('/admin/support-stats')
                .then(res => res.json())
                .then(data => {
                    document.getElementById('totalTickets').innerText = data.totalTickets || 0;
                    document.getElementById('openTickets').innerText = data.openTickets || 0;
                    document.getElementById('inProgressTickets').innerText = data.inProgressTickets || 0;
                    document.getElementById('closedTickets').innerText = data.closedTickets || 0;
                    document.getElementById('totalFaqs').innerText = data.totalFaqs || 0;
                    document.getElementById('activeFaqs').innerText = data.activeFaqs || 0;
                })
                .catch(err => console.error(err));
        }

        // Utilitaires
        function showModal(id) { new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(id)).show(); }
        function hideModal(id) { bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById(id)).hide(); }
        function escapeHtml(str) { if (!str) return ''; return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;' }[m])); }
        function formatDate(dateStr) { if (!dateStr) return '-'; return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString('fr-FR'); }

        // Initialisation
        loadSupportStats();
        loadTickets();
        loadFaqs();
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

<!--        function escapeHtml(str) {-->

<!--        }-->

<!--        function renderPagination(containerId, pageData, currentPage, onPageChange) {-->
<!--            const container = document.getElementById(containerId);-->

<!--            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" data-page="${currentPage+1}">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;-->

                    </div>
                    <div class="table-responsive"><table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0"><thead class="table-light"><th>Photo</th><th>ID</th><th>Nom complet</th><th>Email</th><th>Statut</th><th>NÂ° employÃĐ</th><th>Usine</th><th>Actions</th></thead><tbody id="adminsBody"><tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center">Chargement...<\/td><\/tr></tbody></table></div>
                </div>
                <div class="card-footer bg-white"><nav id="adminsPagination"></nav></div>

    <script>
        const PAGE_SIZE = 20;
        // Ãtats pagination & filtres
        let clientsState = { page:0, totalPages:0, filters:{ keyword:'', status:'', minPoints:'', maxPoints:'' } };
        let collectorsState = { page:0, totalPages:0, filters:{ keyword:'', status:'', verified:'', minRating:'' } };
        let accountantsState = { page:0, totalPages:0, filters:{ keyword:'', status:'', centerId:'' } };
        let managersState = { page:0, totalPages:0, filters:{ keyword:'', status:'', centerId:'' } };
        let adminsState = { page:0, totalPages:0, filters:{ keyword:'', status:'', centerId:'' } };

        // ========== UTILITAIRES ==========
        function buildImageUrl(url) {
            if (!url) return '/images/profileDefault.png';
            if (url.startsWith('http')) return url;
            return url.startsWith('/') ? url : '/' + url;
        }

        function escapeHtml(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;'}[m]));
        }

        function formatDate(d) {
            if (!d) return '-';
            return new Date(d).toLocaleString('fr-FR');
        }

        function showToast(message, type='success') {
            const toastContainer = document.querySelector('.toast-container');
            const toast = document.createElement('div');
            toast.className = `toast align-items-center text-white bg-${type} border-0`;
            toast.setAttribute('role', 'alert');
            toast.innerHTML = `<div class="d-flex"><div class="toast-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div><button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white me-2 m-auto" data-bs-dismiss="toast"></button></div>`;
            toastContainer.appendChild(toast);
            const bsToast = new bootstrap.Toast(toast, { autohide: true, delay: 3000 });
            bsToast.show();
            toast.addEventListener('hidden.bs.toast', () => toast.remove());
        }

        // ========== FONCTIONS DE RENDU (CORRIGÃES) ==========
        function renderClients(users) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('clientsBody');
            if (!users || !users.length) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center">Aucun client<\/td><\/tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = users.map(u => `
                <tr>
                    <td><img src="${buildImageUrl(u.profileImageUrl)}" class="profile-img" onclick="loadUserDetails(this)" data-user-id="${u.id}" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#userInfoModal"></td>
                    <td>${u.id}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.firstName || '')} ${escapeHtml(u.lastName || '')}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.email)}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${u.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'badge-active' : (u.status === 'INACTIVE' ? 'badge-inactive' : 'badge-deleted')}">${u.status}</span></td>
                    <td>${u.totalPoints ?? '-'}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(u.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td>${getSimpleActionButtons(u, 'client')}</td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderCollectors(users) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('collectorsBody');
            if (!users || !users.length) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center">Aucun collecteur<\/td><\/tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = users.map(u => `
                <tr>
                    <td><img src="${buildImageUrl(u.profileImageUrl)}" class="profile-img" onclick="loadUserDetails(this)" data-user-id="${u.id}" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#userInfoModal"></td>
                    <td>${u.id}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.firstName || '')} ${escapeHtml(u.lastName || '')}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.email)}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${u.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'badge-active' : (u.status === 'INACTIVE' ? 'badge-inactive' : 'badge-deleted')}">${u.status}</span></td>
                    <td>${u.isVerified ? '<span class="badge badge-verified">Oui</span>' : '<span class="badge bg-warning">Non</span>'}</td>
                    <td>${u.averageRating ?? '-'}</td>
                    <td>${formatDate(u.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td>${getSimpleActionButtons(u, 'collector')}</td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderAccountants(users) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('accountantsBody');
            if (!users || !users.length) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center">Aucun comptable<\/td><\/tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = users.map(u => `
                <tr>
                    <td><img src="${buildImageUrl(u.profileImageUrl)}" class="profile-img" onclick="loadUserDetails(this)" data-user-id="${u.id}" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#userInfoModal"></td>
                    <td>${u.id}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.firstName || '')} ${escapeHtml(u.lastName || '')}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.email)}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${u.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'badge-active' : (u.status === 'INACTIVE' ? 'badge-inactive' : 'badge-deleted')}">${u.status}</span></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.employeeNumber ?? '-')}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.recyclingCenterName ?? '-')}</td>
                    <td>${u.isHeadAccountant ? '<span class="badge bg-info">Chef comptable</span>' : '-'}</td>
                    <td>${getFactoryActionButtons(u, 'accountant')}</td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderManagers(users) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('managersBody');
            if (!users || !users.length) {

            }

                <tr>

                    <td>${u.id}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.firstName || '')} ${escapeHtml(u.lastName || '')}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.email)}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${u.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'badge-active' : (u.status === 'INACTIVE' ? 'badge-inactive' : 'badge-deleted')}">${u.status}</span></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.employeeNumber ?? '-')}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.recyclingCenterName ?? '-')}</td>
                    <td>${getFactoryActionButtons(u, 'manager')}</td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderAdmins(users) {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('adminsBody');
            if (!users || !users.length) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center">Aucun administrateur<\/td><\/tr>';
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = users.map(u => `
                <tr>
                    <td><img src="${buildImageUrl(u.profileImageUrl)}" class="profile-img" onclick="loadUserDetails(this)" data-user-id="${u.id}" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#userInfoModal"></td>
                    <td>${u.id}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.firstName || '')} ${escapeHtml(u.lastName || '')}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.email)}</td>
                    <td><span class="badge ${u.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'badge-active' : (u.status === 'INACTIVE' ? 'badge-inactive' : 'badge-deleted')}">${u.status}</span></td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.employeeNumber ?? '-')}</td>
                    <td>${escapeHtml(u.recyclingCenterName ?? '-')}</td>
                    <td>${getFactoryActionButtons(u, 'admin')}</td>
                </tr>
            `).join('');
        }

        function getSimpleActionButtons(user, type) {
            return `
                <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm action-buttons">
                    ${user.status !== 'ACTIVE' ? `<button class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="performAction('activate', ${user.id}, '${type}')" title="Activer"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></button>` : ''}
                    ${user.status === 'ACTIVE' ? `<button class="btn btn-outline-warning" onclick="performAction('deactivate', ${user.id}, '${type}')" title="DÃĐsactiver"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i></button>` : ''}
                    <button class="btn btn-outline-info" onclick="openResetPasswordModal(${user.id})" title="RÃĐinitialiser mot de passe"><i class="fas fa-key"></i></button>
                    <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="performAction('delete', ${user.id}, '${type}')" title="Supprimer"><i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i></button>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        function getFactoryActionButtons(user, type) {
            return `
                <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm action-buttons">
                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="openEditFactoryUserModal(${user.id})" title="Modifier (complet)"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i></button>
                    ${user.status !== 'ACTIVE' ? `<button class="btn btn-outline-success" onclick="performAction('activate', ${user.id}, '${type}')" title="Activer"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i></button>` : ''}
                    ${user.status === 'ACTIVE' ? `<button class="btn btn-outline-warning" onclick="performAction('deactivate', ${user.id}, '${type}')" title="DÃĐsactiver"><i class="fas fa-ban"></i></button>` : ''}
                    <button class="btn btn-outline-info" onclick="openResetPasswordModal(${user.id})" title="RÃĐinitialiser mot de passe"><i class="fas fa-key"></i></button>
                    <button class="btn btn-outline-danger" onclick="performAction('delete', ${user.id}, '${type}')" title="Supprimer"><i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i></button>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        // ========== CHARGEMENT AJAX (CORRIGÃ) ==========
        async function fetchAndRender(url, state, renderFn, paginationId, stateObj) {
    let params = new URLSearchParams({ page: state.page, size: PAGE_SIZE });
    for (let [k, v] of Object.entries(state.filters)) if (v) params.append(k, v);
    try {
        const response = await fetch(`${url}?${params}`);
        if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
        const data = await response.json();

        let pageData;
        // Si la rÃĐponse a une propriÃĐtÃĐ 'success', c'est une ApiResponse
        if (data.hasOwnProperty('success')) {
            if (!data.success) throw new Error(data.message || 'Erreur API');
            pageData = data.data;
        } else {
            // Sinon, c'est directement la page (format brut)
            pageData = data;
        }

        // VÃĐrification du format
        if (!pageData || !Array.isArray(pageData.content)) {
            throw new Error('Format de rÃĐponse invalide');
        }

        renderFn(pageData.content);
        stateObj.totalPages = pageData.totalPages || 1;
        renderPagination(paginationId, pageData, state.page, (np) => {
            state.page = np;
            fetchAndRender(url, state, renderFn, paginationId, stateObj);
        });
    } catch(err) {
        console.error(err);
        const tbodyId = paginationId.replace('Pagination', 'Body');
        const tbody = document.getElementById(tbodyId);
        if (tbody) tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="10" class="text-center text-danger">Erreur de chargement des donnÃĐes</td></tr>';
        showToast('Impossible de charger les donnÃĐes', 'danger');
    }
}

        function renderPagination(containerId, pageData, currentPage, onPageChange) {
            const container = document.getElementById(containerId);
            if (!container) return;
            const totalPages = pageData.totalPages;
            if (totalPages <= 1) { container.innerHTML = ''; return; }
            let html = '<ul class="pagination pagination-sm justify-content-end mb-0">';
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.first ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" data-page="${currentPage-1}">PrÃĐcÃĐdent</a></li>`;
            for (let i = 0; i < totalPages; i++) {
                html += `<li class="page-item ${i === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" data-page="${i}">${i+1}</a></li>`;
            }
            html += `<li class="page-item ${pageData.last ? 'disabled' : ''}"><a class="page-link" href="#" data-page="${currentPage+1}">Suivant</a></li></ul>`;
            container.innerHTML = html;
            container.querySelectorAll('.page-link').forEach(link => {
                link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const np = parseInt(link.dataset.page);
                    if (!isNaN(np) && np >= 0 && np < totalPages) onPageChange(np);
                });
            });
        }

        // ========== SYNCHRONISATION DES FILTRES ==========
        function syncClientFilters() {
            clientsState.filters = {
                keyword: document.getElementById('clientKeyword').value,
                status: document.getElementById('clientStatus').value,
                minPoints: document.getElementById('clientMinPoints').value,
                maxPoints: document.getElementById('clientMaxPoints').value
            };
            clientsState.page = 0;
            fetchAndRender('/admin/users/clients', clientsState, renderClients, 'clientsPagination', clientsState);
        }

        function resetClientFilters() {
            document.getElementById('clientKeyword').value = '';
            document.getElementById('clientStatus').value = '';
            document.getElementById('clientMinPoints').value = '';
            document.getElementById('clientMaxPoints').value = '';
            syncClientFilters();
        }

        function syncCollectorFilters() {
            collectorsState.filters = {
                keyword: document.getElementById('collectorKeyword').value,
                status: document.getElementById('collectorStatus').value,
                verified: document.getElementById('collectorVerified').value,
                minRating: document.getElementById('collectorMinRating').value
            };
            collectorsState.page = 0;
            fetchAndRender('/admin/users/collectors', collectorsState, renderCollectors, 'collectorsPagination', collectorsState);
        }

        function resetCollectorFilters() {
            document.getElementById('collectorKeyword').value = '';
            document.getElementById('collectorStatus').value = '';
            document.getElementById('collectorVerified').value = '';
            document.getElementById('collectorMinRating').value = '';
            syncCollectorFilters();
        }

        function syncAccountantFilters() {
            accountantsState.filters = {
                keyword: document.getElementById('factoryKeyword_accountant').value,
                status: document.getElementById('factoryStatus_accountant').value,

        }

        }

        // ========== ACTIONS AJAX ==========
        async function performAction(action, userId, type) {
            if (action === 'delete' && !confirm('Supprimer dÃĐfinitivement cet utilisateur ?')) return;
            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/admin/users/${userId}/${action}`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
                });
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
                const data = await response.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    showToast(data.message || 'Action rÃĐussie');
                    refreshCurrentTab();
                } else {
                    showToast(data.message || 'Erreur', 'danger');
                }
            } catch(err) {
                console.error(err);
                showToast('Erreur rÃĐseau', 'danger');
            }
        }

        // ========== RÃINITIALISATION MOT DE PASSE ==========
        function openResetPasswordModal(userId) {
            document.getElementById('resetUserId').value = userId;
            new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('resetPasswordModal')).show();
        }

        async function submitResetPassword() {
            const userId = document.getElementById('resetUserId').value;
            const newPassword = document.getElementById('resetNewPassword').value;
            const confirmPassword = document.getElementById('resetConfirmPassword').value;
            if (newPassword !== confirmPassword) {
                showToast('Les mots de passe ne correspondent pas', 'danger');
                return;
            }
            if (newPassword.length < 8) {
                showToast('Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 8 caractÃĻres', 'danger');
                return;
            }
            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/admin/users/${userId}/reset-password`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ newPassword, confirmPassword })
                });
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
                const data = await response.json();
                if (data.success) {
                    showToast(data.message || 'Mot de passe rÃĐinitialisÃĐ');
                    bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('resetPasswordModal')).hide();
                    refreshCurrentTab();
                } else {
                    showToast(data.message || 'Erreur', 'danger');
                }
            } catch(err) {
                console.error(err);
                showToast('Erreur rÃĐseau', 'danger');
            }
        }

        // ========== ÃDITION FACTORY USER ==========
        async function openEditFactoryUserModal(accountId) {
            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/admin/users/${accountId}/details`);
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
                const user = await response.json();
                if (user.roleType !== 'FACTORY_USER') {
                    showToast('Cet utilisateur nâest pas un employÃĐ dâusine', 'danger');
                    return;
                }
                document.getElementById('editAccountId').value = user.id;
                document.getElementById('editFactoryUserId').value = user.factoryUserId;
                document.getElementById('editFirstName').value = user.firstName || '';
                document.getElementById('editLastName').value = user.lastName || '';
                document.getElementById('editEmail').value = user.email || '';
                document.getElementById('editPhone').value = user.phone || '';
                document.getElementById('editStatus').value = user.status || 'ACTIVE';
                const centerSelect = document.getElementById('editRecyclingCenterId');
                const currentCenterId = user.recyclingCenterId || '';
                centerSelect.value = currentCenterId;
                document.getElementById('editIsHeadAccountant').checked = user.isHeadAccountant === true;
                new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('editFactoryUserModal')).show();
            } catch(err) {
                console.error(err);
                showToast('Impossible de charger les dÃĐtails', 'danger');
            }
        }

        async function saveFactoryUserEdit() {
            const accountId = document.getElementById('editAccountId').value;
            const factoryUserId = document.getElementById('editFactoryUserId').value;
            const firstName = document.getElementById('editFirstName').value.trim();
            const lastName = document.getElementById('editLastName').value.trim();
            const phone = document.getElementById('editPhone').value;
            const status = document.getElementById('editStatus').value;
            const recyclingCenterId = document.getElementById('editRecyclingCenterId').value;
            const isHeadAccountant = document.getElementById('editIsHeadAccountant').checked;

            if (!firstName || !lastName) {
                showToast('Le prÃĐnom et le nom sont obligatoires', 'danger');
                return;
            }

            try {
                // 1. Mettre Ã  jour le compte (tÃĐlÃĐphone, statut)
                const accountResp = await fetch(`/admin/users/${accountId}`, {
                    method: 'PUT',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ phone, status })
                });
                const accountData = await accountResp.json();
                if (!accountData.success) throw new Error(accountData.message || 'Erreur mise Ã  jour compte');

                // 2. Mettre Ã  jour le factory user (prÃĐnom, nom, chef comptable)
                const factoryResp = await fetch(`/admin/factory-users/${factoryUserId}`, {
                    method: 'PUT',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ firstName, lastName, isHeadAccountant })
                });
                const factoryData = await factoryResp.json();
                if (!factoryData.success) throw new Error(factoryData.message || 'Erreur mise Ã  jour profil');

                // 3. Mettre Ã  jour l'usine
                if (recyclingCenterId) {
                    const centerResp = await fetch(`/admin/factory-users/${factoryUserId}/assign-recycling-center?recyclingCenterId=${recyclingCenterId}`, {
                        method: 'PUT'
                    });
                    const centerData = await centerResp.json();
                    if (!centerData.success) console.warn('Usine non mise Ã  jour');
                }

                showToast('EmployÃĐ mis Ã  jour avec succÃĻs');
                bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('editFactoryUserModal')).hide();
                refreshCurrentTab();
            } catch(err) {
                console.error(err);
                showToast('Erreur lors de la mise Ã  jour : ' + err.message, 'danger');
            }
        }

        // ========== DÃTAIL UTILISATEUR ==========
        async function loadUserDetails(element) {
            const userId = element.getAttribute('data-user-id');
            const modalBody = document.getElementById('userInfoModalBody');
            modalBody.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center"><div class="spinner-border" role="status"></div><p>Chargement...</p></div>';
            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/admin/users/${userId}/details`);
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
                const user = await response.json();
                modalBody.innerHTML = generateUserDetailsHtml(user);
            } catch(err) {
                console.error(err);
                modalBody.innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-danger">Impossible de charger les dÃĐtails de l\'utilisateur.</div>';
            }
        }

        function generateUserDetailsHtml(user) {
            const roleColor = user.roleType === 'CLIENT' ? 'bg-primary' : (user.roleType === 'COLLECTOR' ? 'bg-warning text-dark' : 'bg-info');
            const statusColor = user.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'bg-success' : (user.status === 'INACTIVE' ? 'bg-secondary' : 'bg-danger');
            let roleSpecificHtml = '';
            if (user.roleType === 'CLIENT') {
                roleSpecificHtml = `<div class="info-card"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt me-2"></i> <strong>Adresse :</strong> ${escapeHtml(user.address) || '-'}<br><i class="fas fa-globe me-2"></i> <strong>CoordonnÃĐes :</strong> ${user.latitude || '-'} / ${user.longitude || '-'}<br><i class="fas fa-coins me-2"></i> <strong>Points totaux :</strong> <span class="badge bg-success">${user.totalPoints || 0}</span></div>`;
            } else if (user.roleType === 'COLLECTOR') {
                roleSpecificHtml = `<div class="info-card"><i class="fas fa-id-card me-2"></i> <strong>NÂ° identitÃĐ :</strong> ${escapeHtml(user.nationalIdNumber) || '-'}<br><i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i> <strong>VÃĐrifiÃĐ :</strong> <span class="badge ${user.isVerified ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-warning'}">${user.isVerified ? 'Oui' : 'Non'}</span><br><i class="fas fa-star me-2"></i> <strong>Note moyenne :</strong> ${user.averageRating || 0} / 5</div>`;
            } else if (user.roleType === 'FACTORY_USER') {
                roleSpecificHtml = `<div class="info-card"><i class="fas fa-badge me-2"></i> <strong>NÂ° employÃĐ :</strong> ${escapeHtml(user.employeeNumber) || '-'}<br><i class="fas fa-briefcase me-2"></i> <strong>Poste :</strong> <span class="badge bg-info">${escapeHtml(user.position) || '-'}</span><br><i class="fas fa-industry me-2"></i> <strong>Usine :</strong> ${escapeHtml(user.recyclingCenterName) || '-'}<br><i class="fas fa-crown me-2"></i> <strong>Chef comptable :</strong> ${user.isHeadAccountant ? 'Oui' : 'Non'}</div>`;
            }
            return `
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col-md-4 text-center">
                        <img src="${buildImageUrl(user.profileImageUrl)}" class="user-profile-avatar" style="width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;" onclick="window.open(this.src)">
                        <div class="user-name fw-bold fs-5">${escapeHtml(user.fullName)}</div>
                        <div class="user-role badge ${roleColor} fs-6 mt-2">${user.roleType}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-8">
                        <div class="info-card"><i class="fas fa-envelope me-2"></i> <strong>Email :</strong> ${escapeHtml(user.email)}<br><i class="fas fa-phone me-2"></i> <strong>TÃĐlÃĐphone :</strong> ${user.phone || 'Non renseignÃĐ'}<br><i class="fas fa-flag me-2"></i> <strong>Statut :</strong> <span class="badge ${statusColor}">${user.status}</span><br><i class="fas fa-calendar-alt me-2"></i> <strong>Inscrit le :</strong> ${formatDate(user.createdAt)}<br><i class="fas fa-edit me-2"></i> <strong>DerniÃĻre mise Ã  jour :</strong> ${formatDate(user.updatedAt)}</div>
                        ${roleSpecificHtml}
                    </div>
                </div>
                <hr>
                <h6 class="mt-2 mb-3"><i class="fas fa-chart-simple me-2"></i>Statistiques d'activitÃĐ</h6>
                <div class="stat-grid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(100px,1fr));gap:12px;">
                    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-value">${user.transactionsCount || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">Transactions</div></div>
                    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-value">${user.pointMovementsCount || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">Mouvements points</div></div>
                    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-value">${user.paymentsCount || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">Paiements</div></div>
                    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-value">${user.notificationsCount || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">Notifications</div></div>
                    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-value">${user.userChallengesCount || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">DÃĐfis rejoints</div></div>
                    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-value">${user.leaderboardsCount || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">Classements</div></div>
                    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-value">${user.supportTicketsCount || 0}</div><div class="stat-label">Tickets support</div></div>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        // ========== GESTION DES ONGLETS ==========
        function getCurrentTab() {
            const active = document.querySelector('#userTabs .nav-link.active');
            return active ? active.getAttribute('data-bs-target') : '#clients-pane';
        }

        function refreshCurrentTab() {
            const tab = getCurrentTab();
            if (tab === '#clients-pane') syncClientFilters();
            else if (tab === '#collectors-pane') syncCollectorFilters();
            else if (tab === '#accountants-pane') syncAccountantFilters();
            else if (tab === '#managers-pane') syncManagerFilters();
            else if (tab === '#admins-pane') syncAdminFilters();
        }

        function setHashFromTab() { window.location.hash = getCurrentTab(); }
        function initTabsWithHash() {
            const hash = window.location.hash;
            if (hash && document.querySelector(`#userTabs button[data-bs-target="${hash}"]`)) {
                const tab = new bootstrap.Tab(document.querySelector(`#userTabs button[data-bs-target="${hash}"]`));
                tab.show();
            } else {
                const firstTab = new bootstrap.Tab(document.querySelector('#userTabs .nav-link'));
                firstTab.show();
            }
            document.querySelectorAll('#userTabs .nav-link').forEach(btn => {
                btn.addEventListener('shown.bs.tab', () => {
                    setHashFromTab();
                    refreshCurrentTab();
                });
            });
            refreshCurrentTab();
        }

        // ========== CHARGEMENT DES USINES POUR LES SELECTS ==========
        async function loadCentersForSelects() {
            try {
                const response = await fetch('/admin/centers/list');
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error();
                const centers = await response.json();
                const selects = ['accountantCenterSelect', 'managerCenterSelect', 'editRecyclingCenterId', 'factoryCenter_accountant', 'factoryCenter_manager', 'factoryCenter_admin'];
                selects.forEach(id => {
                    const sel = document.getElementById(id);
                    if (sel) {
                        const isFilter = id.includes('factoryCenter');
                        sel.innerHTML = isFilter ? '<option value="">Toutes usines</option>' : '<option value="">-- Aucune usine --</option>';
                        centers.forEach(c => {
                            const opt = document.createElement('option');
                            opt.value = c.id;
                            opt.textContent = c.name;
                            sel.appendChild(opt);
                        });
                    }
                });
            } catch(err) {
                console.error('Erreur chargement usines:', err);
            }
        }

        // ========== SOUMISSION AJAX AJOUT COMPTABLE/MANAGER ==========
        document.getElementById('addAccountantForm')?.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const formData = new FormData(e.target);
            const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());
            if (data.recyclingCenterId && data.recyclingCenterId !== '') data.recyclingCenterId = parseInt(data.recyclingCenterId);
            else delete data.recyclingCenterId;
            data.isHeadAccountant = document.getElementById('addIsHeadAccountant').checked;
            try {
                const response = await fetch('/admin/add-accountant', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(data)
                });
                const result = await response.json();
                if (result.success) {
                    bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('addAccountantModal')).hide();
                    showToast('Comptable ajoutÃĐ');
                    refreshCurrentTab();
                } else {
                    showToast(result.message, 'danger');
                }
            } catch(err) {
                showToast('Erreur rÃĐseau', 'danger');
            }
        });

        document.getElementById('addManagerForm')?.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const formData = new FormData(e.target);
            const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());
            if (data.recyclingCenterId && data.recyclingCenterId !== '') data.recyclingCenterId = parseInt(data.recyclingCenterId);
            else delete data.recyclingCenterId;
            try {
                const response = await fetch('/admin/add-manager', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(data)
                });
                const result = await response.json();
                if (result.success) {
                    bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('addManagerModal')).hide();
                    showToast('Manager ajoutÃĐ');
                    refreshCurrentTab();
                } else {
                    showToast(result.message, 'danger');
                }
            } catch(err) {
                showToast('Erreur rÃĐseau', 'danger');
            }
        });

        // ========== INITIALISATION ==========
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            initTabsWithHash();
            loadCentersForSelects();
        });
    </script>
</div>
</body>
</html>

package com.recyclix.backend;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTest;

@SpringBootTest
class BackendApplicationTests {

	@Test
	void contextLoads() {
	}

}
